vocabulary.definition: v. 复核( double-check的过去式和过去分词 )

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯莉在拼写测试中仔细检查了单词

vocabulary.definition: v. 拼写错( misspell的过去式和过去分词 )

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 老实说我拼错了，你没听懂。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 匹萨饼店, 意大利肉饼店

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他们开车回披萨店的整个过程中，凯文一直说："但这不是我们的错，收银员没有注意到

vocabulary.definition: n. 老兄, 老姐

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "孩子，你的拼写测试在哪里？

vocabulary.definition: n. 手倒立

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 麦科马克承诺，如果有人获得满分，他就会倒立

vocabulary.definition: n. 出纳员；[经] 司库, 出纳员, 收支员

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们快到家时，妈妈意识到收银员给了他们太多零钱

vocabulary.definition: n. 字典, 词典；[计] 词典
vocabulary.context: If she got 100 percent today, she'd win her class's First-Quarter Spelling Challenge and a brand-new dictionary that came with videos and other cool stuff.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果她今天获得了 100% 的成绩，她将赢得班级的第一季度拼写挑战赛和一本带有视频和其他很酷的东西的全新词典

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 吞, 大口大口地吸气, 吸收, 抑制；v.i. 吞咽；n. 吞咽；[计] 字节组

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡里咽了口口水。 "在我的房间里。"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 赚得, 获得, 博得；[计] 欧州科学研究网
vocabulary.context: How could she tell the class she hadn't earned the prize after all?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她怎么能告诉全班同学她根本没有获奖？

vocabulary.definition: n. 邮递员；[法] 邮递员, 理财法庭的高级律师
vocabulary.context: You take one baby, you slap a 15-cent stamp on its clothes, add about $50 for insurance (if the postman lost your baby, you'd want it back, right?), give the baby to the mailman, and voila!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你带了一个婴儿，在他的衣服上贴了一张 15 美分的邮票，加上大约 50 美元的保险（如果邮递员把你的孩子弄丢了，你会想要回来，对吧？），把婴儿交给邮递员，瞧！

vocabulary.definition: adv. 忠实地；忠贞地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的旅行花费了 53 美分一张邮票，然后被尽职地贴在六岁女孩的外套上

vocabulary.definition: n. 流氓, 无赖, 坏蛋, 淘气鬼；[法] 流氓, 无赖, 恶棍

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个故事最终成为新闻，铁路邮政服务辛辛那提分部的负责人约翰·克拉克最终结束了这件事

vocabulary.definition: adj. 公开展示的, 惊人的, 壮观的；n. 奇观, 惊人之举, 展览物
vocabulary.context: After that, they would no longer allow kids to be classified as "harmless live animals." "Parents Used To Be Able To Mail Their Kids" from Spectacular Stories for Curious Kids by Jesse Sullivan.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此后，他们将不再允许儿童被归类为"无害的活动物"。杰西·沙利文（Jesse Sullivan）的《好奇孩子的精彩故事》中的"父母过去可以邮寄孩子"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无害处的, 未受损害的, 无辜的, 无恶意的；[法] 无害的, 无恶意的, 无损害的
vocabulary.context: After that, they would no longer allow kids to be classified as "harmless live animals." "Parents Used To Be Able To Mail Their Kids" from Spectacular Stories for Curious Kids by Jesse Sullivan.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此后，他们将不再允许儿童被归类为"无害的活动物"。杰西·沙利文（Jesse Sullivan）的《好奇孩子的精彩故事》中的"父母过去可以邮寄孩子"

vocabulary.definition: n. 铁路, 轨道；[经] 铁路
vocabulary.context: It was actually cheaper to buy a stamp and use Railway Mail to send your kid as a piece of mail, than it was to buy your child a train ticket.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 购买邮票并使用铁路邮件将您的孩子作为邮件寄给您的孩子实际上比为您的孩子购买火车票更便宜

vocabulary.definition: n. 保险, 保险业, 保险费；[医] 保险
vocabulary.context: You take one baby, you slap a 15-cent stamp on its clothes, add about $50 for insurance (if the postman lost your baby, you'd want it back, right?), give the baby to the mailman, and voila!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你带了一个婴儿，在他的衣服上贴了一张 15 美分的邮票，加上大约 50 美元的保险（如果邮递员把你的孩子弄丢了，你会想要回来，对吧？），把婴儿交给邮递员，瞧！

vocabulary.definition: n. 亲戚, 关系词；adj. 有关系的, 相对的, 比较的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们是朋友、邻居，有时，就像梅·皮尔斯托夫的例子一样，邮递员甚至是近亲

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当啮齿动物啃咬时，这个防护罩可以防止塑料灰尘进入其喉咙和气管

vocabulary.definition: n. 配克(英美干量单位), 啄痕, 啄食, 许多；v.t. 啄, 啄食, 琢, 凿成, 扔；v.i. 啄, 吹毛求疵, 啄食, 勉强吃；[计] 取数

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在塔米莎想出一个与"扁面条"押韵的词之前，龙拍动着巨大的蝙蝠翼，用青铜爪子缠住了她，然后飞向天空

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她拿起软管，用剪刀剪掉喷嘴

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 塔米莎转向塔里收集的一堆垃圾：一台旧发条留声机、一个威夫球、一把玩具弓箭、一根花园软管

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地板的其余部分以及所有其他可用表面的大部分都覆盖着垃圾：令人震惊的塔状的沾满油脂的罐子，数十个用过的水彩调色板，无可救药地缠结在一起的溜溜球和桨球，以及大约一千个软饮料罐顶部的铝制标签

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们刚刚在游戏中融入了一个新元素，涉及将长曲棍球棒像剑一样敲击在一起，这项活动对于旁观者来说总是危险且令人紧张的，但对于参与者来说却非常有趣

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "而你，"她转向布朗尼蛋糕说道，"我想，你在设计和木工方面都很熟练。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 押韵的
vocabulary.context: The dragon flapped his enormous batwings, wrapped his bronze claws around her, and took off into the sky before Tamitha could think of a word that rhymed with "linguine."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在塔米莎想出一个与"扁面条"押韵的词之前，龙拍动着巨大的蝙蝠翼，用青铜爪子缠住了她，然后飞向天空

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她一直在路上闲逛，脑子里编着一首关于意大利面的诗，这时这个生物从云端俯冲而下，全身都是鼓鼓的红色肌肉和锋利的鳞片

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1770年代初期，北美13个英国殖民地的公民开始反抗英国

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相反，他们要求生命权、自由权、财产权、公共集会权和陪审团审判权

vocabulary.definition: v. 在（土地等）上实行过度放牧, 过度放牧( overgraze的现在分词 )

vocabulary.contextTranslation: （栖息地是满足动物需求的地方，主要是食物、住所和交配。）采矿、战争和农场动物的过度放牧都导致了栖息地的丧失

vocabulary.definition: n. 艉楼, 船尾, 消息, 啪啪声；v.t. 使疲倦, 使船尾受击；v.i. 疲乏, 发啪啪声
vocabulary.context: "You have to find something related to them: poops, scrapes (claw marks), and pee," Dr.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你必须找到与它们相关的东西：粪便、擦伤（爪痕）和尿液，"博士说

vocabulary.definition: n. 斑纹, 花斑；adj. 有斑纹的；v. (使)起斑纹

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 浅灰色皮毛上有深色斑纹，将其隐藏在岩石地形中

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后他们把猫放了，没有受伤

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 16 岁时，凯尔·麦卡锡 (Kyle McCarthy) 怀里抱着一头注射了镇静剂的雪豹的柔软身体

vocabulary.definition: adj. 高低不平的, 崎岖的, 粗糙的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 超长的尾巴可以在陡峭崎岖的地面上提供平衡

vocabulary.definition: n. 生计, 营生, 生活
vocabulary.context: Then the big cats eat livestock, and the herders kill the leopards to protect their livelihoods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后大型猫科动物吃牲畜，牧民杀死豹子以保护生计

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 猫科动物已经失去了重要的栖息地

vocabulary.definition: adj. 背着的, 在背肩上的；adv. 背着, 在背肩上
vocabulary.context: "I want a piggyback, too!" "No, it's my turn!"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我也想要一个背驮！" "不用了，轮到我了！"

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有尖叫声，没有苏打水洒在他的腿上，没有肮脏的手指偷走他的玉米面包

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "哇哦，"七个孩子哀嚎道。妈妈把他们赶了出去。布伦达阿姨跟在后面，以确保他们找到了浴室

vocabulary.definition: n. 夹钳；v.t. 夹紧, 强加
vocabulary.context: " James pretended to explain, then clamped a handover his mouth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "詹姆斯假装解释，然后捂住了嘴

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不寻常地, 异乎寻常地, (非正式)非常
vocabulary.context: They were unusually quiet, just picking at their food.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们异常安静，只是在吃东西

vocabulary.definition: n. 电冰箱, 冷藏库；[计] 冷冻机; 致冷器
vocabulary.context: James backed up against the refrigerator and shot a pleading look toward his mother.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 詹姆斯靠在冰箱上，向他的母亲投去恳求的目光

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他拿了一块火鸡，回头看了一眼孩子们的桌子，正好看到肖恩偷了卡拉的果汁

vocabulary.definition: n. 鸭子；v.i. 没入水中, 闪避；v.t. 猛按...入水, 躲避
vocabulary.context: "No rest for the main attraction, eh?" Mom ruffled James's hair. James ducked. He hated being treated like a little kid. He was almost as tall as his mom, after all. Mom handed him a stack of plastic plates. "Here, take these to the kids' table."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "主要景点没休息吧？"妈妈揉乱了詹姆斯的头发。詹姆斯躲开了。他讨厌被当作小孩子对待。毕竟他几乎和他妈妈一样高了。妈妈递给他一叠塑料盘子。 "来，把这些带到孩子们的餐桌上。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
vocabulary.context: Three-year-old Cara had found James's hiding spot, behind the sofa in the basement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 三岁的卡拉找到了詹姆斯的藏身之处，在地下室的沙发后面

vocabulary.definition: n. 陆上运输, 搬运；v. 转到陆上运输
vocabulary.context: "We have to finish this portage, make it to the next lake, and find a camp all before nightfall.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们必须在夜幕降临之前完成这次运输，到达下一个湖，并找到一个营地

vocabulary.definition: v. 重新发动, 重新发射；n. 再下水, 再发射; 重整旗鼓, 重新开业; （商品等的）重新投放市场; 重新推向公众, 重新开张
vocabulary.context: We somehow managed to finish the portage, relaunch the canoes, and find a camp for the night, but not without thoroughly ruining my shoes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们设法完成了搬运，重新启动了独木舟，并找到了过夜的营地，但还是彻底毁了我的鞋子

vocabulary.definition: adv. 怀疑地；可疑地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "好吧，我们看看你是否能做得更好，"爸爸半信半疑地说

vocabulary.definition: n. 粉红色, 石竹花, 化身, 典范, 头面人物, 极度；adj. 粉红的, 石竹科的, 比较激进的, 脸色发红的, 精致的, 有点下流的；v.t. 刺, 扎, 刺痛, 射伤, 使面红耳赤, 使变粉红色；v.i. 变粉红色

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 粉红色褪成深紫色和蓝色

vocabulary.definition: adv. 极其丰富地, 大量地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 说"明尼苏达的荒野"有些言过其实，但这就是我最终来到这里的原因，大汗淋漓，每五秒就拍一次蚊子

vocabulary.definition: n. 日炙, 晒斑, 晒焦, 晒黑；v.t. vi. (使)晒黑, (使)晒得退色, (使)晒焦
vocabulary.context: And I'm sunburned."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 而且我被晒伤了。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 非常不幸地, 可悲地, 贫困地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他试图让自己看起来有尊严，但惨遭失败

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 增威严, 使高贵, 故作显贵
vocabulary.context: He tried to look dignified, but failed miserably.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他试图让自己看起来有尊严，但惨遭失败

vocabulary.definition: n. 食道；[医] 食管
vocabulary.context: Experts say that these whales have no teeth and their esophagus is actually too small to swallow anything large.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 专家表示，这些鲸鱼没有牙齿，它们的食道实际上太小，无法吞咽任何大的东西

vocabulary.definition: n. 长矛, 柳叶刀, 执矛战士；v.t. 以长矛攻击, 冲进；v.i. 急进

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他注意到几群不同的鱼群、沙矛鱼和条纹鱼在他周围游动

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 压缩, 束紧, 使收缩；v.i. 收缩

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他能感觉到他周围的嘴在收缩！

vocabulary.definition: n. 驼背(者), 细鳞大马哈鱼；[医] 脊柱后突, 驼背
vocabulary.context: He had been swallowed by a humpback whale!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他被座头鲸吞掉了！

vocabulary.definition: n. 龙虾

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们确实游到海底沙架的底部，并从底部捕捞迁徙的龙虾

vocabulary.definition: adv. 自信地；安心地
vocabulary.context: And you can swim confidently knowing that it is highly unlikely that you will ever be swallowed by a whale!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 而且您可以自信地游泳，因为您知道自己被鲸鱼吞掉的可能性极小！

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 打, 使逆行, 胜过, 推敲, 鞭打；v.i. 打谷, 痛打, 剧烈扭动, 逆行；n. 打谷, (划水)鞭状动作
vocabulary.context: Finally the whale came to the surface of the water, thrashed about and spit Michael out.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最后，鲸鱼浮出水面，猛烈地挣扎，把迈克尔吐了出来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未意识到的, 无意识的, 无知觉的；[医] 人事不省的, 神志丧失的; 无意识的
vocabulary.context: Michael wasn't unconscious. It was dark because he was inside the mouth of a giant creature. He could feel the mouth constricting around him! At first he thought he might have been swallowed by a great white shark, but then he realized there were no teeth. He had been swallowed by a humpback whale!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 迈克尔并没有失去知觉。周围一片漆黑，因为他正处在一个巨大生物的嘴里。他能感觉到周围的嘴巴在收缩！起初他以为自己可能被大白鲨吞掉了，但后来他意识到自己没有牙齿。他被座头鲸吞掉了！

vocabulary.definition: adv. 逐字地, 按照字面上地, 不夸张地
vocabulary.context: They literally swim down to the bottom of a sandy shelf on the ocean floor and pluck migrating lobsters off the bottom.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们确实游到海底沙架的底部，并从底部捕捞迁徙的龙虾

vocabulary.definition: n. 初排, 草率的表演, 开拍前的排练

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它将化学物质释放到血液中，这些化学物质作用于身体的不同部位

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 经历可能会导致长期的恐惧，从而阻止一个人尝试新事物

vocabulary.definition: n. 肾上腺素；[化] 肾上腺素

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，肾上腺素 (ah-DREN-uh-lin) 会使心跳更快、更剧烈

vocabulary.context: She is a sociologist, a scientist who studies how people relate to each other.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她是一位社会学家，一位研究人们如何相互联系的科学家

vocabulary.definition: n. 心跳
vocabulary.context: Faster heartbeat and breathing send more blood and oxygen to the muscles so they're ready when they're needed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 更快的心跳和呼吸可以向肌肉输送更多的血液和氧气，以便它们在需要时做好准备

vocabulary.context: She has set up "haunted houses" (walk-through exhibits of scary but harmless surprises) to see how people respond to fear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她设立了"鬼屋"（展示可怕但无害的惊喜的展览）来观察人们如何应对恐惧

vocabulary.definition: n. 震颤, 激动, 刺激性, 一阵激动；v.i. 震颤, 颤抖, 激动；v.t. 使激动, 使颤动
vocabulary.context: Some feel that same kind of excitement when they watch a scary movie or go on a thrill ride."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人在观看恐怖电影或乘坐惊险刺激的游乐设施时也会感到同样的兴奋。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 反应, 回答, 响应；[计] 应答

vocabulary.context: Multiple wall slots snapped open. Small objects of different materials and shapes rolled, fluttered, and rattled across and above the floor. The examiner's voice announced, "Collect all twelve objects. You have three minutes." A buzzer sounded.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 多个墙壁槽突然打开。不同材质和形状的小物体在地板上和上方滚动、飘动并发出嘎嘎声。考官的声音宣布："将十二件物品全部收集起来。给你三分钟的时间。"蜂鸣器响起

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 您被授权完成考试。"

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 中心辅导员玛丽·贝丝·加拉格尔 (Mary Beth Gallagher) 热爱足球，并且知道女孩们也会喜欢它

vocabulary.definition: n. 邀请, 请柬, 引诱；[经] 邀请, 招待, 吸引

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一封邀请函到了

vocabulary.definition: n. 对手, 敌手, 反对者；adj. 敌对的, 反对的, 对面的

vocabulary.context: An American soccer team from Briarcliff Manor, New York, heard about them from friends and immediately sent all their uniforms and shoes to their "soccer sisters." When the bright orange uniforms arrived, the Nordkamp girls danced with delight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 纽约布里亚克利夫庄园的一支美国足球队从朋友那里听说了她们，立即将她们所有的队服和鞋子送给了她们的"足球姐妹"。当鲜橙色制服到达时，诺德坎普的女孩们高兴地跳舞

vocabulary.definition: n. 夜鹰, 夜生活者
vocabulary.context: This wheel had feathers, too: magpie, nighthawk, turkey, and crane feathers to bear its weight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个轮子也有羽毛：喜鹊、夜鹰、火鸡和鹤的羽毛来承受它的重量

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个轮子也有羽毛：喜鹊、夜鹰、火鸡和鹤的羽毛来承受它的重量

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在边缘上，他们放置了鸟的羽毛--红雀、云雀和鹰--让它飞过天空，并向四个方向传播热量和光线

vocabulary.definition: n. 带信人, 票据持有人, 搬运者；[经] 持票人, 持有人, 不(无)记名
vocabulary.context: "We will give our spirits to the Sun and the Moon so they will have life and power to move across the sky." One entered the turquoise disk and he was called Jóhonnaa'áí or Sun Bearer; the other entered the white disk and was called Tl'éhonaa'áí, or Moon Bearer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们将把我们的灵魂交给太阳和月亮，这样它们就有生命和力量在天空中移动。"其中一个进入了绿松石色的圆盘，他被称为 Jóhonnaa'áí 或"太阳承载者"。另一个进入白色圆盘，被称为"Tl'éhonaa'áí"，即"月亮承载者"

vocabulary.definition: n. 冷, 凉爽, 冷静
vocabulary.context: This one will carry coolness and moisture." She and First Man used white shell to create a face, with a band of yellow pollen on its chin and a rim of red coral.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个会带来凉爽和潮湿。"她和第一人用白色贝壳创造了一张脸，下巴上有一条黄色花粉带，边缘有红色珊瑚

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 照明, 用灯装饰, 阐明, 说明, 使灿烂；v.i. 照亮, 用灯装饰
vocabulary.context: The First People had only four lights to illuminate the world: white light from the eastern mountains, blue light from the southern mountains, yellow light from the western peaks, and darkness from the north.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 原住民只有四种光来照亮世界：来自东部山脉的白光、来自南部山脉的蓝光、来自西部山峰的黄光和来自北方的黑暗

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它的角里蕴藏着女性的闪电和柔和的风

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可利用的, 可获得的, 有效的；[医] 有效的, 可得的
vocabulary.context: She asked for a large, flat piece of the hardest rock available.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她要了一块大而平坦的最坚硬的岩石

vocabulary.definition: n. 暂停；[计] 超时
vocabulary.context: Jared and Jessica went to time-out.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 贾里德和杰西卡暂停

vocabulary.definition: n. 暖气装置, 散热器, 辐射体；[化] 散热器
vocabulary.context: "Look at the radiator!" Angela said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "看看散热器！"安吉拉说

vocabulary.definition: n. 算术, 算术知识；[机] 算术; 算术的
vocabulary.context: On the first morning of second grade, Jared remembered five things he didn't like about school: Jessica, lining up, arithmetic, spelling, and reading aloud.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 二年级的第一个早上，贾里德想起了他不喜欢学校的五件事：杰西卡、排队、算术、拼写和大声朗读

vocabulary.definition: n. 小猫, 全部赌注
vocabulary.context: "Kitty, kitty," Mrs. Thomas said. The paws disappeared. "If we ignore them, maybe they'll come out. At least the heat isn't on."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "小猫，小猫，"托马斯夫人说。爪子消失了。 "如果我们忽视他们，也许他们就会出来。至少暖气还没开。"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使尖锐, 使敏捷, 加重, 削尖；v.i. 尖锐化, 变锋利
vocabulary.context: When he sharpened his pencil, he peeked into the tiny box.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他削铅笔时，他向小盒子里看了一眼

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使模糊, 弄脏；v.i. 弄脏, 模糊
vocabulary.context: At reading time, Mrs. Thomas asked Jared to read. Reading aloud always made Jared nervous. As he picked up the book, his hands shook. Words blurred.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 读书时，托马斯夫人请贾里德读书。大声朗读总是让贾里德感到紧张。当他拿起书的时候，他的手在颤抖。言语模糊

vocabulary.definition: n. 嘘声, 嘶嘶声；v.i. 发出嘘声, 发嘶嘶声；v.t. 发嘶嘶声表示
vocabulary.context: "Don't touch my kittens!" Jessica hissed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "别碰我的小猫！"杰西卡发出嘶嘶声

vocabulary.definition: n. 援救, 解救, 营救；v.t. 援救, 救出, 营救
vocabulary.context: "Class, Jared rescued the kittens," Mrs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "同学们，贾里德救了小猫，"夫人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 神经紧张的, 不安的, 神经的；[医] 神经的; 神经质的, 神经过敏的
vocabulary.context: At reading time, Mrs. Thomas asked Jared to read. Reading aloud always made Jared nervous. As he picked up the book, his hands shook. Words blurred.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 读书时，托马斯夫人请贾里德读书。大声朗读总是让贾里德感到紧张。当他拿起书的时候，他的手在颤抖。言语模糊

vocabulary.definition: n. 隆头鱼
vocabulary.context: Eels know where to go for help - to the Hawaiian cleaner wrasse (RASS).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鳗鱼知道去哪里寻求帮助 - 夏威夷清洁濑鱼 (RASS)

vocabulary.definition: n. 等足类动物；adj. 等足类动物的
vocabulary.context: These parasites, called isopods, latch onto fish and suck their blood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些寄生虫被称为等足类动物，它们附着在鱼身上并吸食它们的血液

vocabulary.definition: n. 洗衣店, 洗衣作坊
vocabulary.context: As the surgeon fish darts off, a sleek unicorn fish visits the cleaner's station.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当外科医生鱼飞奔而去时，一条光滑的独角兽鱼来到了清洁站

vocabulary.definition: n. 色彩( coloring的名词复数 ); 色调; 着色法; 着色剂
vocabulary.context: These roller-coaster movements, along with the bright purple stripe and yellow colorings on its black body, attract the attention of a surgeon fish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些过山车般的动作，加上其黑色身体上的亮紫色条纹和黄色，吸引了外科医生鱼的注意力

vocabulary.definition: n. 过山车
vocabulary.context: These roller-coaster movements, along with the bright purple stripe and yellow colorings on its black body, attract the attention of a surgeon fish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些过山车般的动作，加上其黑色身体上的亮紫色条纹和黄色，吸引了外科医生鱼的注意力

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 飞来飞去；n. 轻快飞行的东西, 一掠而过的东西；[计] 抖动
vocabulary.context: Leaving its home in a shallow coral reef, the cleaner wrasse signals that it is ready for business by flittering up and down and back and forth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 清洁濑鱼离开浅珊瑚礁中的家，通过上下、来回摆动来发出信号，表明它已准备好开始工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 膀胱, 囊；[医] 囊, 膀胱
vocabulary.context: Since the shark has no swim bladder to help it float, it sinks when it stops swimming.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于鲨鱼没有鱼鳔来帮助它漂浮，因此当它停止游泳时它就会下沉

vocabulary.definition: n. 鳃, 菌褶, 沟壑, 少女；v.t. 用刺网捕, 去除内脏；v.i. 被刺网捕住
vocabulary.context: The surgeon fish opens its gills and spreads its fins.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 刺尾鱼张开鳃并张开鳍

vocabulary.definition: pron. 他们自己, 她们自己, 它们自己
vocabulary.context: At the end of the day, many of them make a blanket of mucus like a sleeping bag and wrap themselves inside.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一天结束时，他们中的许多人会用粘液做成睡袋一样的毯子，然后把自己裹在里面

vocabulary.definition: n. 马鞭草
vocabulary.context: Because they could not grow English tea in America, they used local plants to make "liberty tea." Using raspberry and mint leaves, verbena and lemon balm, even roses, violets, and goldenrod flowers, they brewed delicious hot drinks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因为他们无法在美国种植英国茶，所以他们用当地的植物来制作"自由茶"。他们用覆盆子和薄荷叶、马鞭草和柠檬香脂，甚至玫瑰、紫罗兰和黄花，酿造了美味的热饮

vocabulary.definition: n. 悬钩子, 呸声；[化] 覆盆子; 悬钩子
vocabulary.context: Because they could not grow English tea in America, they used local plants to make "liberty tea." Using raspberry and mint leaves, verbena and lemon balm, even roses, violets, and goldenrod flowers, they brewed delicious hot drinks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因为他们无法在美国种植英国茶，所以他们用当地的植物来制作"自由茶"。他们用覆盆子和薄荷叶、马鞭草和柠檬香脂，甚至玫瑰、紫罗兰和黄花，酿造了美味的热饮

vocabulary.definition: n. 一种黄花属植物
vocabulary.context: Because they could not grow English tea in America, they used local plants to make "liberty tea." Using raspberry and mint leaves, verbena and lemon balm, even roses, violets, and goldenrod flowers, they brewed delicious hot drinks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因为他们无法在美国种植英国茶，所以他们用当地的植物来制作"自由茶"。他们用覆盆子和薄荷叶、马鞭草和柠檬香脂，甚至玫瑰、紫罗兰和黄花，酿造了美味的热饮

vocabulary.definition: adj. 家里纺的, 家里做的, 简朴的, 不做作的, 平凡的, 朴素的, 朴实的, 粗陋的；n. 土布
vocabulary.context: They were proud to wear their homespun clothes as a symbol of their strength.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们很自豪能穿着土布衣服作为他们力量的象征

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不具名地；化名地
vocabulary.context: Some wrote letters and poems about politics, sending them anonymously to local newspapers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人写了有关政治的信件和诗歌，并匿名寄给当地报纸

vocabulary.definition: n. 堇菜, 紫罗兰；adj. 堇菜科的, 紫罗兰色的
vocabulary.context: Because they could not grow English tea in America, they used local plants to make "liberty tea." Using raspberry and mint leaves, verbena and lemon balm, even roses, violets, and goldenrod flowers, they brewed delicious hot drinks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因为他们无法在美国种植英国茶，所以他们用当地的植物来制作"自由茶"。他们用覆盆子和薄荷叶、马鞭草和柠檬香脂，甚至玫瑰、紫罗兰和黄花，酿造了美味的热饮

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无法接受的, 不受欢迎的；[法] 不能接受的, 不受欢迎的, 难以承认的
vocabulary.context: To the colonists, this was unacceptable.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于殖民者来说，这是不可接受的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 殖民的, 殖民地的；[法] 殖民地居民
vocabulary.context: But they found other ways to support the colonial fight for independence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但他们找到了其他方式来支持殖民地的独立斗争

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 反对, 以...对抗, 抗争；v.i. 反对
vocabulary.context: One writer criticized colonial men for not doing more to oppose unfair British laws.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一位作家批评殖民地人民没有采取更多行动来反对不公平的英国法律

vocabulary.definition: n. 同盟, 联盟, 组织联盟
vocabulary.context: However, the Constitution was a replacement for an even older set of rules called the Articles of Confederation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，《宪法》取代了一套更古老的规则，即《邦联条款》

vocabulary.definition: n. 归还, 更换, 代替者；[医] 复位, 置换
vocabulary.context: However, the Constitution was a replacement for an even older set of rules called the Articles of Confederation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，《宪法》取代了一套更古老的规则，即《邦联条款》

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 任命, 指定, 下令；[法] 派, 派任, 任命
vocabulary.context: For example, the leader of the executive branch (the president) gets to appoint, or choose, many government leaders.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，行政部门的领导人（总统）可以任命或选择许多政府领导人

vocabulary.definition: n. 随笔, 短文, 评论, 企图；v.t. 试图
vocabulary.context: Alexander Hamilton and others then wrote essays known as the Federalist papers to explain the new Constitution.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亚历山大·汉密尔顿和其他人随后撰写了被称为《联邦党人文集》的文章来解释新宪法

vocabulary.definition: n. 立法机构；adj. 立法的, 有立法权的
vocabulary.context: So they separated the government into three equal branches - legislative, executive, and judicial.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，他们将政府分为三个平等的部门--立法、行政和司法

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 赞同, 核准, 为...提供证据；v.i. 赞许
vocabulary.context: The Constitution went into effect on March 4, 1789, after nine states had approved it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 宪法经九个州批准后于 1789 年 3 月 4 日生效

vocabulary.definition: n. 修订, 改善, 改良, 改正；[化] 调理剂; 修正
vocabulary.context: Changes are called amendments.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 变更称为修正案

vocabulary.definition: n. 执行部门, 执行委员会, 执行者, 经理主管人员；adj. 执行的, 善于执行的, 善于经营的；[计] 执行程序
vocabulary.context: So they separated the government into three equal branches - legislative, executive, and judicial.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，他们将政府分为三个平等的部门--立法、行政和司法

vocabulary.definition: n. 被拒之人, 被弃之物, 不合格品, 次品；v.t. 拒绝, 抵制, 否决, 驳回, 丢弃, 呕出
vocabulary.context: But part of the legislative branch (the Senate) has the power to reject the president's choices.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但部分立法部门（参议院）有权否决总统的选择

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不动产的
vocabulary.context: He and his wife, Taylor, run two real-estate companies and started Beyond the Basics, Inc., a nonprofit devoted to helping kids.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他和妻子泰勒经营着两家房地产公司，并创办了 Beyond the Basics, Inc.，这是一家致力于帮助儿童的非营利组织

vocabulary.definition: n. 中后卫球员
vocabulary.context: Most people know Brandon Copeland as a linebacker for the New York Jets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数人都知道布兰登·科普兰是纽约喷气机队的后卫

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 玩戏法, 行骗, 篡改；v.t. 耍弄, 歪曲, 篡改；n. 玩戏法, 魔术, 欺骗
vocabulary.context: When you're juggling a lot of activities, get your work done first.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当你同时处理很多活动时，先完成你的工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 优秀, 卓越, 优点
vocabulary.context: I was fortunate enough to have parents who expected excellence in the classroom.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我很幸运，有一群期望在课堂上表现出色的父母

vocabulary.definition: adj. 出汗的, 吃力的
vocabulary.context: And when you come back in, sweaty and tired, you won't have to worry about doing anything else.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当您满身大汗、疲惫不堪地回来时，您无需担心做其他任何事情

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非赢利的, 无利可图的；[法] 非营利的, 无利可图的
vocabulary.context: He and his wife, Taylor, run two real-estate companies and started Beyond the Basics, Inc., a nonprofit devoted to helping kids.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他和妻子泰勒经营着两家房地产公司，并创办了 Beyond the Basics, Inc.，这是一家致力于帮助儿童的非营利组织

vocabulary.definition: n. 生活方式
vocabulary.context: That's how I watched her put together a lifestyle for us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这就是我看到她为我们打造生活方式的方式

vocabulary.definition: n. 预算；v.i. 编预算；v.t. 编入预算, 安排；adj. 廉价的
vocabulary.context: She could write you a mean budget, saying where every dollar was going and how much she had to spend.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她可以给你写一份平均预算，说明每一美元的去向以及她必须花多少钱。 【07】她不敢用眼睛问他

vocabulary.definition: adj. 财政的, 金融的；[经] 财政的, 金融的, 财务的
vocabulary.context: At the University of Pennsylvania, he teaches students how to make smart financial decisions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在宾夕法尼亚大学，他教学生如何做出明智的财务决策

vocabulary.definition: n. [鱼]鹦嘴鱼, 隆头鱼
vocabulary.context: Out of the water surged a giant parrotfish with a mouth like a gaping cave and a beak as sharp as spiraling coral.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一条巨大的鹦嘴鱼从水中涌出，它的嘴像一个大洞，喙像螺旋珊瑚一样锋利

vocabulary.definition: n. 旗鱼
vocabulary.context: With the speed of a sailfish, they nimbly wove the black tresses into a web.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她们以旗鱼般的速度，灵活地将黑发编织成网

vocabulary.definition: v. 盘旋上升（或下降）( spiral的现在分词 ); （物价等）不断急剧地上升（或下降）
vocabulary.context: Out of the water surged a giant parrotfish with a mouth like a gaping cave and a beak as sharp as spiraling coral.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一条巨大的鹦嘴鱼从水中涌出，它的嘴像一个大洞，喙像螺旋珊瑚一样锋利

vocabulary.definition: n. 一绺头发, 头发, 发辫
vocabulary.context: With the speed of a sailfish, they nimbly wove the black tresses into a web.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她们以旗鱼般的速度，灵活地将黑发编织成网

vocabulary.definition: adv. 超自然, 非凡, 不可思议, 令人惊叹, 象奇迹一样, 奇迹般, 能创造奇迹
vocabulary.context: For generations since, the native people have pointed out the narrow coastal "waist" to their children and shared the tale of how, working together, the maidens miraculously helped to save the island of Guam.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此后的几代人中，原住民向他们的孩子指出狭窄的沿海"腰部"，并分享少女们如何共同努力，奇迹般地拯救了关岛的故事

vocabulary.definition: n. 尖端, 突出部分；v. (使)突出, 伸出
vocabulary.context: It splashed as its mighty jaws approached the jutting rock, and...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当它强大的下巴接近突出的岩石时，它溅起了水花，然后......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 迷人的, 妩媚的, 迷惑人的
vocabulary.context: The huge fish swam toward the soothing melody of the maidens' enchanting voices.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巨大的鱼儿向着少女迷人歌声的舒缓旋律游去

vocabulary.definition: n. 用力的投掷；v.t. 用力投掷, 发射, 愤慨地说出, 丢下；v.i. 猛投, 猛掷
vocabulary.context: Together, the women hurled the net over the fish and pulled.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妇女们一起把网扔到鱼身上并拉动

vocabulary.definition: n. (护)墙板
vocabulary.context: They were plastered smooth like wallboard, so he didn't know how hard they were until he banged his head by accident.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们像墙板一样光滑，所以直到他不小心撞到了头，他才知道它们有多硬

vocabulary.definition: n. 螳螂
vocabulary.context: One cousin helped Ishmael's little brother catch a huge praying mantis.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一位表弟帮助以实玛利的弟弟捕捉了一只巨大的螳螂

vocabulary.definition: n. 纪念品
vocabulary.context: Ishmael thought it was better than all the souvenirs and photographs they had brought back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 以实玛利认为这比他们带回来的所有纪念品和照片都要好

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使浓缩, 使压缩, 缩短；v.i. 浓缩, 凝结
vocabulary.context: He had even forgotten about sweetened condensed milk.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他甚至忘记了甜炼乳

vocabulary.definition: n. 一匙；[医] 一匙, 匙
vocabulary.context: He learned to trickle the sweetened condensed milk onto bread or, when no one was watching, to put whole spoonfuls in his mouth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他学会了将甜炼乳滴在面包上，或者在没有人在场的时候，将一勺炼乳放入嘴里

vocabulary.definition: adj. 思家的, 思乡病的
vocabulary.context: It was the only place Ishmael could imagine feeling homesick for.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是以实玛利唯一能想象到想家的地方

vocabulary.definition: n. 香蕉
vocabulary.context: He had forgotten about the strange and wonderful fruit - juicy mangoes with no strings to catch in his teeth; bananas that were tiny and smelled like apples; green coconuts with cool, sweet water inside; plums that were too small; papayas that were too huge; sweet oranges that always had green skins; and sour oranges with skins that turned bright orange.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他已经忘记了这种奇怪而美妙的水果--多汁的芒果，没有绳子可以用牙齿咬住；香蕉很小，闻起来像苹果；绿色的椰子，里面有清凉甜甜的水；太小的李子；木瓜太大了；总是有绿色外皮的甜橙；还有果皮变成亮橙色的酸橙

vocabulary.definition: n. 重音, 口音, 特点, 注重点；v.t. 重读, 加重音号于, 强调
vocabulary.context: They let him have the best parts, even though they giggled at his American accent.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们让他拥有最好的部分，尽管他们嘲笑他的美国口音

vocabulary.definition: adj. 联合的, 团结的, 一致的, 和睦的；[法] 联合的, 统一的, 一致的
vocabulary.context: Ishmael had been born in Trinidad, but he had moved to the United States with his mom and dad when he was very little.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 以实玛利出生在特立尼达，但他很小的时候就随父母搬到了美国

vocabulary.definition: n. 山麓小丘
vocabulary.context: In the foothills of those mountains lies a village.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在那些山的山脚下有一个村庄

vocabulary.definition: n. 归国, 省亲回家, 同学会
vocabulary.context: At the homecoming celebration, Yeshi sang:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 返校庆典上，叶氏唱道：

vocabulary.definition: n. 鬼脸, 怪相；v.i. 扮鬼脸, 作怪相
vocabulary.context: Yeshi grimaced while his father wrapped his leg in clean rags.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他的父亲用干净的破布包住他的腿时，叶氏做了个鬼脸

vocabulary.definition: n. 元, 雄鹿, 纨绔子弟, 鞍马, 培克(赌博时的庄家标志), 碱水, 自夸, 谈话；v.i. 马背突然拱起, 反对, 吹牛, 闲聊；v.t. 马背突然拱起将骑手摔下, 反对, 用碱水洗；adj. 雄的
vocabulary.context: One day as Yeshi galloped through the meadow, the new horse bucked him off and high into the air.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一天，野氏在草地上奔驰时，新马把他猛地甩到空中

vocabulary.definition: n. 傍晚, 黄昏, 日暮

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 夜幕降临，叶氏哭了

vocabulary.definition: n. 草地, 牧场
vocabulary.context: "Your horse is in the meadow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你的马在草地上

vocabulary.definition: n. 愁容, 阴沉脸色；v.i. 皱眉, 绷着脸；v.t. 怒视
vocabulary.context: Yeshi scowled. "Come on, Pa! We must find our horse."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 叶氏皱起眉头。 "快点，爸爸！我们必须找到我们的马。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在旁边, 靠拢着；prep. 在...旁边, 与...在一起
vocabulary.context: A new horse was grazing alongside Yeshi's.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一匹新马正在叶氏的马旁吃草

vocabulary.definition: n. 军官, 主管, 官员, 公务员；v.t. 指挥
vocabulary.context: Military officers are here.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 军官来了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 象棉样的, 起毛的, 柔软的；[建] 似棉的, 柔软的, 棉的
vocabulary.context: You notice that the roots are covered in fine white fuzz that stretches out into the soil, like a cottony web.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你注意到根部覆盖着细小的白色绒毛，这些绒毛延伸到土壤中，就像一张棉网

vocabulary.definition: n. 乙烯；[化] 乙烯; 1,2-亚乙基

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在非洲，当长颈鹿咀嚼金合欢树时，树叶会释放出乙烯气体

vocabulary.definition: n. 洋槐, 刺槐, 阿拉伯树胶；[化] 阿拉伯胶; 金合欢胶
vocabulary.context: In Africa, when a giraffe munches on an acacia tree, the leaves release ethylene gas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在非洲，当长颈鹿咀嚼金合欢树时，树叶会释放出乙烯气体

vocabulary.definition: n. 长颈鹿, 鹿豹座

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 长颈鹿从他们身边走过，在更远的树上吃零食

vocabulary.definition: n. 真菌, 真菌类植物；[医] 真菌, 霉菌, , 蕈, 海绵肿

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些细细的真菌丝可以连接许多树木，在地下延伸数英里

vocabulary.definition: n. 少量食物, 细咬, 轻咬, 啃；v. 一点一点地咬, 细咬, 吹毛求疵；[计] 半字节

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果一棵树被虫子啃食，它就会驱虫

vocabulary.definition: n. 碳, 副本, 复写纸；[化] 碳

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学家在研究碳如何穿过树木时发现了这一点

vocabulary.definition: n. 信号, 暗号, 近因, 导火线；v.t. 向...作信号, 标志, 用信号通知；v.i. 发信号；adj. 作为信号的, 显著的；[计] 信号

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 古老的银杏树上，树叶因喧闹而嘎嘎作响，就像手鼓上的叮当声

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一切都很安静，只有一只蟋蟀的晚间小夜曲

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个夏日的傍晚，敏贝女王蹑手蹑脚地沿着花园小路走，逃避女王的职责

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她独自一人，但对她的皇家保镖春素来说，她是一个无声的影子

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无忧无虑的, 不负责的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 壁虎看到月光下的树枝上无忧无虑的蟋蟀唱歌，高兴地抱住了自己

vocabulary.definition: n. 欢喜, 嬉戏
vocabulary.context: "All this merriment has chased my headache away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "所有这些欢乐都驱散了我的头痛

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 大声说出或宣告（trumpet的现在分词形式）

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 想象一下试图检查一头蠕动、发出喇叭声的大象！

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了每个人的安全，训练员需要教动物在检查期间如何表现

vocabulary.definition: n. 玩伴, 游伴

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯文·拉米雷斯 (Kevin Ramirez) 说，驯兽师是动物的"父母、医生、玩伴和最好的朋友"。动物可能不会说我们的语言，但它们有很多东西可以告诉我们

vocabulary.definition: n. 狒狒；[医] 狒狒

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 曾经希望你能和麻雀说话，和猎豹聊天，或者和狒狒说话吗？

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 牙牙学语, 喋喋不休；v.t. 唠叨, 吐露；n. 儿语, 胡言乱语, 嘈杂声；[计] 串音

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 折叠纸盒盛放草药和其他家庭用品

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1773 年 12 月的一个漆黑夜晚，一群看上去很奇怪的人聚集在波士顿码头

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 殖民者与母国之间的紧张关系加剧

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此后，国王和其他统治者在他们的土地上拥有所有权力

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1775年发动美国革命的殖民者感到愤怒，因为他们必须向英国纳税，而没有在议会（英国立法机构）投票

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我可以听奶奶讲故事

vocabulary.definition: n. (尖利的)突出物, (衣服等的)戳破处, 断牙, 意外障碍；v.t. 造成阻碍, 抓住机会, 抢到, 清除障碍物
vocabulary.context: I snagged my fabric on a branch while climbing up a tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我爬树时把布料挂在树枝上

vocabulary.definition: adv. 恶劣地, 非常地, 极端地
vocabulary.context: And yet, I must admit, it's awfully fun to dig for treasure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，我必须承认，挖掘宝藏非常有趣

vocabulary.definition: n. 抽屉, 开票人；[计] 抽屉
vocabulary.context: I'm used to being in my drawer, all neatly tucked away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我习惯了把所有东西都整齐地放在抽屉里

vocabulary.definition: n. 织物, 布, 结构, 构造, 建筑物；[经] 组织, 建筑物, 工厂
vocabulary.context: I snagged my fabric on a branch while climbing up a tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我爬树时把布料挂在树枝上

vocabulary.definition: n. 微风, 煤屑, 轻而易举的事；v.i. 吹微风, 逃走
vocabulary.context: Today I felt a lovely breeze while playing in the leaves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天，我在树叶里玩耍时感到一阵微风徐徐

vocabulary.definition: n. 缝褶, 活力, 鼓声, 船尾突出部, 食品；v.t. 打褶, 卷起, 挤进, 塞, 收藏；v.i. 缝褶裥, 缩拢
vocabulary.context: I'm used to being in my drawer, all neatly tucked away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我习惯了把所有东西都整齐地放在抽屉里

vocabulary.definition: n. 宝物, 财富；v.t. 珍爱, 重视, 秘藏
vocabulary.context: And yet, I must admit, it's awfully fun to dig for treasure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，我必须承认，挖掘宝藏非常有趣

vocabulary.definition: adj. 肮脏的, 卑鄙的；v.t. 弄脏；v.i. 变脏
vocabulary.context: I got a little dirty, though, especially my sleeves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不过，我有点脏了，尤其是我的袖子

vocabulary.definition: n. 快乐, 愉快, 令人高兴的事, 娱乐, 希望；v. (使)高兴
vocabulary.context: My pockets got filled up with rocks, which surely was no pleasure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的口袋里装满了石头，这肯定不是一件快乐的事

vocabulary.definition: adj. 容积大的, 广阔的, 宽敞的
vocabulary.context: The Crocodile noticed the accident, so down he dived, and brought it up in his capacious mouth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鳄鱼注意到了这起事故，于是他潜入水中，用他那张大嘴把它带上来

vocabulary.definition: n. 惨败, 倾斜, 挫折, 举步蹒跚, 徘徊；v.i. 惨败, 倾斜, 徘徊；v.t. 击败
vocabulary.context: The Elephant, anxious to keep up with the Crocodile in the water, forgot that he was carrying the helmet on his back, and a sudden lurch caused the prize to slip off and sink to the bottom.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大象急于追上水中的鳄鱼，忘记了自己背着头盔，突然的一个倾斜导致战利品滑落并沉入水底

vocabulary.definition: adj. 分别的, 各自的
vocabulary.context: You are both wise and clever in your respective ways.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你们在各自的方面都很聪明

vocabulary.definition: adj. 那边的；adv. 在那边；pron. 那边
vocabulary.context: "Do you see that soldier's steel helmet on yonder wall?" pointing at the same time across the river.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你看到那边墙上那个士兵的钢盔了吗？"同时指着河对岸

vocabulary.definition: n. 钢盔, 盔, 防护帽；v.t. 给...戴头盔
vocabulary.context: "Do you see that soldier's steel helmet on yonder wall?" pointing at the same time across the river.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你看到那边墙上那个士兵的钢盔了吗？"同时指着河对岸

vocabulary.definition: n. 最高权威, 威严, 王权, 雄伟, 庄严
vocabulary.context: "Heyday, sirs!" said His Majesty, going up to them, "let me know the cause of your quarrel."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "全盛时期，先生们！"国王陛下走到他们面前说道："让我知道你们争吵的原因。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 取得, 拿, 诡计, 魂；v.t. 接来, 取来, 售得, 带来, 推出, 引出, 杀死, 吸引, 到达；v.i. 取物, 前进；[计] 取
vocabulary.context: "Well, then," continued the Lion, "go and fetch it, and bring it to me, and I shall be able then to decide between you."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "好吧，那么，"狮子继续说道，"去把它拿来，交给我，然后我就可以在你们之间做出决定了。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 畜生, 动物, 野兽, 兽性
vocabulary.context: "Yes!" replied the beasts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "是的！"野兽们回答道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 后者的, 较后的, 近来的
vocabulary.context: The latter, seeing at a glance how matters stood, extended his long trunk, and reached the helmet quite easily.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 后者一看事情的进展，伸出长长的鼻子，轻而易举地就够到了头盔

vocabulary.definition: n. 蓝色；adj. 蓝色的, 下流的, 忧郁的；v.t. 染成蓝色；v.i. 变蓝
vocabulary.context: the blues or the way
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 布鲁斯或方式

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不必要的
vocabulary.context: hate and unnecessary
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 仇恨与不必要

vocabulary.definition: n. 诗, 韵文, 诗歌艺术
vocabulary.context: Poetry means the world to me
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诗歌对我来说意味着世界

vocabulary.definition: adj. 波兰的；n. 波兰人, 上光剂, 光泽, 优雅；v.t. 擦亮, 擦去, 使完美；v.i. 擦亮, 变得光亮
vocabulary.context: and polished
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 并抛光

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 以雕像装饰；n. 雕像
vocabulary.context: like a statue
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 像一座雕像

vocabulary.definition: n. 语言, 文字, 措辞；[计] 语言
vocabulary.context: the language
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 语言

vocabulary.definition: n. 打架, 争吵, 斗志；v. 对抗, 打架
vocabulary.context: Words to fight against
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 反对的话

vocabulary.definition: adj. 低劣的, 卑贱的, 简陋的, 吝啬的, 惭愧的, 平均的, 中间的, 普通的；v.t. 意谓, 想要, 意欲, 预定；v.i. 用意, 有意义；n. 平均数, 中间, 中庸
vocabulary.context: Poetry means the world to me
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诗歌对我来说意味着世界

vocabulary.definition: n. 测径规, 卡钳；v.t. 用测径规测量
vocabulary.context: Karina, her identical twin, measures an oyster using a caliper, which is like a ruler with straight fingers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡琳娜，她的同卵双胞胎，用卡尺测量牡蛎，卡尺就像一把直指的尺子

vocabulary.definition: n. 拱顶石, 楔石, 重点
vocabulary.context: Because so many animals depend on them, oysters are called a keystone species.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于许多动物依赖它们，牡蛎被称为关键物种

vocabulary.definition: n. 沉淀物, 沉积；[化] 沉降物; 沉积物
vocabulary.context: Too much sediment (bits of sand, clay, and other things) can block sunlight and stop helpful plants from growing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 过多的沉积物（沙子、粘土和其他东西）会阻挡阳光并阻止有用的植物生长

vocabulary.definition: n. 污染物质；[法] 污染物
vocabulary.context: The students' job is to measure how much the oysters have grown and test the river water for pollutants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 学生们的工作是测量牡蛎的生长情况并测试河水中的污染物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 泥的, 泥泞的, 粘糊糊的, 讨厌的
vocabulary.context: Rodman, pulls a long, slimy rope out of the river.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗德曼从河里拉出一条又长又粘的绳子

vocabulary.definition: n. 螃蟹, 偏航, 脾气乖戾的人, 沙果；v.i. 捕蟹, 偏航, 发牢骚；v.t. 使偏航, 抱怨, 破坏
vocabulary.context: They are food for crabs and other animals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们是螃蟹和其他动物的食物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有毒的, 中毒的；[医] 中毒的, 毒物的
vocabulary.context: Since the 1970s, new laws have helped reduce toxic waste.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自 20 世纪 70 年代以来，新法律帮助减少了有毒废物

vocabulary.definition: n. 发现, 发现物, 决定, 裁决；[法] 调查结果, 对事实的认定, 判定的要素
vocabulary.context: The students will report their findings to researchers at the Billion Oyster Project (BOP).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 学生们将向十亿牡蛎项目（BOP）的研究人员报告他们的发现

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 看见, 查看, 参观, 游览, 理解, 知道, 同意；v.i. 看, 观看, 注意, 知道, 考虑；n. 主教的职位
vocabulary.context: Kelly likes seeing how much the oysters have grown, but she's also disappointed: "I thought they'd be bigger."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯利喜欢看到牡蛎长大了多少，但她也很失望："我以为它们会更大。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 半人半马的怪物, 半人马座
vocabulary.context: Chiron was a centaur, half man and half horse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯龙星是半人半马的半人马

vocabulary.definition: n. 星光
vocabulary.context: Then each ring would block the starlight both before and after the asteroid's passage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，每个环都会在小行星经过之前和之后阻挡星光

vocabulary.definition: n. 天文学家
vocabulary.context: In 1977, astronomers found an asteroid far beyond the asteroid belt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1977年，天文学家在小行星带之外发现了一颗小行星

vocabulary.definition: n. 宇宙飞船
vocabulary.context: If you flew past the asteroid in a spaceship, Braga-Ribas says, you would be able to see the rings out your window.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 布拉加-里巴斯说，如果你乘坐宇宙飞船飞过小行星，你将能够看到窗外的光环

vocabulary.definition: n. 神话
vocabulary.context: Astronomers named the asteroid Chiron (KY-ron), because in mythology, Chiron was the son of Saturn and the grandson of Uranus.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 天文学家将小行星命名为凯龙星（KY-ron），因为在神话中，凯龙星是土星的儿子、天王星的孙子

vocabulary.definition: n. 望远镜；v.i. 叠缩, 嵌进, 缩短；v.t. 使叠缩, 使缩短
vocabulary.context: Observers at different telescopes watched this event.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不同望远镜的观察者观看了这一事件

vocabulary.definition: n. 孙子, 外孙
vocabulary.context: Astronomers named the asteroid Chiron (KY-ron), because in mythology, Chiron was the son of Saturn and the grandson of Uranus.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 天文学家将小行星命名为凯龙星（KY-ron），因为在神话中，凯龙星是土星的儿子、天王星的孙子

vocabulary.definition: n. 观察者, 遵守者, 观察员；[法] 观察者, 观察员, 监场员
vocabulary.context: Observers could see that Chariklo was larger than Chiron.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 观察者可以看到卡里克洛比凯龙星更大

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不像的, 不同的；prep. 不像, 和...不同
vocabulary.context: But unlike Saturn's rings, Chariklo's rings are narrow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但与土星环不同，查里克洛环很窄

vocabulary.definition: n. 曾孙，曾孙女( great-grandchild的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: The grandchildren and great-grandchildren of First Man and First Woman had no fur to keep them warm and no wings to fly south.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第一个男人和第一个女人的孙子和曾孙没有毛皮来保暖，也没有翅膀可以向南飞翔

vocabulary.definition: n. 粗锉刀, 刺耳声；v.t. 用粗锉刀锉, 粗声粗气地说；v.i. 粗锉, 锉磨, 发刺耳声
vocabulary.context: He opened his beak to reassure them with a song, but all that came out was a rasping sound like a rusty door hinge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他张开嘴，用歌声安抚他们，但发出的只是一种刺耳的声音，就像生锈的门铰链一样

vocabulary.definition: adj. 古怪的, 暴躁的, 脾气坏的
vocabulary.context: The bears, unskilled at hibernation, were waking up at all hours of the month, and boredom was making them cranky.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些熊不擅长冬眠，每个月的任何时候都会醒来，无聊让它们变得暴躁

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不可能地, 难以置信地
vocabulary.context: Everyone knew that the house of North Wind was impossibly far away, and the trip would be terribly dangerous.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有人都知道，北风家的距离实在是太远了，而且这一路是非常危险的

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使忧愁, 使悲哀；v.i. 忧愁, 悲哀
vocabulary.context: Rainbow Bird saw how shocked and saddened everyone was.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 彩虹鸟看到大家的震惊和悲伤

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无(特殊)技能的, 不熟练的, 拙劣的
vocabulary.context: The bears, unskilled at hibernation, were waking up at all hours of the month, and boredom was making them cranky.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些熊不擅长冬眠，每个月的任何时候都会醒来，无聊让它们变得暴躁

vocabulary.definition: n. 厌烦, 厌倦, 令人厌烦的事物
vocabulary.context: The bears, unskilled at hibernation, were waking up at all hours of the month, and boredom was making them cranky.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些熊不擅长冬眠，每个月的任何时候都会醒来，无聊让它们变得暴躁

vocabulary.definition: n. 疲乏, 疲劳；v.t. 使疲劳, 使心智衰弱；v.i. 疲劳；adj. 疲劳的
vocabulary.context: So, in spite of his fatigue, Rainbow Bird flew off once again, this time toward the house of the Supreme Being.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 于是，彩虹鸟不顾疲惫再次飞向至尊之家

vocabulary.definition: adv. 狡诈地；巧妙地
vocabulary.context: "It's perfect!" said Mary, admiring the cakes, artfully decorated by the very talented rat-chefs, picturing Miss Muffet, Little Bo-Peep, Wee Willie Winkie, and more.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "太完美了！"玛丽一边说，一边欣赏着那些由非常有才华的老鼠厨师精心装饰的蛋糕，上面画着玛菲特小姐、小波比、威利·温基等等

vocabulary.definition: adj. 古怪的, 奇怪的；n. 古怪的人
vocabulary.context: "His latest theory is that the castle's fanciful architecture makes it a magnet for oddball magic," said the queen, leading the way into her dining hall.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他的最新理论是，这座城堡奇特的建筑使它成为了奇怪魔法的磁石，"女王一边说，一边领着她走进餐厅

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不押韵的,无韵的
vocabulary.context: The fairy brightened a little, faithfully unrhymed everyone, and - further encouraged by the queen's forgiving smile - joined the line at the refreshment table.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 仙女精神焕发了一点，忠实地给每个人打了不押韵，并且--在女王宽容的微笑的进一步鼓励下--加入了茶点桌旁的队伍

vocabulary.definition: n. 树神
vocabulary.context: But just as Mary congratulated the contest's winner - a beaming dryad wearing her glossiest spring leaves - in stomped an orange-winged fairy clutching a letter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但正当玛丽祝贺比赛的获胜者--一位穿着最光滑的春天树叶的喜气洋洋的树妖--却踩到了一位抓着一封信的橙翼仙女

vocabulary.definition: adj. 第一流的, 最上等的, 非常好的；adv. 非常好地, 一流地
vocabulary.context: "The honored poem was judged first-rate; this fairy's poem is not that great." Ursula sighed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "贵诗被评为一流，这位仙人的诗不太好。"乌苏拉叹了口气

vocabulary.definition: v. 咆哮, 痛骂；n. 咆哮, 大话
vocabulary.context: Mary and Ursula exchanged unhappy looks as a blacksmith moaned, "Our raving and ranting won't bring disenchanting!"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 玛丽和乌苏拉交换着不高兴的眼神，铁匠呻吟道："我们的胡言乱语不会带来失望！"

vocabulary.definition: n. 顶点, 绝顶, 头等；adj. 最高的, 极好的；adv. 在顶点, 非常好地
vocabulary.context: She called her herald and instructed him to rush an urgent note to the fairy: "Pond Scum" ranks tiptop after all; flit straight back to my banquet hall!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她打电话给她的使者，指示他向仙女赶去一份紧急照会："池塘浮渣"毕竟排名第一；直接飞回我的宴会厅！

vocabulary.definition: v. 拙劣地工作, 粗制滥造, 把...搞糟；n. 粗劣, 失误, 笨拙
vocabulary.context: If a frost fairy's too-strong charm covered a throne room's floor with ice; if a magical prankster filled a moat with butterscotch pudding; if a sorceress's bungled self-improvement spell gave a castle's rats gourmet cooking skills, it happened at Spellzany.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果霜仙子的魅力太强，王座房间的地板上都结满了冰；如果一个神奇的恶作剧者用奶油糖果布丁填满了护城河；如果说女术士拙劣的自我提升咒语给城堡里的老鼠带来了美食烹饪技巧，那么这件事就发生在斯佩尔扎尼

vocabulary.definition: n. 溜冰
vocabulary.context: When the two weren't advertising free ice-skating or pudding or writing rat-sized recipes, they were calling in the realm's head wizard to break especially troublesome enchantments.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当两人没有宣传免费滑冰或布丁或写老鼠大小的食谱时，他们就在召唤王国的首席巫师来打破特别麻烦的结界

vocabulary.definition: n. 魔法, 妖术, 魅力
vocabulary.context: When the two weren't advertising free ice-skating or pudding or writing rat-sized recipes, they were calling in the realm's head wizard to break especially troublesome enchantments.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当两人没有宣传免费滑冰或布丁或写老鼠大小的食谱时，他们就在召唤王国的首席巫师来打破特别麻烦的结界

vocabulary.definition: n. (商船附载的)大艇
vocabulary.context: "You'd fall over in the longboat," Ulf pointed out patiently.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你会在长艇上摔倒，"乌尔夫耐心地指出

vocabulary.definition: n. 峡湾
vocabulary.context: "Today we will walk down by the fjord," Bjorn commanded.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "今天我们将沿着峡湾步行，"比约恩命令道

vocabulary.definition: n. 欧洲蕨
vocabulary.context: Tripping over the stony ground, I felt each jolt through my body like a bolt of lightning as I raced - faster and faster- over the boulders and bracken.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我在巨石和蕨丛上跑得越来越快时，我被石头地面绊倒，感觉每次震动都像一道闪电一样穿过我的身体

vocabulary.definition: n. 乌鸦的叫声；v.i. 发出鸦叫声；[计] 通道地址字
vocabulary.context: And then I could hear crowing and cawing in the distance: the sound of hawks and vultures eating the remains of our chickens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我可以听到远处的啼叫声：鹰和秃鹰吃我们鸡的残骸的声音

vocabulary.definition: adj. 燃烧的, 炽烈的；adv. 燃烧着
vocabulary.context: We knew our world, our village, had been set afire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们知道我们的世界、我们的村庄已经被点燃

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有勇气的, 有胆量的, 大胆的
vocabulary.context: "You're plucky," Ulf said, "but you'd hold us back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你很勇敢，"乌尔夫说，"但你会阻碍我们

In 1790, the first U.S. Census counted more than 750,000 African Americans. Only about 60,000 were free. Whether slave or free, adults taught children their African heritage - history, customs, songs, and skills. It didn't matter...

vocabulary.definition: n. 捕捉, 陷阱, 捕捉之物, 抓, 拉手；v.t. 捕捉, 赶上, 感染, 听清楚；v.i. 抓住, 燃着

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了抓住它，

vocabulary.definition: n. 茅膏菜；[医] 茅膏菜[属植物]

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 茅膏菜将其粘性陷阱固定在从叶子边缘生长的茎上

vocabulary.definition: n. 捕蝇器, 捕蝇草
vocabulary.context: The Venus flytrap releases a sap that turns the fly into a liquid so the plant can suck up its nutrients.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 捕蝇草释放出一种汁液，将苍蝇变成液体，以便植物可以吸收其营养

vocabulary.definition: adj. 食肉的；[医] 食肉的
vocabulary.context: Meat-eating plants are called carnivorous plants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 食肉植物称为肉食植物

vocabulary.definition: n. 食肉动物；[医] 食肉动物, 食虫植物
vocabulary.context: A carnivore (say KAAR-nuh-vor) is something that eats meat to live.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 肉食动物（如 KAAR-nuh-vor）是指靠吃肉来生存的动物

vocabulary.definition: n. 烂泥, 粘液；v.t. 涂上泥；v.i. 变粘滑

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毛发会产生闪亮、粘稠的粘液

vocabulary.definition: adj. 含糖的, 糖一般的, 甜的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 叶子产生花蜜（一种含糖液体）来吸引猎物

vocabulary.definition: n. 沼泽, 湿地；adj. 沼泽的
vocabulary.context: Carnivorous plants grow in swamps, marshes, and bogs where the soil doesn't have enough nutrients.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 食肉植物生长在土壤没有足够养分的沼泽、沼泽和沼泽中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 好奇的, 求知的, 古怪的
vocabulary.context: When a curious bug drops in to see if the shiny stuff might be water or nectar, it sticks tight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当一只好奇的虫子掉下来看看这些闪亮的东西是水还是花蜜时，它会粘得很紧

vocabulary.definition: n. 区域, 面积, 范围, 空地；[计] 区域
vocabulary.context: This plant grows in wet forest areas from Georgia to Louisiana.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种植物生长在从乔治亚州到路易斯安那州的潮湿森林地区

vocabulary.definition: adj. 风刮的, 被风吹扫的, 暴露在风中的
vocabulary.context: Horses tough enough to survive the scorching heat, abundant insects, stormy weather and poor quality food found on this windswept barrier island have formed a unique wild horse society.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这个狂风肆虐的障壁岛上，马匹能够忍受酷暑、丰富的昆虫、暴风雨的天气和劣质的食物，形成了独特的野马社会

vocabulary.definition: adj. 免税的, 无税的；[经] 免税的, 无税的, 上过税的
vocabulary.context: It is likely that modern Assateague horses are descendants of those hardy animals turned loose on the island to graze tax-free.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现代阿萨蒂格马很可能是那些在岛上免税放牧的耐寒动物的后代

vocabulary.definition: n. 驹；v. 生仔
vocabulary.context: Foals are usually born in late spring and live with their mothers in a family group called a "band." Each band is usually made up of 2-10 mares, their offspring, and a stallion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 马驹通常在春末出生，与母亲一起生活在一个称为"乐队"的家庭群体中。每个群体通常由 2-10 匹母马、它们的后代和一匹种马组成

vocabulary.definition: n. 谚语, 格言, 箴言；v.t. 使众所周知, 用谚语表达
vocabulary.context: -They gleam in the sun and neigh in the night." -Bedouin proverb.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: - 它们在阳光下闪闪发光，在夜间嘶鸣。" - 贝都因谚语

vocabulary.definition: adj. 喜欢家庭生活的; （指动物）被驯养了的；v. 驯化( domesticate的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: The wild horses of Assateague Island are descendants of domesticated animals brought to the island over 300 years ago.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿萨蒂格岛的野马是 300 多年前被带到岛上的家养动物的后代

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使膨胀, 腌制, 使自大；v.i. 膨胀, 肿起；n. 肿胀病人
vocabulary.context: All that drinking combined with a high salt diet contributes to their bloated appearance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有饮酒加上高盐饮食都会导致他们外表浮肿

vocabulary.definition: n. 身材, 身高, 高度；[医] 身材, 身高
vocabulary.context: The horses' short stature is a result of hundreds of years of adaptation to this low quality diet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 马的身材矮小是数百年来适应这种低质量饮食的结果

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使适应, 改编；v.i. 适应
vocabulary.context: Assateague's horses are uniquely adapted to survive on a barrier island.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿萨蒂格的马匹非常适合在障壁岛上生存

vocabulary.definition: adj. 面无表情的
vocabulary.context: He marched in, stone-faced, ordered her into the meeting room - and locked the door.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他面无表情地走进来，命令她进入会议室，然后锁上了门

vocabulary.definition: adj. 绝密的
vocabulary.context: He ordered her to prepare the large room for a top-secret meeting that evening and demanded that everyone be in bed before the meeting started.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他命令她为当晚的绝密会议准备好大房间，并要求每个人在会议开始前都上床睡觉

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 无意中听到, 偷听

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有时莉迪亚会无意中听到英国士兵讨论即将到来的货物或部队调动

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 解码, 译解；[计] 译码

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 查尔斯会剪掉按钮，解码消息，并将信息传递给美国总部

vocabulary.definition: adv. 诚实地；深信不疑地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莉迪亚如实回答，他们都在床上睡觉了

vocabulary.definition: n. 装船, 出货；[经] 运送, 运送(寄出)货物, 装载

vocabulary.definition: n. 包裹, 部分, 片；v.t. 分配, 打包；adj. 部分的；adv. 局部地
vocabulary.context: Rising from his chair so forcefully that it toppled over, he boomed, "One thing is certain; the enemy had notice of our coming, were prepared for us, and we marched back like a parcel of fools."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他用力从椅子上站起来，以至于椅子翻倒了，他大声说道："有一件事是肯定的；敌人已经注意到我们的到来，并为我们做好了准备，我们就像一群傻瓜一样向后退去。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 激烈地；强有力地；有说服力地
vocabulary.context: Rising from his chair so forcefully that it toppled over, he boomed, "One thing is certain; the enemy had notice of our coming, were prepared for us, and we marched back like a parcel of fools."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他用力从椅子上站起来，以至于椅子翻倒了，他大声说道："有一件事是肯定的；敌人已经注意到我们的到来，并为我们做好了准备，我们就像一群傻瓜一样向后退去。"

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一只长着刺的紫色豪猪？

vocabulary.contextTranslation: Reyna 正在教他们的大女儿 Michelle（11 岁）和 Fatima（14 岁）绘制精美的最终设计

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他用自己的经验和想象力来看看树林里会出现什么样的人物

vocabulary.definition: n. 花招, 欺骗, 廉价冰淇淋

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 哦，多么少啊！"许多讲英语的人认为这听起来像"hokey-pokey"，这就是他们所说的冰淇淋

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伯特把他的送货卡车漆成了白色，并在上面挂上了雪橇铃，这样顾客就能听到他来了

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卖家随后擦拭了玻璃并为下一位顾客重新使用

vocabulary.definition: n. 深坑, 矿井, 果核, 地窖, 深渊, 绝境, 陷阱；v.t. 窖藏, 使凹下, 使有麻点, 去...之核, 使留疤痕, 使相斗, 使竞争；v.i. 起凹点, 凹陷

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 厨师的帮手正在给樱桃去核

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 而且它的食用方式可能会传播细菌

vocabulary.definition: n. 寒冷, 寒意, 失意；adj. 寒冷的, 冷漠的；v.t. 使寒心, 冷冻；v.i. 变冷

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后将其放在一桶咸冰中冷却

vocabulary.context: Burt painted his delivery truck white and hung bobsled bells on it so that customers would hear him coming. He wrapped each ice cream bar in paper to keep them clean. He loaded up his truck. Business boomed. Soon he had to buy more trucks and hire more drivers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伯特把他的送货卡车漆成了白色，并在上面挂上了雪橇铃，这样顾客就能听到他来了。他用纸包裹每个冰淇淋棒以保持清洁。他把卡车装满了。生意兴隆。很快他就不得不购买更多卡车并雇用更多司机

vocabulary.context: "They are rusted so badly that I cannot move them at all; if I am well oiled I shall soon be all right again.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "它们生锈得很严重，我根本无法移动它们；如果我涂得很好，我很快就会恢复正常

vocabulary.definition: n. 稻草人, 衣衫褴褛的人

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 稻草人，仍然耐心地站在他的角落里，等待着她

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不便的, 有困难的
vocabulary.context: "It must be inconvenient to be made of flesh," said the Scarecrow thoughtfully, "for you must sleep, and eat and drink.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "身为肉身一定很不方便，"稻草人若有所思地说，"因为你必须睡觉、吃饭和喝水

vocabulary.definition: adv. 胆小地, 羞怯地
vocabulary.context: "What was that?" she asked timidly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "那是什么？"她胆怯地问道

vocabulary.definition: n. 惊愕, 惊异
vocabulary.context: Dorothy looked at him in amazement, and so did the Scarecrow, while Toto barked sharply and made a snap at the tin legs, which hurt his teeth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 多萝西惊讶地看着他，稻草人也惊讶地看着他，而托托则大声吠叫，猛地咬住锡腿，弄痛了他的牙齿

vocabulary.definition: n. 松鼠, 松鼠毛皮；v.t. 贮藏
vocabulary.context: When Dorothy awoke the sun was shining through the trees and Toto had long been out chasing birds around him and squirrels.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当多萝西醒来时，阳光透过树林照耀，托托早已出去追逐周围的鸟儿和松鼠

vocabulary.definition: adv. 忧虑地, 不安地
vocabulary.context: Dorothy at once ran back to the cottage and found the oil-can, and then she returned and asked anxiously, "Where are your joints?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 多萝西立刻跑回小屋，找到了油罐，然后她回来焦急地问道："你的关节呢？"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 沉思地；体贴地, 亲切地
vocabulary.context: "It must be inconvenient to be made of flesh," said the Scarecrow thoughtfully, "for you must sleep, and eat and drink.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "身为肉身一定很不方便，"稻草人若有所思地说，"因为你必须睡觉、吃饭和喝水

vocabulary.definition: adv. 完全地, 无瑕疵地, 完整地

vocabulary.definition: adj. 春天的, 和煦的, 青春的
vocabulary.context: This is a vernal pool, a woodland pond that fills with water in the spring, but dries out in summer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一个春池，一个林地池塘，春天充满水，夏天干涸

vocabulary.definition: n. 小龙虾
vocabulary.context: Tiny eggs that spent the winter in the muddy muck begin to hatch, and soon the pond wriggles with mosquito larvae, beetles, and crayfish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在泥泞的淤泥中过冬的小卵开始孵化，很快池塘里就挤满了蚊子幼虫、甲虫和小龙虾

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无叶的
vocabulary.context: Under the snow in a Massachusetts forest, a small flat patch lies in a clearing under the leafless trees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在马萨诸塞州森林的积雪下，光秃秃的树木下有一小块平坦的空地

vocabulary.definition: n. 火蜥蜴, 火怪, 耐火的人；[医] 蝾螈
vocabulary.context: Marbled salamander nymphs poke through the leaves, eating water bugs that brave the winter cold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大理石蝾螈若虫在树叶中探出头来，吃着抵御冬季严寒的水虫

vocabulary.definition: adj. 湿软的, 粘糊糊的
vocabulary.context: By the end of the summer, the vernal pool is just a squishy patch of mud.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到了夏末，春天的池子就只剩下一块湿软的泥巴了

vocabulary.definition: n. 蝌蚪
vocabulary.context: As the eggs begin to hatch, the small pool fills up with insect larvae, salamander nymphs, and wriggling black tadpoles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着卵开始孵化，小水池里充满了昆虫幼虫、蝾螈若虫和蠕动的黑色蝌蚪

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未被看见的, 看不见的
vocabulary.context: Unseen, in a puddle of cold water under the ice, beetles crawl between thick layers of leaves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 看不见的，在冰下的一滩冷水中，甲虫在厚厚的树叶之间爬行

vocabulary.definition: adv. 重新, 最近
vocabulary.context: The eggs of caddisflies and fairy shrimp, laid in the mud months ago, also hatch in the newly filled pool.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 几个月前在泥里产下的石蚕和神仙虾的卵也在新填满的水池中孵化

vocabulary.definition: n. 动物园管理者
vocabulary.context: Today, as a zookeeper, Amy cares for many of the same animals - "a wonderful herd of giraffes." Amy's herd consists of four males and five females, all born in captivity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，作为一名动物园管理员，艾米照顾着许多同样的动物--"一群美妙的长颈鹿"。艾米的牛群由四只雄性和五只雌性组成，全部是圈养的

vocabulary.definition: n. 饲养者, 供给者, 奶瓶；[化] 给料器
vocabulary.context: So for the zoo's giraffes, Amy hides treats in "puzzle feeders" that have holes cut out of the sides.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，对于动物园的长颈鹿，艾米将食物藏在"拼图喂食器"中，这些喂食器的侧面有孔

vocabulary.definition: n. 满房间, 满场的人
vocabulary.context: But I see them every day, so they're as different to me as a roomful of humans," she says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但我每天都会看到他们，所以他们对我来说就像一屋子的人一样不同，"她说

vocabulary.definition: v. 浏览, 吃草；n. 浏览, 吃草；[计] 浏览
vocabulary.context: In the wild, they get their nutrients from tree branches and leaves, called browse .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在野外，它们从树枝和树叶中获取营养，称为浏览

vocabulary.definition: n. 耙子, 钱耙, 斜度, 浪子；v. 搜索, 掠过, (用耙子)耙, (使)倾斜
vocabulary.context: Then she rakes up their poop, leftover food, and dirty straw, which she hauls away for recycling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后她把他们的粪便、剩下的食物和脏稻草收集起来，并将其拖走进行回收

vocabulary.definition: adj. 兽医的；n. 兽医

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 艾米利用她接受的基本兽医技能培训，进行注射、抽血和冰敷肿胀的肌肉

vocabulary.definition: n. 整齐, 情形, 修剪；adj. 整齐的；v.t. 使整齐, 整理, 修剪；v.i. 调整, 见风使舵；[计] 库存管理检查规则程序
vocabulary.context: When she's not feeding the animals, she might be trimming their hooves or caring for their minor medical needs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她不喂动物时，她可能会修剪它们的蹄子或照顾它们的轻微医疗需求

vocabulary.definition: adj. 聪明的, 智能的, 了解的

vocabulary.definition: n. 事件, 结果, 事情的进程, 竞赛项目；[计] 事件
vocabulary.context: At the Oakland Zoo, she raises money with events such as Jeans for Giraffes, a recycled-jeans donation project held on World Giraffe Day.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在奥克兰动物园，她通过"长颈鹿牛仔裤"等活动筹集资金，这是一个在世界长颈鹿日举办的回收牛仔裤捐赠项目

vocabulary.definition: adj. 半职业性的；n. 半职业性运动员
vocabulary.context: One summer day in 1904, Amanda and her mother traveled to Hawarden, Iowa, to watch Hank pitch in the championship semiprofessional game.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1904 年的一个夏日，阿曼达和她的母亲前往爱荷华州哈沃登，观看汉克在半职业锦标赛中的投球

vocabulary.definition: n. 半职业性选手或运动员
vocabulary.context: Two local teams were scheduled to play a game before the semipro teams.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 两支当地球队原定在半职业球队之前进行一场比赛

vocabulary.definition: adj. 仁慈的, 宽厚的, 温和的
vocabulary.context: Twelve-year-old Amanda Clement raced to the ballpark across the street from her house in Hudson, South Dakota.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 十二岁的阿曼达·克莱门特 (Amanda Clement) 跑到她位于南达科他州哈德逊的家对面的棒球场

vocabulary.definition: n. 局, 回合, 盘, 一局, 当权期间
vocabulary.context: She took special pride in umpiring a game that lasted 17 innings on a day when the heat reached 100 degrees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她为在气温达到 100 度的一天担任裁判而感到特别自豪，这场比赛持续了 17 局

vocabulary.definition: n. 持有人, 所有人；[法] 拥有的, 所有者, 持有人
vocabulary.context: Newspaper reporters said that she "knows her baseball book," is "the possessor of an eagle eye," and "is absolutely fair." Managers began to ask for her first when they needed an umpire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 报纸记者说她"了解她的棒球书"，"拥有鹰眼"，并且"绝对公平"。当经理们需要裁判时，他们开始首先要求她帮忙

vocabulary.definition: n. 防空壕, 独木舟
vocabulary.context: She couldn't take a break and go to the dugout as the players did.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她无法像球员们那样休息一下并前往休息室

vocabulary.definition: n. 领带
vocabulary.context: She made "an inspiring sight on the baseball diamond." Her uniform was a white blouse, blue ankle-length skirt, cap, and black necktie.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她"在棒球场上留下了鼓舞人心的景象"。她的制服是白色衬衫、蓝色及踝裙子、帽子和黑色领带

vocabulary.definition: n. 海报, 招贴, 驿马
vocabulary.context: Posters that said "The Only Lady Umpire in the World" drew large crowds to games.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 写着"世界上唯一的女裁判"的海报吸引了大量观众观看比赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 教育, 训练, 教育学；[医] 教育, 训练
vocabulary.context: With her earnings, Amanda paid for college, where she studied physical education.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿曼达用她的收入支付了大学费用，她在那里学习体育

vocabulary.definition: n. 节日；斋日；宗教节日
vocabulary.context: around another feast-day table of faith, food, friends, and family.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 围绕另一场信仰、食物、朋友和家人的节日餐桌

vocabulary.definition: n. 随身小折刀
vocabulary.context: He carves animals from wood with his pocketknife.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他用小刀用木头雕刻动物

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 再讲, 重复, 重说
vocabulary.context: Here come more stories, ones I'll retell someday
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这里有更多故事，有一天我会重述这些故事

vocabulary.definition: n. 寄宿学校
vocabulary.context: I hear tell of a Muscogee great-granddad, boarding-school captive,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我听说一位马斯科吉的曾祖父是寄宿学校的俘虏，

vocabulary.definition: n. 曾祖父
vocabulary.context: I hear tell of a Blackfoot great-grandfather, son of a minister.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我听说有一位黑脚人的曾祖父，一位牧师的儿子

vocabulary.definition: n. 俘虏, 迷恋者；adj. 被俘的, 被迷住的
vocabulary.context: I hear tell of a Muscogee great-granddad, boarding-school captive,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我听说一位马斯科吉的曾祖父是寄宿学校的俘虏，

vocabulary.definition: n. 本国, 故国
vocabulary.context: how he flew over the Pacific to defend our homeland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他如何飞越太平洋保卫我们的祖国

vocabulary.definition: adj. 每天的, 日常的, 平常的
vocabulary.context: I hear tell of everyday heroes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我听说过日常英雄

vocabulary.definition: n. 部长, 牧师, 公使；v.i. 服侍, 救助, 主持宗教仪式
vocabulary.context: I hear tell of a Blackfoot great-grandfather, son of a minister.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我听说有一位黑脚人的曾祖父，一位牧师的儿子

vocabulary.definition: n. 感谢
vocabulary.context: Thanksgiving is more
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 感恩节更多

vocabulary.definition: n. 沼泽, 进退两难的困境；v.t. 淹没, 击溃, 清除, 使陷于沼泽；v.i. 陷于沼泽, 淹没
vocabulary.context: of Chief Jake Swamp
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 杰克·沼泽酋长

vocabulary.definition: n. 年长者, 老人, 前辈；adj. 年长的, 资深的
vocabulary.context: so a Mohawk elder
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所以莫霍克长老

vocabulary.definition: n. 宴会, 酒席, 享受, 节日；v.t. 款待, 享乐, 请客；v.i. 参加宴会, 尽情地吃, 享受
vocabulary.context: this time with feasting
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这次有盛宴

vocabulary.definition: n. 记忆, 记忆力, 回忆, 纪念, 存储；n. 内存；[计] 存储器, 内存, 查看内存实用程序
vocabulary.context: In memory
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 记忆中

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 拉, 拖, 拔剑；v.t. 拖拉, 挨近, 领取, 打成平局, 引导, 抽签决定, 画, 描写, 制订, 草拟, 吸引；n. 拉, 拖, 拔出, 抽签, 平局；[计] 翻牌, 绘图
vocabulary.context: for each breath drawn.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每次呼吸

vocabulary.definition: n. 话, 消息, 词, 诺言, 命令；v.t. 用言辞表达；[计] 字
vocabulary.context: we speak our words
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们说我们的话

vocabulary.definition: n. 毛鼻袋熊
vocabulary.context: Then I saw the wombat waddle in the straw;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我看到袋熊在稻草里摇摇晃晃；

vocabulary.definition: adv. 令人不愉快地, 不讨人喜欢地
vocabulary.context: Then I saw the monkeys - mercy, how unpleasantly they smelt!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我看到了猴子--天啊，它们的气味多么难闻啊！

vocabulary.definition: n. 羊肉
vocabulary.context: Then I saw the grey wolf, with mutton in his maw;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我看到灰太狼，嘴里叼着羊肉；

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 摇摇摆摆地走, 蹒跚而行；n. 蹒跚
vocabulary.context: Then I saw the wombat waddle in the straw;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我看到袋熊在稻草里摇摇晃晃；

vocabulary.definition: n. 骆驼, 打捞浮筒
vocabulary.context: Then I saw the camel with a hump upon his back;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我看到骆驼背上有一个驼峰；

vocabulary.definition: n. 象
vocabulary.context: Then I saw the elephant a-waving of his trunk;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我看到大象挥舞着他的鼻子；

vocabulary.definition: n. 仁慈, 宽恕, 慈悲, 怜悯, 幸运；[法] 权宜处置权, 决定权, 宽恕
vocabulary.context: Then I saw the monkeys - mercy, how unpleasantly they smelt!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我看到了猴子--天啊，它们的气味多么难闻啊！

vocabulary.definition: n. 稻草, 麦管, 吸管, 一文不值的东西, 草帽；adj. 稻草的, 稻草色的, 琐碎的, 无价值的
vocabulary.context: Then I saw the wombat waddle in the straw;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我看到袋熊在稻草里摇摇晃晃；

vocabulary.definition: n. 显影液槽, 浸礼会教友, 浸染工, 北斗七星；[机] 杓
vocabulary.context: It was dark night, and there was no one near to ask for water, so the little girl took her tin dipper and started out alone to the spring to bring her mother a drink.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 天黑了，附近也没有人要水喝，小女孩拿着锡制的勺子，独自一人去泉水边给妈妈送水喝

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使清新, 使恢复, 使生气蓬勃；v.i. 提起精神, 恢复精神, 吃点心, 喝饮料；v.t. 刷新, 重新整理；v.i. 刷新, 重新整理；[计] 刷新, 重新整理
vocabulary.context: He seemed as refreshed as if he had been to the river to drink.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他看上去神清气爽，就像刚刚到河边喝过水一样

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不自私的, 无我的, 不谋私利的
vocabulary.context: There it shines every night to tell all little children how, once, a child was brave and unselfish and kind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那里每晚都闪耀着光芒，告诉所有的小孩子，曾经，一个孩子是如何勇敢、无私和善良的

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 催促, 加紧；v.i. 赶快, 急忙
vocabulary.context: So she never took a drink herself, but hastened home and carried it to the dear mother.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所以她自己没有喝一口水，而是赶紧回家，把它带给亲爱的母亲

vocabulary.definition: n. 钻石, 菱形；[计] 菱形
vocabulary.context: As soon as the dear mother drank she became quite well and strong once more; and the gold dipper, as it touched her lips, was changed to a diamond dipper-all shining and blazing with glittering gems!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亲爱的母亲一喝下去，她就又恢复了健康和强壮。金色的勺子一碰到她的嘴唇，就变成了钻石勺子，闪闪发光，闪闪发光！

vocabulary.definition: n. 衣服, 衣装, 外表
vocabulary.context: He was tall, and wore shining garments,and his eyes looked down with a wonderful smile into the little girl's face.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他身材高大，穿着闪亮的衣服，他的眼睛带着美妙的微笑低头看着小女孩的脸

vocabulary.definition: n. 火焰, 烈火, 光辉；v.i. 燃烧, 发光；v.t. 使燃烧, 宣布, 在树皮上刻痕
vocabulary.context: As soon as the dear mother drank she became quite well and strong once more; and the gold dipper, as it touched her lips, was changed to a diamond dipper-all shining and blazing with glittering gems!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亲爱的母亲一喝下去，她就又恢复了健康和强壮。金色的勺子一碰到她的嘴唇，就变成了钻石勺子，闪闪发光，闪闪发光！

vocabulary.definition: n. 绊倒, 蹒跚而行, 失足；v.t. 使绊倒, 使困惑；v.i. 绊倒, 失足, 失策, 犯错, 蹒跚, 踌躇
vocabulary.context: Sometimes the water spilled, because it was not easy to carry, and sometimes the little girl stumbled over the stones in the dark road.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有时水会溅出来，因为不好搬，有时小女孩会被黑暗路上的石头绊倒

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 遭受, 经历, 忍受；v.i. 受痛苦, 受损害
vocabulary.context: "I must have a drink of clear, cold water," she cried, as she lay in bed, so weak and suffering from thirst.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我必须喝一杯清凉的水，"她躺在床上喊道，她非常虚弱，而且口渴

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未来派的
vocabulary.context: A Futuristic Vision
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 未来的愿景

vocabulary.definition: n. 编辑者；[计] 编译程序
vocabulary.context: In 1952 she developed a "compiler," which allowed a computer to write a program in five minutes that formerly would have taken a month.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1952年，她开发了一种"编译器"，使计算机能够在五分钟内编写出一个程序，而以前需要一个月的时间

vocabulary.definition: n. 详细目录, 存货清单；v.t. 列入详细目录, 清点存货；[计] 存货清单
vocabulary.context: She set to work anyway and developed a computer language, Flow-matic, which recognized twenty common business terms, such as inventory and price .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她无论如何都开始工作并开发了一种计算机语言 Flow-matic，它可以识别 20 个常见的商业术语，例如库存和价格

vocabulary.definition: n. 跳跃的东西, 单足跳者, 跳虫；[化] 漏斗; 贮斗; 料斗; 集尘箱; 集尘斗
vocabulary.context: In 1930, she married Vincent Hopper.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1930年，她与文森特·霍珀结婚

vocabulary.definition: n. 程序员；[计] 程序设计员; 程序员
vocabulary.context: Then anyone would be able to use computers, not only programmers and mathematicians.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那么任何人都可以使用计算机，而不仅仅是程序员和数学家

vocabulary.definition: n. 小配件, 小玩意, 诡计
vocabulary.context: "That's the prettiest, fanciest gadget I ever saw," she thought.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这是我见过的最漂亮、最奇特的小玩意，"她想

vocabulary.definition: n. 嘲笑, 愚弄, 笑柄, 食品；v. 嘲笑, 嘲弄, 贪吃, 狼吞虎咽地吃
vocabulary.context: But her colleagues scoffed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但她的同事们对此嗤之以鼻

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 限制, 限定, 约束；[医] 限制
vocabulary.context: She merely restricted her curious daughter to one clock.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她只是将好奇的女儿限制在一个时钟范围内

vocabulary.definition: n. 标准, 规格, 旗, 军旗, 本位；adj. 标准的, 合规格的；[计] 标准
vocabulary.context: It performed only three additions per second - extremely slow by today's standards.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它每秒只执行 3 次加法--以今天的标准来看非常慢

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自给自足的, 极为自负的
vocabulary.context: Carver thought that if farmers started making things out of peanuts, they'd have to buy fewer things and would be more self-sufficient.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡弗认为，如果农民开始用花生制造东西，他们购买的东西就会减少，并且会更加自给自足

vocabulary.definition: adj. 大量生产的
vocabulary.context: Although not many of Carver's peanut products were ever mass-produced, he did help spread the word about peanuts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然卡弗的花生产品没有多少被大规模生产，但他确实帮助传播了有关花生的信息

vocabulary.definition: n. 雕刻匠, 雕工, 切肉刀；[医] 雕刻器
vocabulary.context: George Washington Carver was always interested in plants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 乔治华盛顿卡佛一直对植物感兴趣

vocabulary.definition: adj. 辐状的；v.t. 使旋转, 使转动, 使轮流；v.i. 旋转, 循环；[计] 旋转
vocabulary.context: Carver told farmers to rotate their crops: plant cotton one year, then the next year plant peanuts and other soil-restoring plants, like peas and sweet potatoes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡弗告诉农民轮作作物：一年种植棉花，然后第二年种植花生和其他恢复土壤的植物，如豌豆和红薯

vocabulary.definition: n. 滋养品, 养料, 营养；[医] 营养, 营养品
vocabulary.context: (Nutrients provide nourishment to plants.) So the soil becomes "worn out" after a few years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （养分为植物提供营养。）因此几年后土壤就会"磨损"

vocabulary.definition: n. 蛋白质；adj. 蛋白质的
vocabulary.context: Peanuts are also a source of protein.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 花生也是蛋白质的来源

vocabulary.definition: adj. 营养的, 滋养的；n. 营养物, 滋养物
vocabulary.context: Cotton plants use most of the nutrients in the soil.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 棉花植株利用土壤中的大部分养分

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 信赖, 依赖, 信任
vocabulary.context: This was especially bad for poor African American farmers, who relied on selling cotton to support themselves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这对于贫穷的非裔美国农民来说尤其糟糕，他们依靠出售棉花来养活自己

vocabulary.definition: n. 协会；[计] 关联
vocabulary.context: By 1920 there were enough peanut farmers to form the United Peanut Association of America (UPAA).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到 1920 年，已有足够多的花生种植者成立了美国联合花生协会 (UPAA)

vocabulary.definition: n. 拉紧；紧固度
vocabulary.context: But a moment later she lifted her head, and he could see from the light in her eyes and the tautness of her face that she was suppressing a smile.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但过了一会儿，她抬起了头，从她眼中的光芒和她紧绷的脸上可以看出她在强忍着微笑

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使神秘化, 使难解, 迷惑；[计] 变幻线
vocabulary.context: Didn't they understand that the world of sounds was mystifying to him?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 难道他们不明白声音的世界对他来说很神秘吗？

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 打嗝, 喷吐；v.t. 打嗝, 吼叫着发出(命令), 喷吐；n. 打嗝, 喷吐
vocabulary.context: No longer able to hold back the burp, he covered his mouth in case there was a sound and let the belch go.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他再也忍不住打嗝了，捂住嘴以防发出声音，才打嗝

vocabulary.definition: adj. 脾气好的, 和蔼的, 温厚的
vocabulary.context: Brian's lips said, "That was funny," and Jeremy reached out and gave Alex a good-natured punch in the arm.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 布莱恩的嘴唇说："这很有趣，"杰里米伸出手，善意地在亚历克斯的手臂上打了一拳

vocabulary.definition: n. 直译程序, 解释者, 口译者, 注释器；[计] 注释器
vocabulary.context: Being the only deaf boy in the class meant Alex always had to sit in the front row directly in front of his sign language interpreter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为班上唯一的聋哑男孩，亚历克斯总是必须坐在前排，正对着他的手语翻译

vocabulary.definition: n. 喷嚏；v.i. 打喷嚏
vocabulary.context: Passing gas, he had learned once to his embarrassment in a grocery store, made people snicker; but when he sneezed, people merely glanced at him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一次，他在一家杂货店里学会了放屁，这让他很尴尬，让人窃笑；但当他打喷嚏时，人们只是看了他一眼

vocabulary.definition: n. 激动, 焦虑, 煽动, 搅动, 摇动；[化] 搅拌; 搅拌作用
vocabulary.context: Alex looked down at his paper, aware that the room was still filled with agitation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亚历克斯低头看着他的论文，意识到房间里仍然充满了不安

vocabulary.definition: n. 困难, 阻碍, 困窘；[医] 窘迫
vocabulary.context: Passing gas, he had learned once to his embarrassment in a grocery store, made people snicker; but when he sneezed, people merely glanced at him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一次，他在一家杂货店里学会了放屁，这让他很尴尬，让人窃笑；但当他打喷嚏时，人们只是看了他一眼

vocabulary.definition: n. 金属镜, 反射镜, 扩张器；[医] 窥器, 张开器; 透明隔; 翼斑, 翼镜(鸟)
vocabulary.context: Then we melted speculum metal (copper and tin) in a furnace and poured it into the mold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我们在熔炉中熔化窥器金属（铜和锡）并将其倒入模具中

vocabulary.definition: n. 筛子, 滤网；v.t. 筛, 滤
vocabulary.context: One of my jobs was to turn the poop into powder by pounding it in a mortar then sifting it through a sieve.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的工作之一是将粪便放入研钵中捣碎，然后通过筛子过筛，将其变成粉末

vocabulary.definition: adj. 模糊的, 不清楚的, 污脏的
vocabulary.context: No, it was too blurry to be a star.

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 放大, 扩大, 赞美, 夸大；v.i. 有放大能力

vocabulary.definition: n. 课程, 路线, 过程, 一道菜, 道路；v. 追, (使)跑

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "只要确保我的小羊安全地活下来就可以了，"她的母亲慈爱地抚弄着纳斯巴的头发说道

vocabulary.definition: n. 羊的叫声；v.i. 咩咩叫；v.t. 以颤抖的声音说

vocabulary.context: It was hard to keep track of the squirming, shaggy bodies, but Nasbah counted the lambs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很难追踪那些蠕动的、毛茸茸的尸体，但纳斯巴数了数羔羊的数量

vocabulary.definition: adj. 低的, 下级的, 下层的；v.i. 降低, 跌落, 减弱；v.t. 放下, 降下, 减弱, 贬低

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 无论如何，正如我所说，当我飞过你们的星球时，我注意到我的燃料不足，所以我决定在这里停下来加油

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这幅画描绘了一位极度悲伤、美丽得令人难以忘怀的公主，王子低声自言自语："就是她！"然后他迅速转身去告诉父亲他选择了哪位新娘

vocabulary.definition: adv. 极其；痛惜地；非常痛地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这幅画描绘了一位极度悲伤、美丽得令人难以忘怀的公主，王子低声自言自语："就是她！"然后他迅速转身去告诉父亲他选择了哪位新娘

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 沿着墙壁，许多骑士和王子像雕像一样站着，他们被巫师变成了石头--一些人正在拔出剑，另一些人则保持着恐惧的态度，还有一个人举起了一大杯麦芽酒

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为盲人提供字母表极大地丰富了他们的生活，因为这使他们有机会阅读从餐馆菜单到银行财务报表或需要签署的合同等任何内容

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 引入了一些小的修改，但只是以缩写的形式

vocabulary.definition: adj. 战术的, 用兵上的, 策略的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一个基于战术触觉的读写系统

vocabulary.definition: n. 理解, 包含
vocabulary.context: What he did was make the dots more compact so that now a fingertip could feel the whole unit which allowed for faster comprehension and quicker reading.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他所做的就是使点更加紧凑，这样现在指尖就可以感觉到整个单元，从而可以更快地理解和阅读

vocabulary.context: Providing an alphabet for the blind has enriched their lives immensely because it has allowed them the opportunity to read anything from restaurant menus to financial statements from their bank, or contracts that need to be signed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为盲人提供字母表极大地丰富了他们的生活，因为这使他们有机会阅读从餐馆菜单到银行财务报表或需要签署的合同等任何内容

vocabulary.context: Napoleon's army was engaged in battle (as it usually was) and messages needed to be dispersed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 拿破仑的军队正在进行战斗（通常如此），需要传播消息

vocabulary.definition: n. 光辉, 出色
vocabulary.context: In front of them, and at the end of the road of yellow brick, was a big gate, all studded with emeralds that glittered so in the sun that even the painted eyes of the Scarecrow were dazzled by their brilliancy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他们面前，黄砖路的尽头，有一座大门，大门上镶满了翡翠，在阳光下闪闪发光，就连稻草人的画眼也被它们的光彩晃得眼花缭乱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 呈绿色的
vocabulary.context: He was clothed all in green, from his head to his feet, and even his skin was of a greenish tint.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他从头到脚都穿着绿色的衣服，甚至连皮肤都是绿色的

vocabulary.definition: n. 叮当声；v.t. 使发丁当的声, 叮当地发出；v.i. 叮当作响
vocabulary.context: There was a bell beside the gate, and Dorothy pushed the button and heard a silvery tinkle sound within.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 门边有一个铃，多萝西按下按钮，听到里面发出银铃般的声音

vocabulary.definition: n. 困惑, 混乱状态, 使人困惑的事物
vocabulary.context: "It has been many years since anyone asked me to see Oz," he said, shaking his head in perplexity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "已经很多年没有人约我见奥兹了，"他困惑地摇着头说道

vocabulary.definition: n. 装饰钮扣, 大头钉, 领扣, 种马；v.t. 镶嵌, 点缀, 散布
vocabulary.context: In front of them, and at the end of the road of yellow brick, was a big gate, all studded with emeralds that glittered so in the sun that even the painted eyes of the Scarecrow were dazzled by their brilliancy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他们面前，黄砖路的尽头，有一座大门，大门上镶满了翡翠，在阳光下闪闪发光，就连稻草人的画眼也被它们的光彩晃得眼花缭乱

vocabulary.definition: n. 翡翠, 绿宝石, 翠绿色；adj. 翡翠的, 翠绿色的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "那一定是翡翠城，"多萝西说

vocabulary.definition: n. 看守者, 监护人, 保护人；adj. 保护的
vocabulary.context: I am the Guardian of the Gates, and since you demand to see the Great Oz, I must take you to his Palace.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我是大门守护者，既然你要求见伟大的奥兹国，我就必须带你去他的宫殿

vocabulary.definition: n. 引人羡慕的东西, 景象, 眼镜, 场面, 公开展示
vocabulary.context: But first you must put on the spectacles."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但首先你必须戴上眼镜。"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 破坏, 毁坏, 消灭
vocabulary.context: "He is powerful and terrible, and if you come on an idle or foolish errand to bother the wise reflections of the Great Wizard, he might be angry and destroy you all in an instant."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他强大而可怕，如果你是为了闲事或愚蠢的差事来打扰大巫师的明智倒影，他可能会生气并立即消灭你们所有人。"

vocabulary.definition: n. [天]原行星

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 附近是另一颗原行星忒伊亚（THEE-ah）

vocabulary.definition: n. 岩浆, 糊剂, 乳浆剂；[化] 晶浆
vocabulary.context: It was so hot that most of Earth's surface was liquid rock, called magma.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 天气非常热，地球表面的大部分都是液态岩石，称为岩浆

vocabulary.definition: n. 新月, 新月形(物)；adj. 新月形的, 逐渐增加的
vocabulary.context: It might be a full moon, a crescent, or entirely dark.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它可能是满月、新月或完全黑暗

vocabulary.definition: n. 小行星, 海盘车；adj. 星状的
