vocabulary.definition: n. 音乐家, 乐师, 作曲家
vocabulary.context: If she continues to work hard and grow as a musician, she could become a professional.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果她继续努力工作并成长为一名音乐家，她可以成为一名专业人士

vocabulary.definition: n. 领导者, 社论, 指挥, 领袖, 领唱者, 前导字符；[计] 前导字符
vocabulary.context: Her little sister - leader of the whole orchestra?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的妹妹 - 整个乐团的领导者？

vocabulary.definition: n. 翼手龙
vocabulary.context: Quetzalcoatlus - or, to be exact, Quetzalcoatlus northropi (ket-zel-KWAT-a-lus NORTH-rup-eye) - was a giant pterosaur (TER-uh-sawr), a flying reptile that lived during the era of dinosaurs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 风神翼龙 - 或者准确地说，风神翼龙 (ket-zel-KWAT-a-lus NORTH-rup-eye) - 是一种巨型翼龙 (TER-uh-sawr)，是一种生活在恐龙时代的飞行爬行动物

vocabulary.definition: adv. 可怕地；荒唐地；强烈地
vocabulary.context: Some were as small as a sparrow, but Quetzalcoatlus was so monstrously large that scientists wondered how it could fly at all.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些像麻雀一样小，但风神翼龙却大得惊人，科学家们想知道它是如何飞起来的

vocabulary.definition: n. 胸骨( breastbone的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: Its skeleton showed that the flying reptile not only had really big wings, but it also had huge breastbones - the attachment points for large flight muscles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它的骨骼表明，这种飞行爬行动物不仅拥有非常大的翅膀，而且还拥有巨大的胸骨--大型飞行肌肉的附着点

vocabulary.definition: adv. 煞费苦心地；费力地
vocabulary.context: In addition, unearthing the fragile fossil bones is a painstakingly slow process.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，挖掘脆弱的骨骼化石是一个极其缓慢的过程

vocabulary.definition: n. 吸血鬼；[医] 吸血蝙蝠
vocabulary.context: Maybe it pushed off its wingtips like a vampire bat?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许它会像吸血蝙蝠一样推出翼尖？

vocabulary.definition: n. 髓, 骨髓, 精华, 活力, 配偶；[医] 髓(尤指骨髓)
vocabulary.context: Like modern birds, the pterosaur's eggshell-thin bones were hollow and filled with air (instead of the semi-solid marrow found in mammal bones).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与现代鸟类一样，翼龙的蛋壳般薄的骨头是中空的，充满空气（而不是哺乳动物骨头中的半固态骨髓）

vocabulary.definition: n. 连接, 附属物, 连接物, 爱慕；[计] 附加, 附件
vocabulary.context: Its skeleton showed that the flying reptile not only had really big wings, but it also had huge breastbones - the attachment points for large flight muscles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它的骨骼表明，这种飞行爬行动物不仅拥有非常大的翅膀，而且还拥有巨大的胸骨--大型飞行肌肉的附着点

vocabulary.definition: adv. 显著地, 引人注目地, 非常地
vocabulary.context: Once it was flying, Quetzalcoatlus was remarkably well built for the task.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一旦飞行，风神翼龙就非常适合这项任务

vocabulary.definition: n. 节目, 节目单, 程序, 纲要, 大纲, 计划；v.t. 规划, 拟...计划；v.i. 安排节目, 编程序；[计] 程序
vocabulary.context: In an interview with the public radio program Science Friday , he explained that Quetzalcoatlus is really difficult to describe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在接受公共广播节目《科学星期五》的采访时，他解释说风神翼龙确实很难描述

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 弹回, 返回, 产生事与愿违的结果；v.t. 使弹回, 使返回；n. 反弹, 返回, 篮板球, 振作；rebind的过去式和过去分词
vocabulary.context: "Championships, MVPs, I mean points, rebounds and assists, that stuff is whatever.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "总冠军、MVP，我的意思是得分、篮板和助攻，这些都是什么

vocabulary.definition: n. 曾祖母
vocabulary.context: When he was born in December, 1984, he lived with his mom, his grandmother, and his great-grandmother.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他1984年12月出生时，他和他的妈妈、祖母和曾祖母住在一起

vocabulary.definition: n. 新手
vocabulary.context: At the end of his first season with the Cleveland Cavaliers, he won the NBA Rookie of the Year award.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在克利夫兰骑士队的第一个赛季结束时，他获得了NBA年度最佳新秀奖

vocabulary.definition: n. 徒步者, 轻便鞋；[法] 山林巡视官
vocabulary.context: Soon after LeBron won the race in the parking lot, he began living with one of his coaches, Frank Walker.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 勒布朗在停车场赢得比赛后不久，他开始与他的教练之一弗兰克·沃克住在一起

vocabulary.definition: n. 出席, 出席的人数, 照料；[法] 管理, 照料, 资助
vocabulary.context: She would help the players get water and take attendance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她会帮助球员们取水并点名

vocabulary.definition: n. 故乡, 家乡
vocabulary.context: One of the ways LeBron helps is by founding the I Promise school in his hometown of Akron, Ohio.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 勒布朗提供帮助的方式之一是在他的家乡俄亥俄州阿克伦市建立了"我承诺"学校

vocabulary.definition: n. 青铜, 铜像；adj. 青铜色的
vocabulary.context: Since then, he's won many awards and honors including four NBA Championships, four NBA Most Valuable Player awards, 19 selections as an NBA All-Star, 2 Olympic gold medals, and 1 Olympic bronze medal.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此后，他赢得了许多奖项和荣誉，包括四次NBA总冠军、四次NBA最有价值球员奖、19次入选NBA全明星、2枚奥运会金牌和1枚奥运会铜牌

vocabulary.definition: adj. 内部的, 内心的；n. 内部
vocabulary.context: But for me to be able to open up a school and give back to my inner city, so many kids that I know because I was those kids," said LeBron.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但对我来说，能够开设一所学校并回馈我的内城，我认识这么多孩子，因为我就是那些孩子，"勒布朗说

vocabulary.definition: n. 祖先传下来之物, 遗赠物；[经] 遗产, 遗赠物
vocabulary.context: LeBron James is a star athlete, but his legacy is much more than just sports.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 勒布朗·詹姆斯是一位明星运动员，但他的遗产不仅仅是体育

vocabulary.definition: n. 考古学家
vocabulary.context: Archeologists are scientists who use what people left behind to learn who they were and how they lived.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 考古学家是科学家，他们利用人们留下的东西来了解他们是谁以及他们如何生活

vocabulary.definition: n. 保护, 保管；[经] 安全保管
vocabulary.context: Or the shop owner could have put it there for safekeeping when the volcano erupted, planning to come back for it later.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者，店主可以在火山爆发时把它放在那里妥善保管，并计划稍后再回来取

vocabulary.definition: adj. 活跃的; 忙碌的
vocabulary.context: While they didn't have drive-throughs, Romans on-the-go could grab a quick bite from a thermopolium, a sort of snack bar or lunch counter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然没有免下车服务，但忙碌的罗马人可以从 Thermopolium（一种小吃店或午餐柜台）快速吃点东西

vocabulary.definition: n. 兵豆
vocabulary.context: Meats, cheeses, lentils, olives, vegetables, and eggs were all on the menu.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 菜单上有肉类、奶酪、扁豆、橄榄、蔬菜和鸡蛋

vocabulary.definition: n. 胶囊, 蒴果, 瓶帽, 航天舱；[化] 胶囊剂
vocabulary.context: The layers buried Pompeii and everything in it, locking the city away like a time capsule.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些层层掩埋了庞贝古城和其中的一切，将这座城市像时间胶囊一样锁在了外面

vocabulary.definition: n. 蜗牛, 行动迟缓的人, 脑筋迟钝的人, 蜗形凸轮；v.t. (蜗牛般)缓慢地打发(时间)；v.i. 缓慢移动
vocabulary.context: In 2020, archeologists uncovered a food counter that had bits of duck bones, fish bones, snail shells, and other animal bones left in serving jars.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2020年，考古学家发现了一个食品柜台，里面有一些鸭骨、鱼骨、蜗牛壳和其他动物骨头留在盘子里

vocabulary.definition: n. 橄榄, 橄榄树, 橄榄色, 橄榄枝；adj. 黄绿色的, 黄褐色的, 橄榄色的
vocabulary.context: Meats, cheeses, lentils, olives, vegetables, and eggs were all on the menu.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 菜单上有肉类、奶酪、扁豆、橄榄、蔬菜和鸡蛋

vocabulary.definition: n. 付款, 支付的款项(或实物), 偿还, 报应, 惩罚；[经] 支付, 缴纳, 支付款额
vocabulary.context: It might have been used as sort of a cash register for payments.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它可能被用作付款收银机

vocabulary.definition: n. 比赛, 火柴, 对手；v.t. 使相配, 使比赛, 与...竞争；v.i. 结婚, 相配；[计] 比较
vocabulary.context: The food matched some of the menu painted on the sides of the counter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 食物与柜台两侧画的一些菜单相匹配

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 塞紧, 塞得透不过气
vocabulary.context: Then wrap up your tour with a glimpse of dazzling, completed floats that will stand out in a crowd - a Mardi Gras crowd that is sure to jam-pack the streets of New Orleans!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，您将看到令人眼花缭乱的完整花车，这些花车将在人群中脱颖而出 - 狂欢节人群肯定会挤满新奥尔良的街道！

vocabulary.definition: n. 克鲁(在新奥尔良狂欢节最后一天主持庆祝活动的民间组织)
vocabulary.context: First, a theme is brainstormed by the krewe of people who pay for the float.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 首先，支付浮动费用的克鲁人集思广益地提出了一个主题

vocabulary.definition: n. 乳液, 胶乳；[化] 胶乳
vocabulary.context: The prop is then covered with papier-mâché of brown paper and primed (or painted) to seal it with white latex paint.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后用棕色纸浆覆盖道具，并涂底漆（或涂漆）以用白色乳胶漆密封

vocabulary.definition: adj. 每种只有一个的
vocabulary.context: special, one-of-a-kind 2.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 特殊的，独一无二的 2.

vocabulary.definition: adj. 引人注目的, 引人瞩目的
vocabulary.context: way to celebrate parades, which kick off two weeks before and up until Mardi Gras day, than with eye-catching floats?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 庆祝游行（游行在狂欢节前两周开始直至狂欢节）的方式，比用引人注目的花车更好吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 拖, 拖绳, 拖轮；v.t. 拖, 拉, 牵引
vocabulary.context: Light props like flowers are stapled on, and heavy props like a dragon's head are screwed onto the frame, which gets towed by a tractor through parades.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 像花朵这样的轻型道具被钉在上面，而像龙头这样的重型道具则被拧到框架上，由拖拉机拖着进行游行

vocabulary.definition: n. 主要产物, 常用品, 主要要素, 原料, 订书钉, 钩环；adj. 主要的, 重要的；v.t. 分级, 钉住
vocabulary.context: When all the props are finished, they get stapled, screwed, and wired onto the float's wooden frame.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当所有道具完成后，它们被钉住、拧紧并连接到浮标的木框架上

vocabulary.definition: n. 颧骨
vocabulary.context: The hot, electric knife is used to melt and carve a prop's features such as the ears, eye sockets, or cheekbones of a character.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 热电刀用于熔化和雕刻道具的特征，例如角色的耳朵、眼窝或颧骨

vocabulary.definition: n. 子孙, 后裔；[法] 子嗣, 后代, 后裔
vocabulary.context: After touring the prop shop, you enter the float den to be greeted by props that are stored for posterity like Dorothy from Oz.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 参观完道具店后，您进入花车巢穴，迎接您的是为后人保留的道具，例如《奥兹国》中的多萝西

vocabulary.definition: n. 衣衫褴褛的人, 寒酸样子的孩子
vocabulary.context: Mom said, "If we dress like ragamuffins, no one will listen."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈说："如果我们穿得像个破烂的人，就没人会听。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 嘟嘟声, 作乐；v.i. 吹喇叭；v.t. 吹奏出
vocabulary.context: Carter tooted his horn as they passed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他们经过时，卡特按响了喇叭

vocabulary.definition: n. 情人, 爱人, 甜食
vocabulary.context: "Oh, sweetie, they might not be moving in." Mom shook her head.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "哦，亲爱的，他们可能不会搬进去。"妈妈摇摇头

vocabulary.definition: n. 扩音器, 喇叭；[电] 扬声器
vocabulary.context: Finally, an announcement boomed through the loudspeakers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最后，扩音器里响起了公告

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 跋涉；v.t. 涉水；n. 跋涉, 浅滩
vocabulary.context: After the speech, we waded through the river of people back to our car.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 演讲结束后，我们涉过人流回到车上

vocabulary.definition: n. 溜冰, 冰鞋；v.i. 滑冰, 滑过
vocabulary.context: I saw a man on roller skates wearing a red sash across his chest that said "Freedom." He had skated all the way from Chicago!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我看到一个穿着溜冰鞋的男人，胸前系着一条红色腰带，上面写着"自由"。他从芝加哥一路滑冰过来！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 快的, 迅速的；[经] 快的, 迅速的
vocabulary.context: "Time to get up, Speedy," Daddy said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "该起床了，斯皮迪，"爸爸说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 友好的, 亲切的, 互助的；adv. 友善地, 温和地
vocabulary.context: Everyone was so friendly, like we were one big family - babies, kids, parents, and even grandparents.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个人都非常友好，就像我们是一个大家庭一样--婴儿、孩子、父母，甚至祖父母

vocabulary.definition: n. (鸡/鸭的)内脏, 杂碎
vocabulary.context: (You can see a gizzard in the bag of giblets packed inside a grocery-store turkey.)
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （你可以在杂货店火鸡内装的内脏袋中看到砂囊。）

vocabulary.definition: n. 美洲山核桃(树)
vocabulary.context: So, if a wild turkey swallows hard acorns or pecans with shells, no problem!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所以，如果野火鸡吞下坚硬的橡子或带壳的山核桃，没问题！

vocabulary.definition: n. 仙人掌；[医] 仙人掌属
vocabulary.context: They also gulp down frogs, lizards, salamanders and snakes, grapes and grass - and even crabs and cactus fruits.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们还吞下青蛙、蜥蜴、蝾螈和蛇、葡萄和草，甚至螃蟹和仙人掌果实

vocabulary.definition: n. 栖木, 休息所, 群栖的禽鸟；v.i. 栖息, 安歇；v.t. 使栖息
vocabulary.context: At night they fly up into trees and roost together.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 晚上，它们飞到树上，一起栖息

vocabulary.definition: n. (鸟的)砂囊, 胃；[医] 砂囊
vocabulary.context: The gizzard is a tough, muscular sort of stomach with hard ridges inside.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 砂囊是一种坚韧、肌肉发达的胃，内部有坚硬的脊

vocabulary.definition: n. 无酒精啤酒
vocabulary.context: They can run as fast as horses and they can fly up to fifty-five miles per hour.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们跑得像马一样快，飞行速度可达每小时五十五英里

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不幸的, 不合适的, 不吉利的
vocabulary.context: In the 1600s an Italian professor named Giovanni Borelli pushed glass balls and lead cubes down the throats of several unfortunate turkeys.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1600 年代，一位名叫乔瓦尼·博雷利 (Giovanni Borelli) 的意大利教授将玻璃球和铅块塞进几只不幸的火鸡的喉咙里

vocabulary.definition: n. 食欲, 欲望, 爱好；[医] 食欲
vocabulary.context: Wild turkeys are big birds with big appetites to match.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 野生火鸡是大鸟，胃口也很大

vocabulary.definition: n. 行动, 活动, 动作, 作用, 战斗, 行为, 诉讼；v.t. 对...起诉；[计] 方式
vocabulary.context: There are usually stones inside, too, which the birds have swallowed to improve the grinding action.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 里面通常也有石头，鸟类会吞下这些石头以改善研磨作用

vocabulary.definition: n. 突堤, 防波堤, 码头；adj. 黑玉般的, 乌黑发亮的；v.i. 伸出
vocabulary.context: Tong stood on the jetty, lowering a krathong into the water with his pole.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Tong站在码头上，用竿子将水灯放入水中

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 步履不稳地走动, 踉跄, 摇晃, 摇摆不定, 摇摇欲坠, 玩跷跷板；n. 踉跄, 摇摆, 跷跷板
vocabulary.context: Suddenly, he felt his body teetering on the edge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 突然，他感觉自己的身体在边缘摇摇欲坠

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使变硬, 使僵硬, 使顽强, 使严厉；v.i. 变粘, 变硬, 变强烈
vocabulary.context: Lek's throat stiffened, and tears flooded his eyes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莱克的喉咙发僵，泪水淹没了他的眼睛

vocabulary.definition: n. 队伍, 连续, 列队行进, 涌出
vocabulary.context: At last, he looked out at the procession of flickering lights.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最后，他看着窗外闪烁的灯光

vocabulary.definition: n. 竹子；[医] 竹类
vocabulary.context: As he wrapped the banana leaves around a bamboo base to form his boat, Lek thought about his sister, Dao.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当 Lek 将香蕉叶包裹在竹子底座上形成他的船时，Lek 想到了他的妹妹 Dao

vocabulary.definition: n. 顶, 尖端, 梢, 末端, 倾斜, 垃圾场, 小费, 轻击, 指点, 秘密消息；v.t. 装顶端, 使倾斜, 使翻倒, 泄露, 告诫, 暗示, 给...小费, 轻击；v.i. 倾斜, 翻倒, 倾覆, 踮脚走, 给小费；[计] 终端接口处理器, 提示, 技巧
vocabulary.context: It rocked on the surface for a moment before tipping on its side.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它在水面上摇晃了一会儿，然后侧翻了

vocabulary.definition: n. 运河, 水道, 管, 沟渠；v.t. 开运河
vocabulary.context: All over Thailand, people would send out lighted candles in tiny boats along rivers and canals so that the past year's problems could sail away with them and be replaced with wishes for the new year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在泰国各地，人们会乘坐小船沿着河流和运河散发点燃的蜡烛，这样过去一年的问题就会随之消失，取而代之的是对新一年的祝福

vocabulary.definition: n. 疾病, 恶意；[医] 病
vocabulary.context: Perhaps a wish on Loy Krathong would take away her illness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许向水灯节许愿就能消除她的病

vocabulary.definition: n. 波尔卡舞, 女用紧身短上衣
vocabulary.context: People wear polka dot clothing, fill their drawers with coins, and eat fruits that are round.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们穿着圆点衣服，抽屉里装满硬币，吃圆形的水果

vocabulary.definition: n. 酵素, 发酵, 动乱；v. (使)发酵, (使)动乱
vocabulary.context: Pork is served with sauerkraut (fermented cabbage) because cabbage and other greens, such as kale and spinach symbolize money.

After the medication sedated the elephants, a ground crew quickly prepared them for safe transport. They made sure the elephant's trunk stayed clear so the giants could breathe. They flipped the...

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许我应该回家，阿拉斯沮丧地想

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于带回的泥土样本，科学家们对月球的了解比以前想象的更多

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他为返回地球的飞行进行了重要的准备

vocabulary.definition: adj. 全世界的
vocabulary.context: A Moon landing sounded surreal, and people worldwide caught word and became quite excited.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 登月听起来很超现实，世界各地的人们听到这个消息并变得非常兴奋

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 闻讯后，肯尼迪总统着手打破新的太空纪录，并与美国国家航空航天局（NASA）合作实现这一目标

vocabulary.definition: n. 河床

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毅力将帮助我们研究这片古老的河床

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毅力号是美国宇航局登陆火星的第五个火星车，也是迄今为止技术含量最高的火星车

vocabulary.definition: n. 漂泊者, 流浪者, 海盗；[法] 流浪者, 海盗, 海盗船

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 感谢勇敢的太空漫游者"毅力号"，我们对它的了解比以往任何时候都多

vocabulary.definition: n. 火山口, 环行山, 弹坑；[化] 焊口; 火山石; 弧坑; 焰口

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毅力号降落在所谓的杰泽罗陨石坑

vocabulary.definition: n. 毅力, 忍耐, 锲而不舍, 不屈不挠
vocabulary.context: Thanks to a brave space rover named Perseverance, we know more about it than ever before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 感谢勇敢的太空漫游者"毅力号"，我们对它的了解比以往任何时候都多

vocabulary.definition: n. 航天飞船
vocabulary.context: Scientists will then send another spacecraft in a few years to collect all these samples and bring them back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学家们将在几年内派出另一艘航天器来收集所有这些样本并将其带回来

vocabulary.context: In addition, Perseverance is using its drill to collect dirt samples that will be brought back to Earth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，毅力号正在使用其钻头收集污垢样本，并将其带回地球

vocabulary.definition: adj. 岩石的, 多石的, 像岩石的, 无情的, 摇动的, 摇晃的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 火星与地球相似--大小只有地球的一半，多岩石，而且非常寒冷！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 令人惊异的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果另一个星球上存在生命，那不是很神奇吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 加速, 促进, 加速度；[化] 加速度

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些速度的变化称为加速度

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 磁铁产生的力是另一种可以作用于一定距离的力

vocabulary.contextTranslation: Larry Giles 是弗吉尼亚州威廉斯堡游乐园布希花园的工程副总裁

vocabulary.definition: n. 滚筒, 滚轴, 压路机；[化] 滚柱; 托辊
vocabulary.context: Most roller coasters and amusement park rides go more slowly than a car on the highway.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数过山车和游乐园的游乐设施比高速公路上的汽车行驶得慢

vocabulary.definition: n. 工程学, 工程, 操纵；[化] 机器; 机器学
vocabulary.context: Larry Giles is the Vice President for Engineering at Busch Gardens, an amusement park in Williamsburg, Virginia.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Larry Giles 是弗吉尼亚州威廉斯堡游乐园布希花园的工程副总裁

vocabulary.definition: n. 公路, 大道, 捷径；[法] 公路, 大路
vocabulary.context: Most roller coasters and amusement park rides go more slowly than a car on the highway.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数过山车和游乐园的游乐设施比高速公路上的汽车行驶得慢

vocabulary.definition: n. 伤害, 创伤, 损害；v. 伤害, (使)伤心, 危害, 刺痛
vocabulary.context: Your toe hurts because something heavy and solid made it change speed very quickly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你的脚趾受伤，因为有重而坚固的东西使它的速度变化得非常快

vocabulary.definition: adj. 容易受惊的, 胆小的, 提心吊胆的
vocabulary.context: We don't think of riding in a car as scary because we're used to the accelerations - and the forces that go along with them - caused by those motions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们并不认为乘坐汽车有什么可怕，因为我们已经习惯了由这些运动引起的加速度以及随之而来的力

vocabulary.definition: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；v.t. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制；v.i. 骑马, 乘车, 漂游
vocabulary.context: Many people think it's worth standing in long lines to feel the different ways that rides push and pull on our bodies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人认为值得排长队来感受骑行对我们身体的不同推拉方式

vocabulary.definition: n. 三个一组, 燕鸥
vocabulary.context: These tiny birds, Arctic terns, will fly across the world, all the way from the Arctic to Antarctica.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些小鸟，北极燕鸥，将飞越世界，从北极一路飞到南极洲

vocabulary.definition: n. 苔原, 冻原

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是六月的北极苔原，位于格陵兰岛海岸附近的一个岛屿上

vocabulary.definition: n. 海鸟

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 数百只白色海鸟在空中飞舞

vocabulary.definition: n. 鸥, 易受骗之人, 呆子；v.t. 欺诈, 骗

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一天，燕鸥遇到了一群海鸥

vocabulary.definition: n. 响而粗的叫声, 夜鹭；v.i. 发出响而粗的叫声, 发牢骚, 诉苦

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一只鸟发出警报，发出尖锐的叫声，听起来像"kee-kee"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有斑点的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于北极燕鸥来说，生命始于一颗有斑点的蛋，产在光秃秃的地面上的巢中

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 移动, 移往, 随季节而移居；[计] 迁移程序
vocabulary.context: Like many birds, they are migrating, moving south to escape the coming winter.

vocabulary.context: She braided her long, black hair, weaving colorful ribbons into it, and tied her dancing shoes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她把长长的黑发编成辫子，并在其中编织彩色丝带，并系上舞鞋

vocabulary.definition: adj. 困惑的, 混乱的
vocabulary.context: "The kitchen table?" Margarita said, confused.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "厨房的桌子？"玛格丽塔困惑地说

vocabulary.definition: n. 总统, 总裁, 董事长, (学院)院长, (大学)校长, 主管人, 主持人；[经] 总经理, 董事长, 总裁
vocabulary.context: The festival was always a special day, but this year it was even more so because the president of the United States, who was visiting her country, would be attending.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个节日一直都是一个特殊的日子，但今年更是如此，因为正在访问她的国家的美国总统将出席

vocabulary.definition: adj. 发出声音的, 响亮的, 夸大的, 听上去堂皇的, 夸张的；n. 测深, 水深测量, 探空, 试探, 调查, 搜集意见
vocabulary.context: Where the soundings showed a deep bottom, that was a valley or canyon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 测深显示底部很深的地方，就是山谷或峡谷

vocabulary.definition: adj. 反常的, 乖戾的, 荒谬的, 首末倒置的
vocabulary.context: This idea seemed so preposterous that not many people believed him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个想法看起来非常荒谬，以至于没有多少人相信他

vocabulary.definition: n. 声纳；[计] 声纳
vocabulary.context: Ships measure this with sonar - sending out a sound ping and timing the echo.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 船舶用声纳来测量这一点 - 发出声音脉冲并计时回声

vocabulary.definition: adj. 海面下的；adv. 在海面下
vocabulary.context: Its undersea mountains traced the edges of big, rocky plates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它的海底山脉沿着巨大的岩石板块的边缘延伸

vocabulary.definition: n. 地质学, 地质情况
vocabulary.context: Her father always told her, "When you find your life's work, make sure it is something you like to do." She took art classes in art, and music, and math, and teaching, and geology.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的父亲总是告诉她，"当你找到一生的工作时，请确保它是你喜欢做的事情。"她参加了艺术、音乐、数学、教学和地质学方面的艺术课程

vocabulary.definition: n. 时间选择, 时间测定, 定时, 调速；[计] 定时器时钟
vocabulary.context: Ships measure this with sonar - sending out a sound ping and timing the echo.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 船舶用声纳来测量这一点 - 发出声音脉冲并计时回声

vocabulary.definition: adj. 在水中的；adv. 在水下
vocabulary.context: The numbers revealed underwater mountains.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 数字揭示了水下山脉

vocabulary.definition: n. 棒球；[计] 棒球系统
vocabulary.context: It continued on across the whole globe, like the seam on a baseball.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它在全球范围内持续蔓延，就像棒球上的接缝一样

vocabulary.definition: adv. 最后, 终于
vocabulary.context: But eventually, all those thousands of depth readings fit together to make the very first map of the ocean floor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但最终，所有这些数以千计的深度读数组合在一起，形成了第一张海底地图

vocabulary.definition: n. 一种类似四对舞伴方块舞的交际舞, 一种不断更换舞伴的轻快交谊舞
vocabulary.context: Ann so loved to hear, "The Ann Lowe dresses were doing all the dancing at the cotillion last night."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 安非常喜欢听到，"昨晚舞会的舞会全都是安·洛 (Ann Lowe) 的裙子在跳舞。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 银行存折
vocabulary.context: Ann showed him her bankbook.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 安给他看了她的银行存折

vocabulary.definition: adj. 高级的, 一流的；[化] 优等的
vocabulary.context: To him, the idea of a Black girl attending a high-class fashion school was absurd.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对他来说，黑人女孩就读高级时装学校的想法是荒谬的

vocabulary.definition: n. 女傧相
vocabulary.context: Sewing night and day, fighting exhaustion, she and her seamstresses remade the wedding gown and the ten bridesmaid dresses.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她和女裁缝们夜以继日地缝制，克服疲惫，重新缝制了婚纱和十件伴娘礼服

vocabulary.definition: adj. 玫瑰色的, 乐观的
vocabulary.context: Instead, Ann watched silently as her mama cut out the pieces of rose-colored silk she would sew together.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相反，安静静地看着她的妈妈剪下她要缝在一起的玫瑰色丝绸

vocabulary.definition: n. (古代)装有74门大炮的军舰
vocabulary.context: At age seventy-four, Ann became blind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 七十四岁时，安双目失明

vocabulary.definition: n. 工作室
vocabulary.context: Ann sighed with relief as she locked her workroom door that night.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那天晚上，安锁上工作室的门，松了口气

vocabulary.definition: n. 雪纺绸, 薄绸, 女子服装装饰品；adj. 用薄绸制成的, 象薄绸般透明的, 因加入起沫蛋白而松软的
vocabulary.context: For two intense months, Ann and her seamstresses worked to transform fifty yards of French silk chiffon taffeta into a glorious wedding dress.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在紧张的两个月里，安和她的女裁缝们努力将五十码的法国丝绸雪纺塔夫绸改造成一件华丽的婚纱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 新娘的, 婚礼的
vocabulary.context: It was now 1953, and the mother of Jacqueline Bouvier asked Ann to design her daughter's bridal gown as well as the gowns of the wedding party.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在是1953年，杰奎琳·布维尔的母亲让安为女儿设计新娘礼服以及婚礼礼服

vocabulary.definition: n. 框格, 肩带, 腰带；v.t. 装以窗框, 系上腰带
vocabulary.context: At last, the bride's gown was completed, and so were the fifteen candy-pink bridesmaids' dresses with red satin sashes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 终于，新娘的礼服完成了，十五件糖果粉色的红缎带伴娘服也完成了

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 攀, 爬
vocabulary.context: A popular team sport for women and girls was shinny.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一项深受女性和女孩欢迎的团队运动是闪亮的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 乱七八糟的, 混乱的；n. 混战, 乱斗
vocabulary.context: Rough-and-tumble competition, yes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 激烈的竞争，是的

vocabulary.definition: n. 摔跤选手
vocabulary.context: Good wrestlers have to think, plan, and stay one move ahead of their opponents.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 优秀的摔跤手必须思考、计划并领先对手一步

vocabulary.definition: n. 运动员精神
vocabulary.context: Teams played to win, but fair play and sportsmanship were just as important as winning.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 球队为胜利而战，但公平竞争和体育精神与胜利同样重要

vocabulary.definition: n. 协同作业, 协力；[法] 联合工作, 联合行动, 协调工作
vocabulary.context: But teamwork and cooperation are an equally important part of the legacy of these first American games.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但团队精神和合作是这些第一届美国运动会遗产中同样重要的一部分

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 包含, 构成
vocabulary.context: Today, the Iroquois Lacrosse Association League is comprised of eight teams, all made up of Native players.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，易洛魁长曲棍球协会联盟由八支球队组成，全部由原住民球员组成

vocabulary.definition: n. 核准, 制裁, 处罚, 约束力；v.t. 制定制裁规则, 认可, 核准, 同意
vocabulary.context: The Iroquois Nationals is the only Native American team sanctioned to compete as a national team.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 易洛魁国民队是唯一一支被批准作为国家队参加比赛的美洲原住民球队

vocabulary.definition: adj. 过了中年的, 稍老的
vocabulary.context: Games and sports were for everyone: men, women, children, and the elderly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 游戏和运动适合所有人：男人、女人、儿童和老人

vocabulary.definition: n. 形状, 形体, 类型, 方式, 表格, 形式；v. 形成, 排列, (使)组成；n. 表单；[计] 表单
vocabulary.context: Various Native American nations continue to play forms of lacrosse, sometimes simply called stick ball, during their festivals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 美洲原住民各个民族在节日期间继续玩长曲棍球，有时简称为棒球

vocabulary.definition: n. 停战, 休战；v.i. 停战, 休止；v.t. 以休战结束
vocabulary.context: Under pressure, the British government offered a truce to Gandhi.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 迫于压力，英国政府向甘地提出停战协议

vocabulary.definition: n. 海水；[化] 海水
vocabulary.context: Fortunately, salt could be found easily - dried on mud flats near the ocean, in salt mines, and by boiling seawater.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 幸运的是，盐很容易找到--在靠近海洋的泥滩、盐矿和沸腾的海水中干燥

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 同情, 怜悯, 同意, 体谅
vocabulary.context: As Indian jails filled up, the world began to sympathize with India's struggles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着印度监狱人满为患，世界开始同情印度的斗争

vocabulary.definition: n. 不服从, 不孝, 违反
vocabulary.context: In a wave of civil disobedience, Indians began making their own salt and selling it to others.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在公民抗命浪潮中，印度人开始自制盐并将其出售给其他人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 平坦的, 单调的, 无力的, 浅的, 萧条的, 干脆的, 无聊的；adv. 平直地, 断然地；n. 扁平物, 平面, 平地, 平原, 平板车；v. (使)变平
vocabulary.context: Fortunately, salt could be found easily - dried on mud flats near the ocean, in salt mines, and by boiling seawater.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 幸运的是，盐很容易找到--在靠近海洋的泥滩、盐矿和沸腾的海水中干燥

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不寻常的, 非凡的, 罕有的；adv. 不平常地
vocabulary.context: In fact, he was such an uncommon person that he was often called Mahatma, meaning "Great Soul." Sixty-year-old Gandhi was fighting for the independence of his country, India, from the British Empire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 事实上，他是一个如此不寻常的人，以至于他经常被称为圣雄，意思是"伟大的灵魂"。六十岁的甘地正在为他的国家印度摆脱大英帝国的独立而奋斗

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 藐视, 挑衅, 使落空；n. 挑战
vocabulary.context: One hundred thousand people were thrown into jail for defying the salt laws.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 十万人因违反盐法而被投入监狱

vocabulary.definition: n. 从者, 属下, 追补者；[电] 随动机
vocabulary.context: With his bamboo walking stick and 78 followers, Gandhi journeyed 240 miles to break the law; his crime would be to gather salt from the sea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 甘地带着他的竹手杖和78名追随者，长途跋涉240英里去违法；他的罪行是从海里采集盐

vocabulary.definition: adj. 私人的, 涉及隐私的, 有人性的, 人称的, 亲自的, 身体的；[医] 人的; 个人的, 自身的
vocabulary.context: For women, who used salt constantly in the kitchen, this law was a personal challenge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于经常在厨房里使用盐的女性来说，这项法律是一个个人挑战

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不可再生的; 不可更新的
vocabulary.context: (These are nonrenewable.) Others will never be used up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （这些是不可再生的。）其他的永远不会用完

vocabulary.definition: n. 水力发出的电力
vocabulary.context: Many people believe hydropower is the perfect fuel for creating electricity because it is a renewable, clean source of energy that does not leave waste products behind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人认为水力发电是发电的完美燃料，因为它是一种可再生、清洁的能源，不会留下废物

vocabulary.definition: n. [物]克卡, 小卡, 千卡
vocabulary.context: The word geothermal comes from the Greek words geo, meaning "Earth," and therme , meaning "heat." Geothermal energy comes from the natural heat inside the Earth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地热一词源自希腊语 geo，意思是"地球"，以及 therme，意思是"热"。地热能来自地球内部的自然热量

vocabulary.definition: adj. 便宜的, 不贵重的
vocabulary.context: Wind is a natural, clean, and inexpensive source of energy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 风是一种天然、清洁且廉价的能源

vocabulary.definition: n. 铀；[化] 铀U
vocabulary.context: To do this, they use the atoms from a metal called uranium.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为此，他们使用了一种叫做铀的金属原子

vocabulary.definition: n. 水坝, 障碍；v. 控制, 筑坝；[计] 直接存取法
vocabulary.context: Others don't like the fact that rivers are dammed to create power plants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他人不喜欢在河流上筑坝建造发电厂的事实

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可靠的, 可信赖的；[法] 可靠的, 可信赖的, 确实的
vocabulary.context: But since sunlight isn't always available, the sun is not the most reliable source of energy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但由于阳光并不总是可用，因此太阳并不是最可靠的能源

vocabulary.definition: n. 运输, 输送, 交通车辆；[经] 运转, 运输, 运输费
vocabulary.context: That energy can be turned into electricity, heat, and transportation fuels.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种能源可以转化为电力、热能和运输燃料

vocabulary.definition: n. 次序, 规则, 命令；v.i. 命令, 定货；v.t. 整理, 命令, 定购；n. 顺序, 阶数；[计] 顺序, 阶数
vocabulary.context: In order for this source of energy to be affordable, you need a reliable, steady source of wind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了使这种能源负担得起，您需要可靠、稳定的风源

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 大声说出或宣告（trumpet的过去式与过去分词形式）
vocabulary.context: "EHEHEH-UHUHUH-EHEH!" it trumpeted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "呃呃呃呃呃呃呃！"它大肆宣扬

vocabulary.definition: adj. 缓慢的, 慢动作的, 高速度摄影的
vocabulary.context: ...and pushed forward on her belly, inching along. Ahead, the penguin wove a trail between the cracks. Elaine scraped along behind, slow-motion tobogganing. Icy shards collected along her arms and scratched her nose and cheeks. She lost track of time as she focused on following the penguin's path.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...并以腹部向前推进，缓慢前行。前方，企鹅在裂缝之间留下了一条踪迹。伊莱恩在后面缓慢地滑行。冰冷的碎片沿着她的手臂聚集，划伤了她的鼻子和脸颊。她忘记了时间，全神贯注地追随企鹅的踪迹

vocabulary.definition: adj. 颤抖的, 震动的
vocabulary.context: Standing on quivery legs, she turned to look back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她双腿颤抖地站着，转身回头看

vocabulary.definition: n. 煮器, 汽锅, 锅炉；[化] 锅炉
vocabulary.context: Her job was to look after the fire extinguishers and fire alarms in the machine shops, sheds, boiler rooms, dorms, and warehouses of this remote outpost.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的工作是照顾这个偏远前哨基地的机械车间、棚屋、锅炉房、宿舍和仓库的灭火器和火灾警报器

vocabulary.definition: n. 冻伤, 冻疮；v.t. 被霜伤害, 使冻伤
vocabulary.context: Her stinging ears were in danger of frostbite.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的耳朵刺痛，有冻伤的危险

vocabulary.definition: n. 宿舍
vocabulary.context: Her job was to look after the fire extinguishers and fire alarms in the machine shops, sheds, boiler rooms, dorms, and warehouses of this remote outpost.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的工作是照顾这个偏远前哨基地的机械车间、棚屋、锅炉房、宿舍和仓库的灭火器和火灾警报器

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有...意志的
vocabulary.context: Elaine held her breath, concentrated on the penguin waddling toward her, and willed it to keep coming.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伊莱恩屏住呼吸，专注于摇摇晃晃地向她走来的企鹅，并希望它继续过来

vocabulary.definition: n. 变形, 弯曲, 歪曲, 乖僻, 偏差, 偏见；v.t. 使变形, 弄歪, 使翘曲, 使不正常, 歪曲, 使有偏见；v.i. 变弯, 变歪
vocabulary.context: Although it looked solid, this ice sheet was in constant motion, squeezed and warped by the glacier - the vast river of ice sliding slowly down the mountains toward the ocean.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然它看起来很坚固，但这个冰盖在不断运动，被冰川挤压和扭曲--巨大的冰河慢慢地从山上滑向海洋

vocabulary.definition: adj. 虚构的, 编造的, 小说式的；[法] 拟制的, 假定的, 虚构的
vocabulary.context: In December 1955, Shirley, a fictional 9-year-old black girl in Montgomery, Alabama, might have written these letters to her cousin Elizabeth in Detroit, Michigan...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1955 年 12 月，阿拉巴马州蒙哥马利市的一个虚构的 9 岁黑人女孩雪莉可能写了这些信给她在密歇根州底特律的表弟伊丽莎白......

vocabulary.definition: n. 教士, 大人(对教士的尊称)；adj. 应受尊敬的, 教士的
vocabulary.context: The new minister in town, the Reverend Martin Luther King Jr., is the leader of the boycott.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 镇上的新牧师马丁·路德·金牧师是这次抵制活动的领导者

vocabulary.definition: n. 分；[经] 美分
vocabulary.context: Black taxi drivers are charging only a dime (the same as the bus fare) instead of 45 cents for a ride.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 黑人出租车司机只收取一角钱（与公交车费相同），而不是 45 美分

vocabulary.definition: adv. 几乎, 差不多, 事实上
vocabulary.context: The buses are practically empty!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公交车上几乎空无一人！

vocabulary.definition: n. 炸弹；v.t. 轰炸, 投弹于；v.i. 失败
vocabulary.context: A lot of white people were really angry, and Reverend King's house was bombed!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很多白人真的很愤怒，金牧师的房子被炸了！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不公平的, 不正直的, 不正当的；[法] 不正直的, 不公平的, 偏颇的
vocabulary.context: Starting today, black people won't ride the buses anymore because of the unfair way the bus company treats us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从今天开始，黑人将不再乘坐公交车，因为公交车公司对待我们的方式不公平

vocabulary.definition: n. 尊严, 高贵；[法] 尊严, 高位, 高贵
vocabulary.context: He says that if we protest peacefully with "courage and dignity," we can make great changes for black people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他说，如果我们以"勇气和尊严"和平抗议，我们就可以为黑人带来巨大的改变

vocabulary.definition: n. 轻蔑, 怠慢；adj. 轻微的, 纤细的, 脆弱的, 苗条的；v.t. 轻视, 忽略, 怠慢
vocabulary.context: They arrested black drivers for the slightest reason.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们以微不足道的理由逮捕了黑人司机

vocabulary.definition: n. 至高, 霸权；adj. 至高的, 终极的, 极端的, 最大的
vocabulary.context: The city fought the case all the way to the Supreme Court.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该市一直将此案打到最高法院

vocabulary.definition: n. 鸮鹉（新西兰的一种鹦鹉）( kakapo的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: Kakapos - green parrots from New Zealand - hold many records in the bird world.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鸮鹦鹉--来自新西兰的绿鹦鹉--在鸟类世界中保持着多项记录

vocabulary.definition: n. 可爱; 娇小可爱
vocabulary.context: And let's not even get started on the cuteness of baby pandas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们先不说小熊猫的可爱之处

vocabulary.definition: n. 日光浴
vocabulary.context: Gharials mostly live in rivers and only leave the water to sunbathe and lay eggs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 恒河鳄大多生活在河流中，只离开水来晒日光浴和产卵

vocabulary.definition: n. [动]大鳄鱼(指印度鳄或马来鳄)
vocabulary.context: Since the 1940s, the gharial population has decreased by 98%, according to National Geographic .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据《国家地理》报道，自 20 世纪 40 年代以来，恒河鳄的数量减少了 98%

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可爱的, 适于搂抱的, 喜欢拥抱的, 可拥抱的
vocabulary.context: Save the Panda" and "Giant panda looks cuddly and cute; protect them without any dispute." And the panda campaign worked!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 拯救熊猫"和"大熊猫看起来很可爱；毫无争议地保护它们。"熊猫活动成功了！

vocabulary.definition: n. 一种鹦鹉
vocabulary.context: This led to a steady decline in Kakapo populations over hundreds of years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这导致鸮鹦鹉数量在数百年来持续下降

vocabulary.definition: adj. 夜的, 夜曲的；[医] 夜间的
vocabulary.context: And kakapos are nocturnal.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鸮鹦鹉是夜间活动的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 始终存在的
vocabulary.context: Large, dark circles surround their eyes, and small dark patches outline their lips, making the vaquita look like it wears an ever-present smile.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大而黑的眼圈围绕着它们的眼睛，小黑斑勾勒着它们的嘴唇，使小头鼠海豚看起来就像永远挂着微笑

vocabulary.definition: n. 木槌, 球棍, 棒；[化] 大锤; 手锤
vocabulary.context: Once the mixture was spread on the table, Noor's father and grandfather took turns, with a special mallet, and chipped the roasted-nut brittle into small pieces.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当混合物铺在桌子上后，努尔的父亲和祖父轮流用一把特制的木槌，将烤坚果脆切成小块

vocabulary.definition: adj. 起皱的, 绉褶多的, 蜷缩的
vocabulary.context: By the end of the night, the crinkly cellophane stuck out of their candy bags like flowers in a vase.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到了晚上，皱巴巴的玻璃纸从糖果袋里伸出来，就像花瓶里的花朵一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 裂缝, 投币口, 狭长裂口；v.t. 切开, 扯裂, 使有狭缝；v.i. 纵切, 纵裂
vocabulary.context: Then Noor threaded yellow ribbon through the slits at the top of Dan's bag and tied it around his waist.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，努尔将黄丝带穿过丹包顶部的缝隙，系在腰上

vocabulary.definition: n. 正午, 中午；adj. 正午的
vocabulary.context: She prayed the midday prayer, then the afternoon prayer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她先做了午祷，然后又做了午祷

vocabulary.definition: n. 釉, 上光, 光滑面；v.t. 装以玻璃, 上釉于；v.i. 变得光滑, (目光)变呆滞
vocabulary.context: In the kitchen, Noor mixed honey with powdered sugar, then Mom heated the mixture to make a glaze for the nut brittle.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在厨房里，努尔将蜂蜜和糖粉混合，然后妈妈加热混合物，为坚果脆制作釉料

vocabulary.definition: n. 黄铜, 黄铜制品；adj. 黄铜的, 铜管乐器的；v. 镀以黄铜, 支付
vocabulary.context: Noor's heart beat as fast as the drums of the musaher himself as she held up her brass fanous.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当努尔举起铜管时，她的心跳得像穆萨赫本人的鼓一样快

vocabulary.definition: n. 风味, 滋味, 少量, 拍击声, 咂嘴声, 小渔船, 海洛因；v.i. 有味道, 咂嘴, 发出拍击声；v.t. 拍, 打, 掴, 咂, 出声地吻；adv. 啪地一声, 猛然
vocabulary.context: Sam and Dan smacked their hands in a high five and sang, "Girgian!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 萨姆和丹击掌高高地唱着："Girgian！

vocabulary.definition: v. 装饰
vocabulary.context: "Now we must decorate the bags," said Noor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "现在我们必须装饰袋子，"努尔说

vocabulary.definition: adv. 确定地
vocabulary.context: "It certainly is beautiful, my Noor," her grandfather said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这确实很美丽，我的努尔，"她的祖父说

vocabulary.definition: n. 小望远镜
vocabulary.context: On a warm June evening in 1609, Galileo Galilei, a 45-year-old Italian mathematics teacher and father of three, listened as a friend described the latest invention to hit Europe: a long tube containing two glass lenses, called a spyglass.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1609 年六月一个温暖的夜晚，45 岁的意大利数学教师、三个孩子的父亲伽利略·伽利莱 (Galileo Galilei) 听朋友描述了席卷欧洲的最新发明：一根装有两个玻璃镜片的长管，称为望远镜

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无瑕疵的, 无缺点的；[化] 无裂纹的; 无裂缝的
vocabulary.context: These early telescopes weren't perfect, but what they showed was true enough: the heavens were not "flawless," nor did they revolve around the earth, as many believed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些早期的望远镜并不完美，但它们所展示的却是足够真实的：天空并不"完美无缺"，也不像许多人相信的那样围绕地球旋转

vocabulary.definition: n. 疑论者, 怀疑主义者（skeptic的复数形式）
vocabulary.context: Some skeptics chose not to look through the new telescopes; others refused to believe what they saw.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些怀疑论者选择不通过新望远镜进行观测。其他人拒绝相信他们所看到的

vocabulary.definition: n. 雾, 迷惑, (割后的)最生草, 苔藓；v.i. 被雾笼罩, 变模糊；v.t. 使困惑, 以雾笼罩
vocabulary.context: The chilled lens of his telescope fogged up whenever he put his eye near the glass, and he had to keep wiping it clear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每当他将眼睛靠近玻璃时，望远镜的冰冷镜片就会起雾，他必须不断地擦拭它

vocabulary.definition: adv. 兴奋地
vocabulary.context: Feverishly, Galileo built more telescopes, hoping to make the truth visible to everyone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伽利略狂热地建造了更多的望远镜，希望让每个人都能看到真相

vocabulary.definition: adj. 多岩的, 崎岖的, 峻峭的, 多峭壁的
vocabulary.context: A craggy moon wasn't all that he discovered.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他发现的不仅仅是崎岖的月亮

vocabulary.definition: adv. 热情地, 激昂地
vocabulary.context: At the time, many people passionately believed Earth should be at the center of the universe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当时，许多人坚信地球应该位于宇宙的中心

vocabulary.definition: adj. 令人惊异的, 了不起的, 不平常的
vocabulary.context: While some refused to let go of their old ideas, new and marvelous mysteries and discoveries awaited those who did.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然有些人拒绝放弃他们的旧观念，但新的、奇妙的奥秘和发现正在等待着那些放弃的人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 晕船的
vocabulary.context: Then she had gotten horribly seasick.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后她晕船得厉害

vocabulary.definition: adj. 两件构成一套的, 上下两件的
vocabulary.context: She wore a black two-piece bathing suit, a skull cap, heavy goggles, and eight layers of grease to protect her from the cold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她穿着黑色两件式泳衣，戴着无边帽，戴着厚重的护目镜，身上涂了八层油脂来御寒

vocabulary.definition: adj. 全面的, 万能的
vocabulary.context: Trudy was one of the best all-around swimmers in the world.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 特鲁迪是世界上最好的全能游泳运动员之一

vocabulary.definition: adj. 要使颈骨折断似的, 非常危险的
vocabulary.context: Coach Burgess was worried that Trudy wouldn't be able to keep up that breakneck pace.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伯吉斯教练担心特鲁迪无法保持这种惊人的速度

vocabulary.definition: num. 三十一
vocabulary.context: She had been in the water for fourteen hours and thirty-one minutes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她已经在水中待了十四小时三十一分钟

vocabulary.definition: n. 眼睛瞪视, 护目镜；adj. 突出的, 瞪眼的；v.i. 瞪眼看, 眼珠转动；v.t. 使瞪眼, 使眼珠转动
vocabulary.context: She wore a black two-piece bathing suit, a skull cap, heavy goggles, and eight layers of grease to protect her from the cold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她穿着黑色两件式泳衣，戴着无边帽，戴着厚重的护目镜，身上涂了八层油脂来御寒

vocabulary.definition: adj. 费力的, 努力的, 险峻的
vocabulary.context: Most people thought no woman was strong enough to complete such an arduous swim.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数人认为没有哪个女人有足够的力量完成如此艰巨的游泳

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有利的, 赞许的, 良好的
vocabulary.context: Trudy had chosen this day for her swim because weather forecasts were favorable, but at 1:30pm it started to rain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Trudy 选择这一天游泳是因为天气预报有利，但下午 1:30 开始下雨

vocabulary.definition: adj. 没精打采的,闷闷不乐的,消沉的
vocabulary.context: But nothing she said changed the mopey look on Odin's face.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但她所说的话都没有改变奥丁脸上闷闷不乐的表情

vocabulary.definition: adj. 像老鼠的, 鼠臭的, 破烂的, 易怒的
vocabulary.context: All of his things were in the moving van - everything except his ratty, oversized beanbag chair.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他所有的东西都在搬家的货车里--除了他破旧的超大豆袋椅

vocabulary.definition: n. 内脏
vocabulary.context: They both fell onto the decrepit beanbag, pushing more of its innards out onto the floor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们都倒在了破旧的豆袋上，把更多的内脏推到了地板上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 露齿的
vocabulary.context: Odin smiled a big, toothy grin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥丁露齿而笑

vocabulary.definition: n. 硬木, 硬木材, 阔叶材, 落叶树；[机] 硬木
vocabulary.context: She secured the room, then tapped her foot against the scratched hardwood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她守好房间，然后用脚轻敲着有划痕的硬木

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 超出...的范围, 作超出能力所及的事而害及自己, 占...的上风, 胜过；v.i. 走得太远, 伸出, 展开
vocabulary.context: "Here, fireflies!" they sang with cupped hands and outreached arms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这里，萤火虫！"他们双手合十，双臂张开，唱歌

vocabulary.definition: adj. 衰老的
vocabulary.context: They both fell onto the decrepit beanbag, pushing more of its innards out onto the floor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们都倒在了破旧的豆袋上，把更多的内脏推到了地板上

vocabulary.definition: abbr. （美）将要（等于going to）
vocabulary.context: "Mom's gonna make me pull out the vacuum again."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "妈妈会让我再次拔出吸尘器。"

vocabulary.definition: n. [美国俚语]=eighty-one
vocabulary.context: He was eighty-two years old.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 享年八十二岁

vocabulary.definition: adj. 降低身份的；有损人格的
vocabulary.context: "I'd like them to experience the beauty of life, the struggle," Jacob said, "how people can overcome certain things that could be very frustrating or very demeaning."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我希望他们体验生活的美丽和斗争，"雅各布说，"人们如何克服某些可能非常令人沮丧或非常有辱人格的事情。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 会见者, 面谈者, 进行面试者
vocabulary.context: In 1995, an interviewer asked Jacob what he would like the audience to experience when looking at his work.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1995年，一位采访者问雅各布，他希望观众在观看他的作品时体验到什么

vocabulary.definition: adj. 课外的
vocabulary.context: When his mother signed him up for an after-school program, Jacob took to art right away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他的母亲为他报名参加一个课后项目时，雅各布立即开始接触艺术

vocabulary.definition: n. 着色, 色彩, 色调, 面色, 气色, 外貌, 伪装, 色素, 颜料, 染料, 着色剂, 特质；[建] 着色, 染色
vocabulary.context: He loved drawing shapes and coloring them with yellows and reds and blues.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他喜欢画形状并用黄色、红色和蓝色来着色

vocabulary.definition: n. 半球, 地球的半面, 大脑半球；[医] 半球
vocabulary.context: By 1804, Haiti was the first nation in the Western Hemisphere to end slavery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到1804年，海地成为西半球第一个结束奴隶制的国家

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 迷住, 迷惑
vocabulary.context: When the show opened, people were captivated by Jacob's work.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当展览开幕时，人们被雅各布的作品迷住了

vocabulary.definition: n. 表现, 展览会, 展览品；[医] 投药, 展览, 展出
vocabulary.context: The next year, officials at the Baltimore Museum of Art invited some of the most famous artists of the day to participate in an exhibition.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二年，巴尔的摩艺术博物馆的官员邀请了当时一些最著名的艺术家参加一个展览

vocabulary.definition: n. 底部, 垒, 基础, 基地；v.t. 以...作基础；adj. 卑鄙的, 低劣的；[计] 基准
vocabulary.context: Harriet and the Promised Land , based on his paintings about the life of Harriet Tubman, was published in 1968.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 《哈里特与应许之地》根据他有关哈里特·塔布曼生活的画作改编，于 1968 年出版

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有两条腿的
vocabulary.context: Today's birds are descended from a group of two-legged, meat-eating dinosaurs called theropods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天的鸟类是一群被称为兽脚亚目恐龙的两足食肉恐龙的后代

vocabulary.definition: [古生] n.兽脚亚目食肉恐龙(前肢小, 主要用后肢行走)；adj. 兽脚亚目的
vocabulary.context: Probably the most famous theropod is the huge Tyrannosaurus rex , but birds evolved from smaller theropods - ones that were ostrich or pony-sized, not school bus-sized like a T.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最著名的兽脚亚目恐龙可能是巨大的霸王龙，但鸟类是由较小的兽脚亚目恐龙进化而来的--鸵鸟或小马大小，而不是像霸王龙那样校车大小

vocabulary.definition: n. 羽根, 大翎毛, 羽毛笔；v.t. 刺穿
vocabulary.context: Over time, some theropods grew fluffy or downy feathers, while others evolved a central quill - the hollow shaft or stalk of a feather - with fuzzy branches shooting off the sides.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着时间的推移，一些兽脚类恐龙长出了蓬松或柔软的羽毛，而另一些兽脚亚目恐龙则进化出一根中央羽毛管--羽毛的中空轴或茎--两侧长出毛茸茸的树枝

vocabulary.definition: adj. 爬虫类的, 像爬虫的, 卑鄙的；n. 爬行动物
vocabulary.context: Over time, a series of small changes adds up, often resulting in an organism that looks nothing like its distant ancestors - like modern birds and their reptilian ancestors, the dinosaurs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着时间的推移，一系列微小的变化日积月累，通常会导致生物体看起来完全不像它的远祖--就像现代鸟类和它们的爬行动物祖先恐龙一样

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有齿的, 锯齿的, 锯齿状的
vocabulary.context: Non-avian dinosaurs, toothed birds, and pterosaurs - the huge, flying reptiles that dominated the skies for millions of years - all went extinct then.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 非鸟类恐龙、齿鸟和翼龙--统治天空数百万年的巨大飞行爬行动物--都在那时灭绝了

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使多样化, 使变化
vocabulary.context: Over time, they have evolved and diversified into around 10,000 species of modern birds today.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着时间的推移，它们已经进化并多样化为今天约 10,000 种现代鸟类

vocabulary.definition: n. 转变, 转换, 变迁, 过渡时期, 临时转调；[化] 跃迁
vocabulary.context: In the past three decades, scientists - especially paleontologists (PALE-ee-on-TOL-uh-jists), who study life in the past - have found additional fossils and learned more about the dinosaur-bird transition than they had in the previous two centuries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在过去的三十年里，科学家们--尤其是研究过去生命的古生物学家（PALE-ee-on-TOL-uh-jists）--发现了更多的化石，并对恐龙-鸟类的转变有了比过去两个世纪更多的了解

vocabulary.definition: adj. 附加的, 另外的, 额外的；[机] 加添的, 附加的
vocabulary.context: In the past three decades, scientists - especially paleontologists (PALE-ee-on-TOL-uh-jists), who study life in the past - have found additional fossils and learned more about the dinosaur-bird transition than they had in the previous two centuries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在过去的三十年里，科学家们--尤其是研究过去生命的古生物学家（PALE-ee-on-TOL-uh-jists）--发现了更多的化石，并对恐龙-鸟类的转变有了比过去两个世纪更多的了解

vocabulary.definition: n. 菊石；[化] 菊石; 干肉粉; 阿芒炸药; 硝铵二硝基萘炸药
vocabulary.context: So if they dig up an ammonite, they know the surrounding rock is that old, too.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，如果他们挖出菊石，他们就知道周围的岩石也那么古老

vocabulary.definition: n. 时间轴, 时间表
vocabulary.context: The layers represent a timeline of life on Earth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些图层代表了地球上生命的时间线

vocabulary.definition: n. 扇贝；v.t. 用扇贝状碟烘烤；v.i. 拾扇贝
vocabulary.context: On rare occasions, they include the actual remains, or bodies, of ancient animals or plants, which managed to survive the passage of time pretty much unchanged - maybe the hard shell of a scallop, the armored exoskeleton of a beetle, the tooth of a woolly mammoth, or a little lizard entombed in amber (fossilized tree resin).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在极少数情况下，它们包括古代动物或植物的实际遗骸或尸体，它们在时间的流逝中几乎没有变化--可能是扇贝的硬壳、甲虫的装甲外骨骼、长毛猛犸象的牙齿，或者是埋在琥珀（树脂化石）中的小蜥蜴

vocabulary.definition: adj. 沉渣的, 沉淀物的, 由沉淀物所生成的；[医] 沉淀的, 沉积的, 沉降的
vocabulary.context: And if they discover a new fossil in that same sedimentary layer, they know it is from the same time period.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果他们在同一沉积层中发现新化石，他们就知道它来自同一时期

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 埋葬
vocabulary.context: On rare occasions, they include the actual remains, or bodies, of ancient animals or plants, which managed to survive the passage of time pretty much unchanged - maybe the hard shell of a scallop, the armored exoskeleton of a beetle, the tooth of a woolly mammoth, or a little lizard entombed in amber (fossilized tree resin).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在极少数情况下，它们包括古代动物或植物的实际遗骸或尸体，它们在时间的流逝中几乎没有变化--可能是扇贝的硬壳、甲虫的装甲外骨骼、长毛猛犸象的牙齿，或者是埋在琥珀（树脂化石）中的小蜥蜴

vocabulary.definition: v. 分解, (使)腐烂
vocabulary.context: Water seeps into the area where the animal's remains are decomposing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 水渗入动物遗骸正在腐烂的区域

vocabulary.definition: n. 猛犸, 庞然大物；adj. 猛犸似的, 巨大的
vocabulary.context: On rare occasions, they include the actual remains, or bodies, of ancient animals or plants, which managed to survive the passage of time pretty much unchanged - maybe the hard shell of a scallop, the armored exoskeleton of a beetle, the tooth of a woolly mammoth, or a little lizard entombed in amber (fossilized tree resin).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在极少数情况下，它们包括古代动物或植物的实际遗骸或尸体，它们在时间的流逝中几乎没有变化--可能是扇贝的硬壳、甲虫的装甲外骨骼、长毛猛犸象的牙齿，或者是埋在琥珀（树脂化石）中的小蜥蜴

vocabulary.definition: n. 存款, 定金, 堆积物；v.t. 存放, 堆积；v.i. 沉淀

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着沉积物的堆积，富含矿物质的水渗入遗骸中，将矿物质沉积在骨骼的微小空间中，甚至取代了原来的骨骼

vocabulary.definition: n. 河床

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 河床

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 直到今天，因纽特人还讲述着忠实的熊库尼克和抚养他长大的老妇人的故事

vocabulary.definition: n. 沙鼠( gerbil的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: But just like we love our excitable dogs, moody cats and pet gerbils, the ancient Egyptians deeply loved their animal companions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但就像我们爱兴奋的狗、喜怒无常的猫和宠物沙鼠一样，古埃及人也深爱他们的动物伙伴

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但他们也饲养狒狒、猴子、瞪羚、狮子、猫鼬和鳄鱼作为宠物

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科尔曼对他们勇敢的飞行员的故事很着迷

vocabulary.definition: n. 飞机场

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在机场上空，一名飞行员刚刚在空中划出了清晰的"8"字形

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她在一家男士理发店找到了一份美甲师的工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 驾驶员座舱, 战场
vocabulary.context: But the woman in the cockpit of the plane on October 15, 1922, was in perfect control.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但 1922 年 10 月 15 日，飞机驾驶舱内的那位女士完全控制住了

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 无奈之下，科尔曼向罗伯特·阿博特寻求帮助

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她不想让贝西一生都在摘棉花，并敦促她用自己的一生做一些特别的事情

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 轻度过敏的人可以服用一种称为抗组胺药的药物

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 您自己可能有过敏症

vocabulary.definition: n. 抗体；[化] 抗体
vocabulary.context: So, if a person eats that food, the antibody acts as if the body is under attack by germs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，如果一个人吃了这种食物，抗体就会发挥作用，就好像身体受到了细菌的攻击一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 粘液；[化] 粘液

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们还可能导致鼻子和肺部排出粘液

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有人知道为什么有些人对某些食物过敏而另一些人则不然

vocabulary.definition: n. 超时, 加班, 延长时间；adj. 超时的, 加班的；adv. 加班地；v.t. 使超过时间

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些过敏会导致免疫系统超时工作

vocabulary.definition: adj. 温和的, 温柔的, 淡味的, 适度的, 轻微的, (肥皂等)软性的；[医] 轻的, 缓和的
vocabulary.context: People with milder allergies may take a medicine called an antihistamine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 轻度过敏的人可以服用一种称为抗组胺药的药物

vocabulary.definition: n. 肺, 肺脏, 空地；[医] 肺
vocabulary.context: In most food allergies, histamines are released in the skin, mouth, throat, and lungs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在大多数食物过敏中，组胺会在皮肤、口腔、喉咙和肺部释放
