vocabulary.contextTranslation: 职业治疗师可以向我们展示不同的方法来帮助身体和大脑学习如何相互交谈

vocabulary.definition: n. 纤维, 构造, 纤维制品；[化] 纤维
vocabulary.context: Special nerves buried deep in muscle fibers seem to help monitor place and motion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 埋藏在肌肉纤维深处的特殊神经似乎有助于监测位置和运动

vocabulary.definition: n. 治疗；[医] 疗法, 治疗
vocabulary.context: This treatment is known as therapy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种治疗称为疗法

vocabulary.definition: n. 反馈, 反应；[计] 反馈
vocabulary.context: These tasks are all designed to help give extra feedback from the muscles to the brain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些任务都是为了帮助从肌肉向大脑提供额外的反馈而设计的

vocabulary.definition: n. 监督器, 级长, 监听员, 班长, 监视器, 告诫物；v. 监视, 监听, 监督；[计] 监视器, 监视程序; 监视
vocabulary.context: Special nerves buried deep in muscle fibers seem to help monitor place and motion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 埋藏在肌肉纤维深处的特殊神经似乎有助于监测位置和运动

vocabulary.definition: n. 期间, 开庭期, 会议, 学期；[计] 会话, 对话, 会晤, 通用任务程序
vocabulary.context: In other therapy sessions a person might be asked to push a heavy box.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在其他治疗过程中，可能会要求一个人推一个重箱子

vocabulary.definition: n. 行使, 执行, 运动, 练习, 作业；v.t. 运用, 练习, 运动；v.i. 练习, 锻炼
vocabulary.context: Another exercise could be to lift a heavy weight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一种练习可能是举起重物

vocabulary.definition: n. 磁控管；[化] 磁控管
vocabulary.context: The company was testing a magnetron, a kind of tube that made power.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该公司正在测试磁控管，这是一种发电管

vocabulary.definition: adj. (黄油等) 容易被涂开的
vocabulary.context: You'll need four slices of bread and some spreadable butter or margarine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你需要四片面包和一些可涂抹的黄油或人造黄油

vocabulary.definition: n. (厨房的)工作台面
vocabulary.context: Finally, in 1967, the Raytheon Corporation introduced a microwave oven that could fit on a countertop.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最后，在 1967 年，雷神公司推出了一款可以安装在台面上的微波炉

vocabulary.definition: n. 人造黄油；[化] 人造奶油; 代奶油
vocabulary.context: You'll need four slices of bread and some spreadable butter or margarine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你需要四片面包和一些可涂抹的黄油或人造黄油

vocabulary.definition: n. 核心, 中心, 精髓, 内核；[计] 内核
vocabulary.context: Then Spencer tried a bag of corn kernels.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后斯宾塞尝试了一袋玉米粒

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 振动, 颤动, 激动, 摇摆, 踌躇；v.t. 使颤动, 使振动, 使摆动
vocabulary.context: When microwaves hit food, the water inside vibrates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当微波照射食物时，里面的水会振动

vocabulary.definition: n. 汉堡(德国港口), 肉饼, 汉堡包, 纯精牛肉, 汉堡牛排
vocabulary.context: It was still expensive, but it could cook a hamburger in 35 seconds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然还是贵，但是35秒就能煮一个汉堡

vocabulary.definition: n. 公司, 合作, 法人团体；[法] 法人团体, 社团, 法人
vocabulary.context: In 1946, a scientist named Percy Spencer was working for a company called the Raytheon Corporation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1946年，一位名叫珀西·斯宾塞的科学家在一家名为雷神公司的公司工作

vocabulary.definition: adv. 完全地, 十分地, 圆满地
vocabulary.context: You'll want the spread to completely cover each slice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 您需要涂抹完全覆盖每片切片

vocabulary.definition: n. 徒步旅行者
vocabulary.context: It was easy to follow because red markers were nailed to the trees and the snow had been packed down by other hikers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很容易跟踪，因为树上钉着红色标记，而且其他徒步旅行者已经把积雪压平了

vocabulary.definition: n. 小峡谷, 排水沟
vocabulary.context: At the top of the hill, we turned onto the purple trail, which wound back and forth, traversing the hills and gullies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到了山顶，我们拐上紫色的小道，蜿蜒曲折，穿越山峦沟壑

vocabulary.definition: n. 连接, 会合处, 交叉点；[医] 接[合]处, 接点.[接]界
vocabulary.context: I came to a junction where I could turn left or go straight, but both trails had purple markers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我来到一个路口，可以左转或直走，但两条小路都有紫色标记

vocabulary.definition: n. 亭, 凉亭, 报摊
vocabulary.context: At the parking area, after putting on our snowshoes, we studied the map in the information kiosk.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在停车场，我们穿上雪鞋后，在信息亭里研究了地图

vocabulary.definition: adj. 上坡的, 向上的；adv. 往上坡, 向上地
vocabulary.context: The trail ran uphill alongside a stone wall.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这条小路沿着石墙向上延伸

vocabulary.definition: adj. 喘不过气来的, 屏气的, 气喘吁吁的, 无风的, 死的
vocabulary.context: My cousins and I high-fived each other and jogged down the slope until we stood at the base, breathless.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我和表兄弟互相击掌，然后沿着斜坡慢跑，直到我们气喘吁吁地站在山脚下

vocabulary.definition: n. 脚步, 脚步声, 足迹
vocabulary.context: And I couldn't just follow my own footsteps because there were so many tracks from other hikers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 而且我不能只跟随自己的脚步，因为有很多其他徒步旅行者的足迹

vocabulary.definition: n. 恐慌, 惊慌；adj. 惊慌的, 没有理由的, 恐慌的；v.t. 使惊慌, 使狂热；v.i. 惊慌
vocabulary.context: I started tearing through the woods in a panic, watching as the sun disappeared behind the trees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我开始惊慌地穿过树林，看着太阳消失在树林后面

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 描述, 描绘, 画
vocabulary.context: That's how the guide book described Giant Rock.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 指南书中是这样描述巨石的

vocabulary.definition: n. 毛地黄；[化] 洋地黄; 毛地黄
vocabulary.context: Foxgloves have a strong poison.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毛地黄有剧毒

vocabulary.definition: n. 荨麻；v.t. 以荨麻刺, 激怒
vocabulary.context: In a stinging nettle, those hairs are full of poison.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在荨麻中，那些毛发充满了毒药

vocabulary.definition: n. 咖啡因, 咖啡碱；[化] 咖啡因; 咖啡碱
vocabulary.context: Coffee plants have caffeine for the same reason.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 出于同样的原因，咖啡植物也含有咖啡因

vocabulary.definition: n. 玉蜀黍, 黄色；adj. 玉蜀黍色的, 黄色的
vocabulary.context: Maize lets out a smell when it's under attack.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 玉米受到攻击时会发出气味

vocabulary.definition: n. 黄蜂( wasp的复数形式 ); 胡蜂; 易动怒的人; 刻毒的人
vocabulary.context: The smell brings wasps that feed on other bugs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种气味带来了以其他虫子为食的黄蜂

vocabulary.definition: n. 刺, 刺痛, 柳条篮子；v. 刺, 扎, 戳, 引起刺痛, 使感到刺痛
vocabulary.context: Their sharp parts are called prickles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们的尖锐部分称为刺

vocabulary.definition: n. 园丁, 花匠, 园艺家
vocabulary.context: Some gardeners even use sprays made from chrysanthemum flowers to keep bugs off their plants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些园丁甚至使用菊花制成的喷雾剂来防止昆虫进入植物

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 吸引, 诱惑；v.i. 有吸引力
vocabulary.context: One kind of tobacco plant attracts wasps the same way if it's being eaten.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一种烟草植物在被食用时会以同样的方式吸引黄蜂。 【02】一点小流浪，西部明星

vocabulary.definition: n. 保护, 防卫, 贸易保护制度；[计] 保护
vocabulary.context: Peony flowers trade food for protection.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 牡丹花以食物换取保护

vocabulary.definition: n. "跳房子"游戏
vocabulary.context: The next afternoon Frances was playing hopscotch with Grace when Julie walked by.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二天下午，当朱莉走过时，弗朗西斯正在和格蕾丝玩跳房子

vocabulary.definition: v. 用美丽的纸张及缎带包装( gift-wrap的过去式 )
vocabulary.context: "After the little beast left, I dug up the bone, gift-wrapped it, and put it in that man's mailbox."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "小兽走后，我把骨头挖了出来，用礼物包装起来，放进了那个男人的邮箱里。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 肉团, 愚蠢, 飞机降落目标
vocabulary.context: When they sat down to eat, Frances saw that they were having her favorite meal - spaghetti and meatballs and salad, with chocolate pudding for dessert.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他们坐下来吃饭时，弗朗西斯发现他们正在吃她最喜欢的一餐--意大利面、肉丸和沙拉，还有巧克力布丁作为甜点

vocabulary.definition: n. 意大利面条
vocabulary.context: When they sat down to eat, Frances saw that they were having her favorite meal - spaghetti and meatballs and salad, with chocolate pudding for dessert.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他们坐下来吃饭时，弗朗西斯发现他们正在吃她最喜欢的一餐--意大利面、肉丸和沙拉，还有巧克力布丁作为甜点

vocabulary.definition: n. 喷溅声, 劈啪声, 语无伦次；v.i. 唾沫飞溅, 结结巴巴地讲, 发劈啪声；v.t. 喷出, 飞溅出, 气急败坏地说
vocabulary.context: Then she started to sputter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后她开始语无伦次

vocabulary.definition: n. 就寝时间
vocabulary.context: Frances had been blowing bubbles in her bedtime milk.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 弗朗西斯一直在睡前牛奶中吹泡泡

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不情愿地, 勉强地
vocabulary.context: Reluctantly Frances said good-bye to Grace.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 弗朗西斯依依不舍地向格蕾丝告别

vocabulary.definition: adv. 锐利地, 严厉地, 厉害地；[经] 剧烈地
vocabulary.context: "Act your age," said Aunt Augusta sharply.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "按照你的年龄行事，"奥古斯塔姨妈尖锐地说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 适当的, 固有的, 高尚的, 专属的；adv. 完全地, 彻底地
vocabulary.context: At the thought of proper Aunt Augusta being told to act her age, Frances started to laugh.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一想到奥古斯塔阿姨被要求表现出她的年龄，弗朗西斯就笑了起来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 受霜害的, 生冻疮的
vocabulary.context: She tells me I won't look very cool with my frostbitten ears flopping like a Labrador puppy's.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她告诉我，如果我的冻伤耳朵像拉布拉多小狗一样垂下来，我看起来不会很酷

vocabulary.definition: n. 拖绳, 拖缆
vocabulary.context: The first time we hooked her to Rudy's towline, Rudy snarled and lunged at her.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我们第一次把她挂在鲁迪的拖绳上时，鲁迪咆哮着并向她扑来

vocabulary.definition: n. 毛织品, 毛料衣服, 毛线衣, 羊毛织物
vocabulary.context: In the morning the wind beats our house as I pull on the woolens, hat, and coat Mom laid out for me.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 早上，风吹过我们的房子，我穿上妈妈为我准备的羊毛衫、帽子和外套

vocabulary.definition: adv. 恰好地, 不偏不倚地
vocabulary.context: Saritaka, which is just fine because he happens to live smack-dab beside our house.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Saritaka，这很好，因为他恰好住在我们家旁边

vocabulary.definition: n. 坐着的人, 坐着被画像的人
vocabulary.context: "Matt," he says, "I hear you are your uncle's dog sitter for the weekend."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "马特，"他说，"我听说你是你叔叔周末的狗保姆。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 垫, 丛, 衬边；adj. 粗糙的, 无光泽的；v.i. 纠缠在一起；v.t. 铺席于...上, 使无光泽, 使缠结
vocabulary.context: I found Skeena last spring, a stray, matted puppy hunkered under Uncle Stan's steps.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 去年春天我发现了斯基娜，一只流浪的小狗，蜷缩在斯坦叔叔的台阶下

vocabulary.definition: adv. 可怕地, 非常地
vocabulary.context: She is shaking horribly; I can't leave her on the cold ground.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她颤抖得厉害；我不能把她丢在冰冷的地上

vocabulary.definition: n. 手巾, 毛巾；v. 擦干身子
vocabulary.context: Saritaka is as fast as the wind as he snaps out a thick towel.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 萨里塔卡（Saritaka）速度如风，猛地抽出一条厚毛巾

vocabulary.definition: adj. 瘦的, 骨瘦如柴的
vocabulary.context: "I'm just a scrawny rabbit."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我只是一只骨瘦如柴的兔子。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不谨慎的, 不注意的, 粗心的, 易上当的
vocabulary.context: The unwary rabbit was gazing at the full moon that lit the cloudless sky.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 粗心的兔子正凝视着照亮万里无云的天空的满月

vocabulary.definition: adj. 晴朗的, 无云的
vocabulary.context: The unwary rabbit was gazing at the full moon that lit the cloudless sky.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 粗心的兔子正凝视着照亮万里无云的天空的满月

vocabulary.definition: adj. 尖的
vocabulary.context: "Caught you," he said, flashing his pointy white teeth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "抓住你了，"他说，露出尖尖的白牙

vocabulary.definition: n. 丛林狼, 讨厌的家伙
vocabulary.context: Coyote was hiding behind a boulder near the lake.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 郊狼躲在湖边的一块巨石后面

vocabulary.definition: n. 刺, 刺进, 跃进, 套马索；v. 突进, 刺
vocabulary.context: Coyote lunged at Conejo.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 土狼扑向科内霍

vocabulary.definition: n. 举, 抛, 起伏, 鼓起；v.t. 用力举起, 使举起, 使鼓起；v.i. 抛出, 起伏, 喘息, 凸起
vocabulary.context: Gasping for air, he heaved himself out of the water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他喘着粗气，从水中爬了出来

vocabulary.definition: n. 乳酪；[化] 干酪
vocabulary.context: Just before you started to chase me, I saw an enormous wheel of cheese resting on the bottom of the lake."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 就在你开始追我之前，我看到湖底有一个巨大的奶酪轮。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 种族, 人种, 赛跑, 比赛, 急流, 人类, 同道, 姜根；v.i. 赛跑, 竞赛, 疾走；v.t. 与...赛跑, 使疾走, 使猛转；[计] 竞争; 追赶; 欧州高级通信研究开发计划
vocabulary.context: Conejo's mind raced. "You don't want to eat me," he said. "I'm just a scrawny rabbit."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科内霍的思绪飞快运转。 "你不想吃我，"他说。 "我只是一只骨瘦如柴的兔子。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 保护（性）地, 防护地
vocabulary.context: The dog had wrapped itself protectively around the kitten.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 狗把自己包裹在小猫周围以保护自己

vocabulary.definition: v. 使疲倦, 使衰弱( tucker的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: All of the excitement of falling from the sky had tuckered it out.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从天上掉下来的所有兴奋都把它淹没了

vocabulary.definition: v. 啜泣( mewl的现在分词 )
vocabulary.context: All of them whining or mewling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们都在抱怨或哭泣

vocabulary.definition: v. 将鼻插入, 用鼻掘, 蜷卧
vocabulary.context: The dog gently nuzzled the kitten and picked it up by the scruff of its neck, the way momma cats do.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 狗轻轻地用鼻子蹭着小猫，然后抓住它的颈背把它抱起来，就像猫妈妈做的那样

vocabulary.definition: interj. 啧啧(表示不赞成、责难)；n. 啧啧声音；v.i. 发啧啧声
vocabulary.context: Right before he left his grandparents' house, his Granmom had tutted at the clouds and said, "It's going to rain cats and dogs out there.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 就在他离开祖父母家之前，他的奶奶对着云叹了口气说："外面要下倾盆大雨了

vocabulary.definition: n. 自明之理, 公理, 原理, 格言；[法] 公理, 原理, 原则
vocabulary.context: He was standing at the intersection of Idiom Lane and Axiom Avenue.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他站在成语巷和公理大道的交叉口

vocabulary.definition: n. 节流阀, 节气阀, 喉咙；v.t. 扼喉咙, 使窒息, 压制, 使节流；v.i. 窒息, 节流, 减速
vocabulary.context: She had told Gavi's mom that the twins were like "non-stop, full throttle, energy machines." She couldn't keep up with them!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她告诉加维的妈妈，这对双胞胎就像"不停歇、全速运转的能量机器"。她已经跟不上他们了！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 逐字的, 字面上的, 文字的, 字母的；n. 印刷错误；[计] 文字; 直接量; 字面量; 句节
vocabulary.context: It rarely rained cold in the small town of Literal Acres.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 利特勒尔阿克斯小镇很少下冷雨

vocabulary.definition: n. 跳板, 出发点
vocabulary.context: Her feet pound the floor before her knees flex, jumping onto a springboard.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的双脚重击地板，然后膝盖弯曲，跳上跳板

vocabulary.definition: adj. 滑液的, 滑膜的；[医] 滑液的
vocabulary.context: Both synovial (say sih-NO-vee-uhl) fluid, a thick liquid that acts as a cushion between your joints and cartilage (say CAR-till-edge), a strong flexible tissue material, make it easier for bones to slide past one another.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 滑液（例如 sih-NO-vee-uhl）是一种粘稠液体，可充当关节和软骨（例如 CAR-till-edge）之间的缓冲垫，软骨是一种坚固的柔韧组织材料，使骨骼更容易相互滑动

vocabulary.definition: adj. [解]髁状的
vocabulary.context: The joints where the two bones of your lower arm meet are called condyloid (say CON-duh-loyd) joints.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 下臂两块骨头相交的关节称为髁状关节（如 CON-duh-loyd）

vocabulary.definition: n. 压缩, 压紧；[计] 压缩
vocabulary.context: You might get better by following the acronym RICE: Rest, Ice, Compression, Elevation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 遵循缩写词 RICE 可能会变得更好：休息、冰敷、压缩、海拔

vocabulary.definition: n. 首字母缩拼词, 首字母组合词；[计] 字首组合词
vocabulary.context: You might get better by following the acronym RICE: Rest, Ice, Compression, Elevation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 遵循缩写词 RICE 可能会变得更好：休息、冰敷、压缩、海拔

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可延伸的, 有弹性的, 易延伸过长的
vocabulary.context: Ligaments are stretchy material that connect bones to other bones.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 韧带是将骨骼与其他骨骼连接起来的弹性材料

vocabulary.definition: n. 跑道, 河床, 过道；[化] 单轨架空道; 吊车道
vocabulary.context: When the gymnast begins to sprint down the runway, she bends her knees and her elbows.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当体操运动员开始沿着跑道冲刺时，她弯曲膝盖和肘部

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 行礼, 致意, 问候, 放礼炮；v.t. 向...致意, 迎接, 赞扬；n. 招呼, 敬礼, 礼炮
vocabulary.context: With her hands raised high in a salute, her thumbs are pressed against her other fingers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她高举双手行礼，拇指压在其他手指上

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 代替, 替换, 放回, 归还；[计] 替换; DOS外部命令:取代或更新文件
vocabulary.context: There is no way to replace cartilage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有办法替代软骨

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可管理的, 能操纵的, 可控制的；[经] 可控制的
vocabulary.context: It was one of the first examples of a controllable artificial limb.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是可控假肢的第一个例子之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 活动的东西, 动产；adj. 可动的, 可移动的, 不定的
vocabulary.context: One design helped injured soldiers grasp things with moveable fingers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一种设计帮助受伤的士兵用可移动的手指抓住东西

vocabulary.definition: adj. 悲伤的, 痛的, 引起痛苦的；n. 痛处, 溃疡, 疮
vocabulary.context: If it doesn't fit well, it may cause blisters, sores, and injury where it rubbed against skin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果不合适，可能会在与皮肤摩擦时引起水泡、溃疡和受伤

vocabulary.definition: adj. 害病的, 病态的, 不健全的
vocabulary.context: Other people need an artificial limb after their original limbs become diseased.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一些人在原有肢体患病后需要假肢

vocabulary.definition: n. 班机, 划线者, 定期船, 衬里；[化] 衬垫; 垫带; 套管
vocabulary.context: A comfortable liner that looks something like a sock sits between a person's skin and the artificial limb to act as a cushion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一种看起来像袜子的舒适衬垫位于人的皮肤和假肢之间，充当垫子

vocabulary.definition: n. 跑步者, 赛跑者, 送信人, 走私船, 操作者, 滑槽；[化] 碾碎机; 压碎机
vocabulary.context: They can be steel arms, legs molded to look like a person's original legs, or even blades that runners use to compete in races!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们可以是钢臂、模制成看起来像人原来的腿的腿，甚至是跑步者在比赛中使用的刀片！

vocabulary.definition: n. 卡通画, 漫画；v. 画漫画
vocabulary.context: Throw the word "pirate" into Google images and you'll find photos and cartoon illustrations of a man holding a sword, a black hat on his head, and an eye patch drawn across his scarred face.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 把"海盗"这个词扔进谷歌图片中，你会发现一个男人拿着剑、头上戴着黑帽子、伤痕累累的脸上画着眼罩的照片和卡通插图

vocabulary.definition: n. 建筑, 构造, 建筑物；[化] 施工
vocabulary.context: Plastics are also an important part of the limb's construction material.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 塑料也是肢体构造材料的重要组成部分

vocabulary.definition: n. 战役；v. 战斗
vocabulary.context: Sailors long ago often lost limbs during battles at sea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很久以前，水手们经常在海上战斗中失去肢体

vocabulary.definition: n. 金鸡纳树, 金鸡纳树皮；[医] 金鸡纳[树]皮
vocabulary.context: The bark's bitter taste reminded him of a medicine made from the cinchona tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 树皮的苦味让他想起了金鸡纳树制成的药物

vocabulary.definition: n. 解除痛苦的人, 接替者, 救济者
vocabulary.context: Aspirin may be the most-used pain reliever in history.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿司匹林可能是历史上最常用的止痛药

vocabulary.definition: n. 阿斯匹林；[化] 乙酰水杨酸; 阿司匹灵; 邻乙酸基苯甲酸
vocabulary.context: The company named the new medicine "aspirin."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该公司将新药命名为"阿司匹林"

vocabulary.definition: n. 疼痛( ache的名词复数 )；v. 渴望( ache的第三人称单数 )
vocabulary.context: He tried it himself, and he gave some to people who had aches and pains.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他亲自尝试过，并给有疼痛的人一些

vocabulary.definition: n. 药丸, 弹丸, 屈辱, 胡说；v. 做成药丸, 形成丸状, 服药丸, 挫败, 抢劫
vocabulary.context: Have you seen your parents complain about a headache, then reach for a bottle of pain-killing pills (adults only!)?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你是否见过你的父母抱怨头痛，然后伸手去拿一瓶止痛药（仅限成人！）？

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 咀嚼, 嚼碎；v.i. 咀嚼, 细想；n. 咀嚼, 咀嚼物
vocabulary.context: We use these medicines when we're hurting, but one might not exist if a man hadn't chewed on a tree centuries ago.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我们受伤时，我们会使用这些药物，但如果几个世纪前一个人没有咀嚼一棵树，这些药物可能就不存在

vocabulary.definition: n. 混合, 混淆, 混合物；[化] 混合物
vocabulary.context: Stone tested his willow bark mixture on 50 people over 5 years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Stone 在 5 年内对 50 个人测试了他的柳树皮混合物

vocabulary.definition: n. 人, 人民, 民族, 平民；v.t. 使住满人, 居住于
vocabulary.context: So did Indigenous peoples from South Africa to North America.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从南非到北美的原住民也是如此

vocabulary.definition: n. 方法, 办法, 条理, 秩序；[医] [方]法
vocabulary.context: Willow bark had also been used in England, but Stone was the first person to test it using scientific methods and write about it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 英国也曾使用过柳树皮，但斯通是第一个使用科学方法对其进行测试并撰写文章的人

vocabulary.definition: n. 雄鹅, 笨人, 呆子
vocabulary.context: The gander and the three other geese flapped their wings and honked even louder.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公鹅和另外三只鹅拍打着翅膀，叫得更大声

vocabulary.definition: adv. 乱七八糟地, 凌乱地, 忙乱地；adj. 胡乱的, 混乱的；n. 乱七八糟, 混乱, 杂乱
vocabulary.context: When this happens, folks young and old dash pell-mell to claim the fallen kites.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当这种情况发生时，老老少少都争先恐后地去抢夺掉落的风筝

vocabulary.definition: n. 风筝, 筝帆, 空头支票, 骗子；v.i. 象风筝一样飞, 轻快地移动, 使用空头支票；v.t. 使上升, 骗钱
vocabulary.context: The fliers usually do not know who owns the other kites.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 放飞者通常不知道谁拥有其他风筝

vocabulary.definition: n. 锐利, 严厉, 疾速；[计] 清晰度
vocabulary.context: Depending on the strength and sharpness of the string, the skill of the flier, and the quality of the kite, one or more kites may be cut off in midair and fall to the ground.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据线的强度和锐度、放飞者的技术以及风筝的质量，一只或多只风筝可能会在半空中被切断并掉落到地面上

vocabulary.definition: n. 痒, 渴望, 疥疮；v.i. 发痒, 渴望
vocabulary.context: The glassed string stung and itched.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 玻璃线又刺又痒

vocabulary.definition: n. 家禽
vocabulary.context: Next thing I knew I was by the village headman's poultry yard.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 接下来我就知道我已经到了村长的家禽场了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 乡下的, 田园的, 乡村风味的；[法] 农村的, 乡村的, 有关农业的
vocabulary.context: In parts of rural Malaysia, the string used to fly a kite is coated with ground glass.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在马来西亚农村的部分地区，用于放风筝的绳子上涂有毛玻璃

vocabulary.definition: adj. 稳定的, 不动摇的, 沉着的, 稳固的, 坚定的, 经常的；v.t. 使稳定, 使坚定；v.i. 变为沉着, 稳固
vocabulary.context: Then I saw that Moon Kite was soaring straight and steady like a rocket while Cobra was falling down, down, down like a sad, giant leaf.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后我看到月亮风筝像火箭一样笔直而稳定地翱翔，而眼镜蛇则像一片悲伤的巨大叶子一样落下，落下，落下

vocabulary.definition: n. 柱廊
vocabulary.context: After waiting in line, you'll enter the East Wing and walk down the East Colonnade.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 排队等候后，进入东翼，沿着东柱廊走下去

vocabulary.definition: adj. 通风良好的, 有穿堂风的
vocabulary.context: It was also cold and drafty, and some of the rooms and stairs were not finished.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 天气又冷又通风，有些房间和楼梯还没有完工

vocabulary.definition: n. 轻推, 轻撞, 慢跑；v. 轻推, (使)蹒跚行进, (使)慢跑
vocabulary.context: But if you were a White House guest, you could visit the Children's Garden, play tennis, swim in the pool, go for a jog on the jogging path, and admire the flowers and trees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但如果你是白宫客人，你可以参观儿童花园，打网球，在游泳池里游泳，在慢跑道上慢跑，欣赏花草树木

vocabulary.definition: n. 壁纸, 墙纸；v. 贴墙纸；[计] 壁纸
vocabulary.context: The wallpaper, furniture, and art have changed over the years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些年来，壁纸、家具和艺术品都发生了变化

vocabulary.definition: n. 接待, 接受, 招待会；[医] 接受, 感受
vocabulary.context: The Green Room, Blue Room, and Red Room are often used for receptions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 绿厅、蓝厅、红厅常用于接待

vocabulary.definition: n. 约会, 委任的职位, 委派；[经] 任命, 派, 指定
vocabulary.context: You'll need a special appointment to visit.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 您需要预约才能参观

vocabulary.definition: n. 小路, 巷
vocabulary.context: You might watch a movie in the family movie theater, or bowl a game in the underground bowling alley!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你可以在家庭电影院看电影，或者在地下保龄球馆打一场比赛！

vocabulary.definition: n. 戏院, 电影院, 剧场, 全体观众, 戏剧, 戏剧效果, 阶梯式讲堂, 场所
vocabulary.context: You might watch a movie in the family movie theater, or bowl a game in the underground bowling alley!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你可以在家庭电影院看电影，或者在地下保龄球馆打一场比赛！

vocabulary.definition: v. 扩充, 延伸, 伸展, 扩大；[计] 扩展
vocabulary.context: A colonnade (a long hallway with windows or columns) extends from both sides of the main building.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 柱廊（带有窗户或柱子的长走廊）从主建筑的两侧延伸

vocabulary.definition: n. 姊妹关系, 姊妹之谊, 妇女团体
vocabulary.context: What does sisterhood mean to you and your twin?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 姐妹情谊对你和你的双胞胎意味着什么？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不同的, 相异的
vocabulary.context: As twins, we're pretty dissimilar.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为双胞胎，我们非常不同

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 质问, 讯问, 审问；v.i. 质问, 讯问
vocabulary.context: Poetry is the lens we use to interrogate the history we stand on and the future we stand for.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诗歌是我们用来审视我们所代表的历史和我们所代表的未来的镜头

vocabulary.definition: n. 惊人的事物, 奇迹, 不凡的人, 奇才, 神童, 预兆
vocabulary.context: People know you as something of a prodigy - a poet who set the country on fire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们都知道你是一位神童--一位点燃了整个国家的诗人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 戴桂冠的, 用月桂树枝编织成的, 荣誉的；n. 桂冠诗人；v.t. 使戴桂冠
vocabulary.context: Amanda Gorman is the country's first National Youth Poet Laureate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿曼达戈尔曼是该国第一位国家青年诗人桂冠

vocabulary.definition: n. 抒情诗, 歌词；adj. 抒情的
vocabulary.context: It's inspired by Lin-Manuel Miranda's lyrics in Moana , in "Song of the Ancestors." That song goes: "I'm the daughter of the village chief / We're descended from voyagers who made their way across the world." Something like that.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它的灵感来自林-曼努尔·米兰达 (Lin-Manuel Miranda) 在莫阿娜 (Moana) 中的"祖先之歌"中的歌词。那首歌是这样唱的："我是村长的女儿/我们是穿越世界的航海家的后裔。"类似的事情

vocabulary.definition: n. 巧合, 同时发生；[电] 符合计数器
vocabulary.context: It's no coincidence that at the base of the Statue of Liberty, there is a poem.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自由女神像的底座上有一首诗，这并非巧合

vocabulary.definition: n. 有希望之人, 有前途之人；adj. 有希望的, 怀抱希望的, 保持乐观的
vocabulary.context: Write something that is brave enough to be hopeful.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 写一些足够勇敢、充满希望的东西

vocabulary.definition: n. 提到, 言及, 陈述；v.t. 提到, 提及
vocabulary.context: "The Hill We Climb" mentions your being a descendant of slaves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 《我们攀登的山》提到你是奴隶的后裔

vocabulary.definition: adj. 小气的, 自私的
vocabulary.context: His wife was a mean-spirited woman who beat me for the smallest mistake.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的妻子是个心胸狭窄的女人，我因为一点小错误就打我

vocabulary.definition: n. 木工活, 木工行业
vocabulary.context: The company worked me hard, but I also learned woodworking skills.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公司辛苦了我，但我也学会了木工技能

vocabulary.definition: n. 稀粥；v.t. 使极度疲劳, 惩罚
vocabulary.context: I existed mostly on corn gruel, peas, and a little bread.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我主要靠玉米粥、豌豆和一点面包生存

vocabulary.definition: n. 契约, 契据, 凹痕；v.t. 以契约束缚
vocabulary.context: The agreement was called an indenture.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该协议称为契约

vocabulary.definition: n. 种植者, 耕作者, 种植机, 花盆
vocabulary.context: The planters in Virginia needed workers, so we were being rounded up and sent to Jamestown to work for the Virginia Company.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 弗吉尼亚州的种植园主需要工人，因此我们被围捕并送往詹姆斯敦为弗吉尼亚公司工作

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不诚实的；[法] 不忠实的, 不诚实的, 欺诈的
vocabulary.context: But if you are lazy or dishonest, or you try to run away, your life will not be easy."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但如果你懒惰或不诚实，或者你试图逃跑，你的生活就不会轻松。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 孤儿；adj. 无双亲的, 孤儿的；v.t. 使成孤儿；[计] 弧体
vocabulary.context: Around 1620, the Lord Mayor of London began sending orphans from London's streets to work in Virginia.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1620年左右，伦敦市长开始将伦敦街头的孤儿送到弗吉尼亚州工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 碎布, 抹布, 碎片, 碎屑, 少量, 破旧衣服；v.t. 责骂, 揶揄, 戏弄；v.i. 喧闹
vocabulary.context: My clothes became ragged; my belly was never full.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的衣服变得破烂；我的肚子从来没有饱过

vocabulary.definition: n. 雇用, 职业, 工作；[经] 职业, 雇用, 职工招请
vocabulary.context: Carpenters are in great demand here, so I'm sure to find employment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这里对木匠的需求量很大，所以我一定能找到工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 煎蛋卷, 煎蛋饼, 炒蛋
vocabulary.context: Salma found a scribbled note with breakfast ideas on the kitchen counter and cooked herself a cheese omelet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 萨尔玛在厨房柜台上发现了一张潦草的便条，上面写着早餐的想法，然后给自己做了一份奶酪煎蛋卷

vocabulary.definition: n. 纠缠者
vocabulary.context: Mo pointed out a shy hermit crab, a little fish, and pointy hat-shaped shells called limpets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莫指出了一种害羞的寄居蟹、一条小鱼和一种叫做帽贝的尖帽形贝壳

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 飞掠而过, 蹦跳；v.t. 使掠过水面
vocabulary.context: The tiny crab, no bigger than her fingernail, skittered sideways across her wrist.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这只比她的指甲还大的小螃蟹，从她的手腕上掠过

vocabulary.definition: n. 椅背纵板
vocabulary.context: As her foot slid on slimy green goo, she flailed her arms to steady herself, but landed with a splat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她的脚在粘糊糊的绿色粘液上滑动时，她挥动双臂试图稳住自己，但扑通一声落地

vocabulary.definition: n. 举手击掌（两人以手合掌高举头顶以表示得意祝贺或问候的手势）
vocabulary.context: Salma giggled and returned Mo's high-five.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 萨尔玛咯咯地笑起来，并回应了莫的击掌

vocabulary.definition: n. 嘎吱声, 压碎的一堆, 使对手哑口无言的话；v.t. 压碎, 镇压, 使咯吱咯吱响；v.i. 咯吱咯吱响, 涉水而过；[计] 撤消权限
vocabulary.context: Her flip-flops made a loud squelching sound.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的人字拖发出很大的嘎吱声

vocabulary.definition: n. 尼龙；[化] 尼龙; 聚酰胺纤维
vocabulary.context: Mo reached for it and added a broken plastic spoon and a bit of nylon rope.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莫伸手去拿它，并添加了一个破损的塑料勺子和一段尼龙绳

vocabulary.definition: n. 块, 瘤, 很多, 肿块, 笨人；v.t. 使成块状, 混在一起；v.i. 结块
vocabulary.context: "I see some lumps of gray rock," said Salma.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我看到一些灰色的岩石块，"萨尔玛说

vocabulary.definition: n. <法>=bakery
vocabulary.context: "This is the boulangerie , the bakery, where I get my after-school snack," Jacques explained.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这是面包店，我放学后可以在那里吃点心，"雅克解释道

vocabulary.definition: n. 浓情巧克力（电影名）
vocabulary.context: "Three pains au chocolat , if you please," he asked.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "如果你愿意的话，请给我三块巧克力，"他问道

vocabulary.definition: n. 榛实；[医] 榛实
vocabulary.context: "It's not peanut butter, it's hazelnut butter," her mom said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这不是花生酱，而是榛子酱，"她妈妈说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 薄片的, 成片的, 薄而易剥落的
vocabulary.context: The lady behind the counter handed a round, flaky pastry filled with chocolate to each of them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 柜台后面的女士递给他们每人一份充满巧克力的圆形酥皮糕点

vocabulary.definition: n. 五香菜炖肉片
vocabulary.context: " Non, Monsieur , but we have a fine ragout ." Ragout, Lee discovered, was a very good mixture of vegetables and meat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "不，先生，但我们有美味的炖肉。"李发现，炖肉是蔬菜和肉类的完美混合物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 酵母的, 起泡沫的, 浅薄的
vocabulary.context: Warm, yeasty, and sugary - so good, Lauren thought she could almost bite into the smell alone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 温暖、酵母味和糖味--太好了，劳伦觉得她几乎可以独自咬住这种气味

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有硬皮的, 易怒的；[建] 硬的, 有壳的, 似外皮的
vocabulary.context: Past the baskets of crusty baguettes and rolls, the cases of eclairs and fruit tarts and decorated cakes, they followed Jacques to the counter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 经过一篮篮硬皮法棍面包和面包卷、一箱箱闪电泡芙、水果馅饼和装饰蛋糕，他们跟着雅克来到柜台

vocabulary.definition: n. 侍者
vocabulary.context: He saw nothing that looked like peanut butter, but he asked the waiter, anyway.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他没有看到任何看起来像花生酱的东西，但无论如何他还是问了服务员

vocabulary.definition: n. 部门, 系, 机关；[医] 部, 科
vocabulary.context: One day, Lauren and Lee were walking with their mom through the grand magasin , the big department store.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一天，劳伦和李和他们的妈妈一起穿过大型百货商店 Grand Magasin

vocabulary.definition: n. 腰带, 束腰带

vocabulary.definition: n. 办公室, 部, 公职, 职责；[化] 办公室

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亨丽埃塔走过房子，探索每个房间，除了爸爸的办公室

vocabulary.definition: n. 横鞍, 女鞍
vocabulary.context: Sybil Ludington made her own heroic night ride, only she rode sidesaddle and rode much much further than Revere did.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 西比尔·拉丁顿 (Sybil Ludington) 完成了自己的英雄夜间骑行，只不过她是侧鞍骑行，而且比里维尔 (Revere) 骑行的距离远得多

vocabulary.definition: n. <美>日出
vocabulary.context: When she arrived home at sun-up that next morning, Sybil had covered over 40 miles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当第二天早上日出时回到家时，西比尔已经走了 40 多英里

vocabulary.definition: adv. 英雄地; 超人地; 冒险地; 庞大地
vocabulary.context: You've no doubt heard of Paul Revere heroically riding at midnight to let everyone know that the British were coming.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你无疑听说过保罗·里维尔（Paul Revere）在午夜英勇骑马，让所有人知道英国人即将到来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 通宵的
vocabulary.context: Muster at Ludington's at daybreak!" she was heard shouting on her all-night ride.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 黎明时分在拉丁顿集合！"有人在整夜的骑行中听到她大喊

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 派遣；n. 派遣, 急件；[计] 调度
vocabulary.context: A messenger rider was sent to dispatch the message of the British attack to nearby towns.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一名信使被派去向附近的城镇传达英国袭击的消息

vocabulary.definition: n. 召集, 集合, 检阅, 清单, 花名册, 样品；v.t. 召集, 集合, 应召；v.i. 集合, 集中

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于上校需要制定战略，年轻的西比尔尽职尽责地承担了集结部队并警告附近邻居的使命

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无齿的；[医] 无牙的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他一点一点地护理，然后他就走了

vocabulary.definition: n. 地铁

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有菱形斑纹的；n. 菱背响尾蛇
vocabulary.context: An oyster toadfish and a diamondback terrapin had gone into the trap, too, probably for the minnies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一条牡蛎蟾蜍和一条小菜斑龟也掉进了陷阱，可能是为了米妮

vocabulary.definition: adj. 硬皮的, 顽固的
vocabulary.context: I dug up two dozen hard-shell clams in twenty minutes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我在二十分钟内挖出了两打硬壳蛤

vocabulary.definition: n. 牛臀肉, 银汉鱼
vocabulary.context: I lowered a trap into the creek and startled a school of Atlantic silverside fish ("shiners").
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我在小溪里放了一个陷阱，惊动了一群大西洋银边鱼（"闪光鱼"）

vocabulary.definition: n. 蛤, 沉默寡言的人；v.i. 捞蛤
vocabulary.context: I showed it to him, and because he had noticed the clams, I produced my clamming license, too.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我把它拿给他看，因为他注意到了蛤蜊，所以我也出示了我的蛤蜊许可证

vocabulary.definition: n. 蟾鱼
vocabulary.context: An oyster toadfish and a diamondback terrapin had gone into the trap, too, probably for the minnies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一条牡蛎蟾蜍和一条小菜斑龟也掉进了陷阱，可能是为了米妮

vocabulary.definition: n. 白鹭
vocabulary.context: I interrupted an egret in its fishing, and it waded away from me quickly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我打断了一只正在钓鱼的白鹭，它很快就涉水离开了我

vocabulary.definition: adv. 交替地, 间隔地
vocabulary.context: It is a special place, with plants and animals adapted to a salty environment that is alternately wet and dry.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一个特殊的地方，植物和动物适应了干湿交替的咸味环境

vocabulary.definition: n. 发光体, 杰出人物
vocabulary.context: Mom and Izzie's brother, Simon, are busy making luminaries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈和伊兹的弟弟西蒙正忙着制作灯具

vocabulary.definition: n. 中午
vocabulary.context: On the solstice, the northern half of Earth tilts far from the sun, creating the longest night and the longest noontime shadows of the year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在夏至那天，地球的北半部倾斜远离太阳，创造了一年中最长的夜晚和最长的正午阴影

vocabulary.definition: n. 苹果汁, 苹果酒；[建] 苹果汁
vocabulary.context: Friends and family carry gifts of bread, cookies, and hot cider.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 朋友和家人携带面包、饼干和热苹果酒作为礼物

vocabulary.definition: n. 槲寄生属植物；[医] 槲寄生(跗寄生属植物通称)
vocabulary.context: Izzie's specialty is mistletoe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伊兹的专长是槲寄生

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 包进, 拥抱
vocabulary.context: Izzie feels the love of her family enfold her, warm like sunshine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伊兹感受到家人的爱包围着她，温暖如阳光

vocabulary.definition: n. 大篝火, 营火
vocabulary.context: Dad will start the bonfire and the celebration will begin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爸爸将生起篝火，庆祝活动开始

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 吸入；v.i. 吸气
vocabulary.context: She inhales and turns her back to the fire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她吸了一口气，转身背对着火

vocabulary.definition: n. 听众, 观众, 读者；[法] 听讼, 观众, 听众
vocabulary.context: "You know that Izzie doesn't like an audience, Bert," says Izzie's mom.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你知道伊齐不喜欢观众，伯特，"伊齐的妈妈说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 用右手的, 向右转的, 右旋性的
vocabulary.context: About 90 percent of humans are right-handed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大约 90% 的人是右利手

vocabulary.definition: n. 黑猩猩
vocabulary.context: Most of the chimps did the job with their left hand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数黑猩猩用左手完成这项工作

vocabulary.definition: adj. 左撇的, 用左手的, 笨拙的；[医] 善用左手的, 左利的
vocabulary.context: At first, chimpanzees appeared to be left-handed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 起初，黑猩猩似乎是左撇子

vocabulary.definition: n. 强打, 用力挥击, 尖刻的话, 碰擦, 起重杆；v.t. 强打, 用力挥击, 偷
vocabulary.context: Hopkins says the chimps may have used the weaker hand to pull out the termites and the dominant hand to swipe off the insects and put them in their mouths.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 霍普金斯说，黑猩猩可能用较弱的手拉出白蚁，用惯用的手扫掉昆虫并将其放入嘴中

vocabulary.definition: n. 优势, 显性, 统治, 控制, 支配；[计] 控制, 扰势
vocabulary.context: By the time kids are four or five years old, they show hand dominance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当孩子四五岁的时候，他们就会表现出手的优势

vocabulary.definition: n. 偏爱, 优先, 喜爱物；[计] 首选项
vocabulary.context: The cats showed no preference; they used either paw.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 猫没有表现出任何偏好；他们使用任一爪子

vocabulary.definition: n. 男人, 雄性动物；adj. 男性的, 雄性的, 有力的
vocabulary.context: For males, it was the opposite: 19 out of 21 used the left paw.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于雄性来说，情况恰恰相反：21 只中有 19 只使用左爪

vocabulary.definition: adj. 正确的, 精确的；[经] 准确的, 精确的
vocabulary.context: Whether it's the right or left, you probably use the same hand or foot to do other things that need accurate, well-controlled movements.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 无论是右手还是左手，您可能会使用同一只手或一只脚来做其他需要准确、良好控制动作的事情

vocabulary.definition: n. 女性, 女人, 雌性动物；adj. 女性的, 女子的
vocabulary.context: All of the female cats except one used the right paw to get the tuna.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除一只外，所有母猫都用右爪来抓金枪鱼

vocabulary.definition: n. 机动艇
vocabulary.context: Sure, it was awesome to go out in the powerboat every day to search for dolphin pods with his parents, but that first holiday had been strange....
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当然，每天和父母一起乘摩托艇出去寻找海豚群真是太棒了，但第一个假期很奇怪......

vocabulary.definition: n. 叮当声
vocabulary.context: Clonk, clonk. Walter woke up to the sound of small rocks hitting the wooden shutters on his window. "Walter! Come to the door!" whispered a voice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 叮当，叮当。沃尔特被小石块撞击窗户上木制百叶窗的声音吵醒。 "沃尔特！到门口来吧！"一个声音低声说道

vocabulary.definition: n. 无月亮的
vocabulary.context: It was a moonless night, but a tiny row of lights flickered on the horizon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那是一个没有月亮的夜晚，但地平线上闪烁着一排细小的灯光

vocabulary.definition: n. 雪撬；v.t. 用雪撬搬运；v.i. 乘雪撬
vocabulary.context: "Did you check to see if Santa's sleigh managed to fly all the way to Zanzibar?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你检查过圣诞老人的雪橇是否一路飞到了桑给巴尔吗？"

vocabulary.definition: n. 枪鱼
vocabulary.context: Everyone admired the huge fish: a black marlin longer than Walter's father was tall.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个人都欣赏这条巨大的鱼：一条比沃尔特父亲还高的黑马林鱼

vocabulary.definition: n. 百叶窗, 关闭物, 照相机快门, 关闭者；v.t. 为...装百叶窗, 以百叶窗遮闭
vocabulary.context: Walter woke up to the sound of small rocks hitting the wooden shutters on his window.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 沃尔特被小石块撞击窗户上木制百叶窗的声音吵醒

vocabulary.definition: n. 渔夫, 钓鱼者, 渔船
vocabulary.context: The father of Walter's friend Hamisi was a fisherman.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 沃尔特的朋友哈米西的父亲是一名渔民

vocabulary.definition: adj. 传统的, 惯例的；[经] 传统的, 惯例的
vocabulary.context: Everybody scouted for signs of Hamisi's father's ngalawa , the traditional wooden boat with one sail.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个人都在寻找哈米西父亲的 ngalawa 的痕迹，这是一种传统的单帆木船

vocabulary.definition: n. 排骨, 小排骨
vocabulary.context: "But I need some real food, like spareribs, baked beans, and pie, not these green jiggly-wigglies."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "但我需要一些真正的食物，比如排骨、烤豆子和馅饼，而不是这些绿色的摇摇晃晃的东西。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 曾孙
vocabulary.context: Harris won't be joining us, but his great-grandson, Boomer, will tell us about the Tuskegee pilots who served our country so bravely."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 哈里斯不会加入我们，但他的曾孙布默会告诉我们塔斯基吉飞行员如此勇敢地为我们的国家服务。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 墓石, 基石
vocabulary.context: Every Memorial Day, they placed little flags by the headstones of a dozen pilots.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个阵亡将士纪念日，他们都会在十几名飞行员的墓碑旁放置小旗帜

vocabulary.definition: n. 烦躁, 磨损, 焦急, 网状饰物；v.i. 烦恼, 不满, 磨损；v.t. 使烦恼, 腐蚀, 使磨损, 使起波纹
vocabulary.context: Mom fretted the way she did when Boomer forgot to wear his hat on a cold day.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈很烦恼，就像布玛在寒冷的日子忘记戴帽子时一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 零钱, 榴霰弹, 弹片
vocabulary.context: "A piece of shrapnel tore through the floor of the cockpit and scratched that sleeve."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "一块弹片撕裂了驾驶舱的地板并划伤了那个袖子。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 螺旋桨, 推进器；[化] 搅拌叶片; 螺旋桨
vocabulary.context: "The P-51!" He spun the propeller.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "P-51！"他转动螺旋桨

vocabulary.definition: n. 皮带扣, 扣子；v.t. 扣住, 使弯曲；v.i. 扣住, 变弯曲, 屈服
vocabulary.context: So I took a deep breath and buckled up."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所以我深吸了一口气，系好安全带。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 显著地, 著名地, 尤其, 特别
vocabulary.context: Notably, these dedicated heroes never lost a single plane they escorted!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 值得注意的是，这些奉献的英雄从未失去过他们护送的一架飞机！

vocabulary.definition: n. 番石榴
vocabulary.context: He has used bamboo in Japan and strawberry guava in Hawaii.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他在日本使用了竹子，在夏威夷使用了草莓番石榴

vocabulary.definition: n. 隐匿处
vocabulary.context: He'd work for hours bending sticks into forts and hideouts for his brothers and sisters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他会花几个小时为他的兄弟姐妹将棍子弯曲成堡垒和藏身之处

vocabulary.definition: n. （英国作家J R R Tolkien笔下的）
vocabulary.context: Outside an art museum in Topeka, Kansas, a child peers from the window of what looks like a giant hobbit house.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在堪萨斯州托皮卡的一家艺术博物馆外，一个孩子从看起来像一座巨大的霍比特人房子的窗户里往外看

vocabulary.definition: v. 雕刻, 造型
vocabulary.context: When he grew up, he studied art and learned to sculpt with clay.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 长大后，他学习艺术并学会用粘土雕刻

vocabulary.definition: n. 拱门, 拱道
vocabulary.context: Other kids scamper through the house's woven archway into a twisted twig tower.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他孩子穿过房子的编织拱门，跑进一座扭曲的树枝塔

vocabulary.definition: n. 蹦跳, 奔跑, 浏览；v.i. 蹦跳, 奔跑, 浏览
vocabulary.context: Other kids scamper through the house's woven archway into a twisted twig tower.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他孩子穿过房子的编织拱门，跑进一座扭曲的树枝塔

vocabulary.definition: n. 草莓
vocabulary.context: He has used bamboo in Japan and strawberry guava in Hawaii.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他在日本使用了竹子，在夏威夷使用了草莓番石榴

vocabulary.definition: adj. 挑选出来的, 极好的；v. 选择, 挑选；n. 被挑选者, 精萃；[计] 选定
vocabulary.context: For example, he often selects finger- to wrist-sized saplings from areas where the young trees would be cleared anyway for new building projects.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，他经常从为新建筑项目而清除幼树的地区选择手指到手腕大小的树苗

vocabulary.definition: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；v.t. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映；v.i. 凸出
vocabulary.context: For example, he often selects finger- to wrist-sized saplings from areas where the young trees would be cleared anyway for new building projects.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，他经常从为新建筑项目而清除幼树的地区选择手指到手腕大小的树苗

vocabulary.definition: n. 旋转木马
vocabulary.context: He even built an ant school, with teeny swings, ladders, seesaws, and a merry-go-round.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他甚至建造了一个蚂蚁学校，里面有小秋千、梯子、跷跷板和旋转木马

vocabulary.definition: n. 家蝇
vocabulary.context: Willard's favorite paintbrush is one hair from the back of a dead housefly!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 威拉德最喜欢的画笔是死苍蝇背上的一根头发！

vocabulary.definition: n. 稀罕, 罕有, 珍奇, 稀薄
vocabulary.context: Because of their beauty and rarity, his sculptures have made Willard a wealthy man.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于其美丽和稀有，他的雕塑使威拉德成为了一名富有的人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 坚忍的, 不屈不挠的, 执拗的, 倔强的
vocabulary.context: But he says, "Success isn't about material things like an expensive watch or a costly ring; it's about persevering and achieving your dreams."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但他说，"成功并不在于昂贵的手表或昂贵的戒指等物质事物；而是在于坚持不懈并实现你的梦想。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 跷跷板, 跷跷板游戏, 起伏交替的动作；adj. 上下或前后摇动的, 交互的；v.i. 玩跷跷板, 上下或来回摇动；v.t. 使上下或来回摇动
vocabulary.context: He even built an ant school, with teeny swings, ladders, seesaws, and a merry-go-round.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他甚至建造了一个蚂蚁学校，里面有小秋千、梯子、跷跷板和旋转木马

vocabulary.definition: n. 静电, 静电干扰；adj. 静态的, 静止的, 固有的, 静电的
vocabulary.context: But static electricity sometimes causes a sculpture to flit away - lost forever.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但静电有时会导致雕塑飞走--永远消失

vocabulary.definition: n. 蜘蛛网, 蛛丝, 混乱；v.t. 使布满蛛网
vocabulary.context: For details like the ropes on a ship, he has found that cobwebs or strands of glue are perfect.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于像船上的绳索这样的细节，他发现蜘蛛网或胶水是完美的

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 劝告, 给...出主意, 通知, 建议；v.i. 提意见, 商量
vocabulary.context: Willard's mother advised him, "The smaller you carve, the bigger your name will become." So he began to carve even smaller.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 威拉德的母亲建议他："你雕刻的越小，你的名字就会变得越大。"于是他开始雕刻得更小

vocabulary.definition: n. 犹太人集会, 犹太教会堂, 犹太教
vocabulary.context: Not only did David live next door, but he was in Pasha's grade and went to the same synagogue.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大卫不仅住在隔壁，而且与帕夏同年级，去同一座犹太教堂

vocabulary.definition: adj. 被委屈, 被伤害, 被错怪；v. 不公正（或不诚实）对待, 冤枉( wrong的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: When Dedushka had explained Yom Kippur, he'd said, "Before the start of Yom Kippur, we apologize to those we've wronged, and we forgive those who apologize to us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当德杜什卡解释赎罪日时，他说："在赎罪日开始之前，我们向那些被我们冤枉的人道歉，我们原谅那些向我们道歉的人

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 碾碎, 缩紧；v.i. 嘎吱地响, 蜷缩；n. 嘎嘎响声
vocabulary.context: Pasha scrunched up in a corner of the playground and put his head down on his knees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 帕夏在操场的一角蜷缩起来，把头放在膝盖上

vocabulary.definition: n. 地理学, 地理；[医] 地理
vocabulary.context: Still, during geography, Pasha could not remember where Canada was.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管如此，在地理课上，帕夏还是不记得加拿大在哪里

vocabulary.definition: n. 咳嗽；v.i. 咳嗽；v.t. 咳出
vocabulary.context: David kicked the ground, put his hands in his pockets, and coughed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大卫踢着地，双手插进口袋，咳嗽了一声

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 起反应, 起作用, 反攻；[医] 应答, 发生反应
vocabulary.context: "If someone starts a problem, and then another person reacts in not such a nice way, does first person have to apologize before Yom Kippur?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "如果有人提出问题，然后另一个人的反应不太好，那么第一个人必须在赎罪日之前道歉吗？"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 差异, 不同, 各别, 各种
vocabulary.context: He wished Dedushka had answered differently.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他希望德杜什卡能有不同的回答

vocabulary.definition: n. 习惯, 风俗, 海关, 自定义；adj. 定制的；[计] 定制; 自定义
vocabulary.context: Now that he lived in America, Pasha wanted to be just like Dedushka, who observed Jewish customs and holidays.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，帕夏生活在美国，他想像德杜什卡一样，遵守犹太习俗和节日

vocabulary.definition: n. 服务, 贡献, 雇佣, 公职, 服役, 功劳, 仪式, 送达, 行政部门；v.t. 保养, 维修；adj. 武装部队的, 服务性的, 仆人的, 耐用的；[计] 服务, 业务
vocabulary.context: "Do you want to sit together at Yom Kippur services tomorrow?" David asked.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你想明天一起参加赎罪日仪式吗？"大卫问道

vocabulary.definition: n. 乡村音乐
vocabulary.context: "My favorite game is country-and-western singing with my friend Jillian.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我最喜欢的游戏是和我的朋友吉莉安一起唱乡村和西部歌曲

vocabulary.definition: adj. 糖醋的
vocabulary.context: It has this sweet-and-sour taste that makes my tongue curl up at the edges.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它有一种酸甜的味道，让我的舌头在边缘卷曲

vocabulary.definition: n. 真假嗓音反复变换的唱腔；v. 用真假嗓音反复变换地唱
vocabulary.context: We're both learning how to yodel.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们都在学习如何唱约德尔歌

vocabulary.definition: n. 烂泥, 雪水, 无聊的言情内容, 胡说八道；v.t. 溅湿, 灌泥浆于；v.i. 在雪泥(或泥浆)中走
vocabulary.context: "My favorite drink is lemonade slush.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我最喜欢的饮料是柠檬水泥

vocabulary.definition: n. 录相磁带；v.t. 把电视节目录在录像磁带上
vocabulary.context: ...she can nearly get her mouth right. We're both learning how to yodel. Oh-de.layee. Oh-de-layee. Oh-de-layee. Last week, Uncle Jack videotaped us. He says we are good enough for his TV.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...她几乎能把嘴说对了。我们都在学习如何唱约德尔歌。哦-de.layee。噢，德莱伊。噢，德莱伊。上周，杰克叔叔给我们录像了。他说我们对他的电视来说已经足够好了

vocabulary.definition: n. 扩音器, 麦克风；[医] 扩音器, 传声器
vocabulary.context: We dress up and stand on the bed with a pretend microphone and Dad's old guitar.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们盛装打扮，拿着假装的麦克风和爸爸的旧吉他站在床上

vocabulary.definition: n. 化石, 古物；adj. 化石的, 陈腐的, 守旧的
vocabulary.context: The inside pockets hold my treasures-the pink shell, the fossil stone, the acorn with a face painted on it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 里面的口袋里装着我的宝贝--粉红色的贝壳、化石、画着脸的橡子

vocabulary.definition: n. 票, 券, 车票, 标签, 入场券, 证明书；v.t. 加标签于, 为...购票
vocabulary.context: I can walk up and down, pretending I'm the ticket person, or I can just sit with my head against Mom, and shut my eyes to hear the train talk to me.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我可以来回走动，假装我是售票员，或者我可以头靠着妈妈坐着，闭上眼睛听火车对我说话

vocabulary.definition: adv. 几乎, 密切地
vocabulary.context: I'm showing Jillian how to whistle, and she can nearly get her mouth right.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我正在向吉莉安展示如何吹口哨，她几乎能把嘴说对了

vocabulary.definition: v. <美>用套索套捕( lasso的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: A large and heavy rock would be lassoed with a rope onto the sled and a dozen men would pull the sled along this "road." Other men would constantly pour water on the tracks and on the sand to keep it moving smoothly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 用绳子将一块又大又重的岩石套在雪橇上，然后十几个人沿着这条"路"拉雪橇。其他人会不断地在铁轨和沙子上浇水，以保持轨道顺利移动

vocabulary.definition: n. 推土机；[化] 推土机
vocabulary.context: So, since pyramids were created before there were cranes or bulldozers - or even wheels or pulleys - how did the ancient Egyptians move these heavy rocks without machines?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那么，既然金字塔是在起重机或推土机--甚至轮子或滑轮出现之前就被创造出来的--古埃及人是如何在没有机器的情况下移动这些沉重的岩石的呢？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可经营的, 可使用的；[机] 能工作的, 机械等能使用的, 材料等可加工的
vocabulary.context: As the water was absorbed, the wedges expanded, and the rocks would naturally break into more workable sizes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当水被吸收时，楔子膨胀，岩石自然会破碎成更适合使用的尺寸

vocabulary.definition: n. 滑车, 滑轮；[医] 滑车
vocabulary.context: So, since pyramids were created before there were cranes or bulldozers - or even wheels or pulleys - how did the ancient Egyptians move these heavy rocks without machines?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那么，既然金字塔是在起重机或推土机--甚至轮子或滑轮出现之前就被创造出来的--古埃及人是如何在没有机器的情况下移动这些沉重的岩石的呢？

vocabulary.definition: n. 铲子, 锄, 铲刀, 黑桃；v.t. 以锄掘, 把...弄实抹平；v.i. 铲
vocabulary.context: First, the Egyptians used tools like hammers and spades to dig up the rocks from the quarry.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 首先，埃及人使用锤子和铲子等工具从采石场挖出岩石

vocabulary.definition: n. 人力；[经] 人力
vocabulary.context: Whatever reasons the ancient Egyptians had for putting so many resources and so much manpower into building the pyramids, we can be grateful they did.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 无论古埃及人出于何种原因投入如此多的资源和人力来建造金字塔，我们都应该感谢他们这样做

vocabulary.definition: adv. 大约, 大致, 近于；[经] 大约, 近似
vocabulary.context: The Great Pyramid was built from more than two million limestone blocks and each block weighed around two tons, which is approximately the same weight as 20 baby elephants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大金字塔由超过 200 万块石灰石块建成，每块石灰石块重约 2 吨，大约相当于 20 头小象的重量

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 吸收, 使全神贯注, 同化, 买进, 理解, 承受, 忍受, 承担；[医] 吸收
vocabulary.context: As the water was absorbed, the wedges expanded, and the rocks would naturally break into more workable sizes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当水被吸收时，楔子膨胀，岩石自然会破碎成更适合使用的尺寸

vocabulary.definition: n. 关心, 注意, 尊敬, 关系, 问候；v.t. 视为, 注意, 考虑, 和...有关, 看待；v.i. 注视, 注意
vocabulary.context: But pyramid building was very well regarded and workers were treated very well, so men would volunteer from all over Egypt to join pyramid building projects.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是金字塔的建造受到了很好的重视，工人的待遇也很好，所以埃及各地的男人都会自愿加入金字塔的建造项目

vocabulary.definition: adj. 直线的, 直排式的
vocabulary.context: The diameter of a circle is the straight-line distance from one side of the circle to the other through the center.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 圆的直径是从圆的一侧通过圆心到另一侧的直线距离

vocabulary.definition: n. 圆周, 周缘, 胸围；[医] 周缘, 环状面
vocabulary.context: The number pi is the result of dividing the circumference of a circle by its diameter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: pi 是圆的周长除以直径的结果

vocabulary.definition: adj. 手牵手的, 亲密的, 并进的
vocabulary.context: Baking pies and math go hand-in-hand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 烘焙馅饼和数学是齐头并进的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 风味极佳的, 可口的, 味香的；n. 开胃菜
vocabulary.context: Sometimes, pies can even be a main course when they're filled with meat or savory ingredients.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有时，当馅饼里有肉或咸味配料时，馅饼甚至可以成为主菜

vocabulary.definition: n. 直径；[医] 直经, 径
vocabulary.context: The number pi is the result of dividing the circumference of a circle by its diameter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: pi 是圆的周长除以直径的结果

vocabulary.definition: num. 第十四, 十四分之一
vocabulary.context: The fourteenth day of March - or 3/14 - is known as Pi Day because the date matches with the first three digits of pi.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 三月的第十四天 - 或 3/14 - 被称为圆周率日，因为该日期与圆周率的前三位数字匹配

vocabulary.definition: n. 滋味, 调味品；v.t. 加味于
vocabulary.context: These sweet treats can come in many forms, ranging from fruit flavors like cherry and apple to crunchy textures like pecan.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些甜点有多种形式，从樱桃和苹果等水果口味到山核桃等松脆质地

vocabulary.definition: n. 数学；[机] 数学
vocabulary.context: Pi is one of a kind in mathematics.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Pi 是数学中的一种

vocabulary.definition: adj. 最近的, 近代的, 最新的；[经] 最近的, 新进的
vocabulary.context: Celebrating Pi Day is a much more recent event.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 庆祝圆周率日是最近才发生的事件

vocabulary.definition: adj. 四分之一决赛的；n. 四分之一决赛
vocabulary.context: In his second year, he and his team made the quarterfinals of the NCAA March Madness basketball championship tournament.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他的第二年，他和他的球队进入了NCAA疯狂三月篮球锦标赛的四分之一决赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 龙套角色
vocabulary.context: But all Virginia Tech offered him was a chance to play as a walk-on.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但弗吉尼亚理工大学为他提供的只是一个替补出场的机会

vocabulary.definition: n. 仆人, 侍从, 马屁精；v.t. 服侍, 侍候, 奉承
vocabulary.context: They were so good that coach James Lackey had begun arranging games with big high schools in the area.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们是如此出色，以至于教练詹姆斯·拉基（James Lackey）开始安排与该地区大型高中的比赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 嗡嗡作声的东西, 蜂音器；[化] 蜂鸣器; 磨轮; 砂轮
vocabulary.context: When the buzzer rang, the Queensway team had won by seven points.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当蜂鸣器响起时，金钟队已经赢了七分

vocabulary.definition: n. 疯狂, 愚蠢的行为；[医] 狂, 疯狂
vocabulary.context: In his second year, he and his team made the quarterfinals of the NCAA March Madness basketball championship tournament.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他的第二年，他和他的球队进入了NCAA疯狂三月篮球锦标赛的四分之一决赛

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 模仿, 效法, 冒充, 仿造
vocabulary.context: Steph and his brother liked to run across to the main court to see a few plays, then they rushed back to the practice court to imitate what they saw.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 斯蒂芬和他的兄弟喜欢跑到主球场看几场比赛，然后他们冲回训练场模仿他们所看到的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地；n. 绝食, 斋戒；v.i. 绝食, 斋戒
vocabulary.context: He was fast, and he practiced and practiced until he became one of the fastest shooters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他速度很快，他不断练习，直到成为速度最快的射手之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 学问, 学术成就, 奖学金
vocabulary.context: That meant that he wouldn't receive an athletic scholarship.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这意味着他不会获得体育奖学金

vocabulary.definition: n. 平均, 平均数, 一般水平, 海损；adj. 平均的, 中等的, 平常的；v.t. 算出...平均数, 平均做, 均分, 使平衡；v.i. 平均为, 呈中间色
vocabulary.context: Steph averaged 21.5 points per game in 2006-2007, his first year at Davidson.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2006-2007 年，斯蒂芬在戴维森大学的第一年，场均得到 21.5 分

vocabulary.definition: n. <口>=crocodile
vocabulary.context: Crocodile mothers guard their eggs, help the babies out of their eggshells, and hang around for months until the little crocs are ready to face the world on their own.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鳄鱼妈妈守护着它们的蛋，帮助小鳄鱼从蛋壳里出来，并在它们身边待上几个月，直到小鳄鱼准备好独自面对世界

vocabulary.definition: n. 古生物学；[医] 古生物学
vocabulary.context: Later research (and more fossil finds) showed that Oviraptor was actually a devoted parent, according to the University of California Museum of Paleontology.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据加州大学古生物学博物馆的说法，后来的研究（以及更多的化石发现）表明偷蛋龙实际上是一位忠诚的父母

vocabulary.definition: n. 雉鸡, 野鸡, 雉科鸟
vocabulary.context: Though some were as small as modern-day pheasants or turkeys, others were huge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然有些像现代的野鸡或火鸡一样小，但有些却很大

vocabulary.definition: n. 父母对子女的养育
vocabulary.context: Reptiles aren't known for their parenting skills.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爬行动物并不以其养育技能而闻名

vocabulary.definition: n. 古生物学者
vocabulary.context: In the late 1970s, the famous paleontologist Jack Horner and his colleagues found evidence showing how devoted some dinosaurs were to their offspring.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 20世纪70年代末，著名古生物学家杰克·霍纳（Jack Horner）和他的同事发现了一些证据，表明一些恐龙对它们的后代有多么忠诚

vocabulary.definition: adj. 现代的；当代的
vocabulary.context: Though some were as small as modern-day pheasants or turkeys, others were huge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然有些像现代的野鸡或火鸡一样小，但有些却很大

vocabulary.definition: n. 少年, 少年读物；adj. 少年的, 不成熟的, 适于少年的
vocabulary.context: They studied a place where fossils of a duck-billed dinosaur were found in all stages of development: eggs, hatchlings, juveniles, and adults.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们研究了一个地方，发现了鸭嘴恐龙各个发育阶段的化石：蛋、幼体、幼体和成体

vocabulary.definition: n. 例外, 除外, 异议；[计] 例外; 异常
vocabulary.context: Sure, there are exceptions: Some snakes wrap themselves around a clutch of eggs to keep the eggs warm.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当然，也有例外：有些蛇将自己包裹在一堆蛋上以保持蛋的温暖

vocabulary.definition: n. 发展；[化] 展开
vocabulary.context: They studied a place where fossils of a duck-billed dinosaur were found in all stages of development: eggs, hatchlings, juveniles, and adults.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们研究了一个地方，发现了鸭嘴恐龙各个发育阶段的化石：蛋、幼体、幼体和成体

vocabulary.definition: n. 剥落, 剥落物；[医] 表皮脱落, 鳞片样脱皮, 表皮剥脱
vocabulary.context: This process is called exfoliation and it makes your skin smoother and fresher.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个过程称为去角质，它可以让您的皮肤更光滑、更清新

vocabulary.definition: n. 保护剂
vocabulary.context: Ore(noun)a rock or mineral the same effect as the black under-eye protectant that many athletes use today.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 矿石（名词）一种岩石或矿物，与当今许多运动员使用的黑色眼部保护剂具有相同的效果

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 剥落, 剥脱；v.t. 使片状脱落
vocabulary.context: Ancient Egyptians had a similar process using Dead Sea salts to exfoliate their skin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 古埃及人也有类似的过程，使用死海盐来去除皮肤角质

vocabulary.definition: n. 孔雀石；[化] 孔雀石
vocabulary.context: The eyeshadows came from minerals like malachite.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 眼影来自孔雀石等矿物质

vocabulary.definition: n. 溴；[化] 溴Br
vocabulary.context: They also made lipsticks that mixed the dye from iodine and bromine mannite - which was poisonous.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们还制作了将碘和溴甘露醇混合的染料的唇膏，这种染料是有毒的

vocabulary.definition: n. 亚硫酸盐；[化] 亚硫酸盐; 亚硫酸盐或酯、根
vocabulary.context: The eyeliners they used were made of ore, carbon, lead, and sulfite.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们使用的眼线笔由矿石、碳、铅和亚硫酸盐制成

vocabulary.definition: n. [生化]甘露醇
vocabulary.context: They also made lipsticks that mixed the dye from iodine and bromine mannite - which was poisonous.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们还制作了将碘和溴甘露醇混合的染料的唇膏，这种染料是有毒的

vocabulary.definition: n. 眼线膏
vocabulary.context: for "to protect." Ancient Egyptians lined their eyes with smoky kohl - like modern-day eyeliner - to protect their eyes from the sun's rays.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 意为"保护"。古埃及人用烟熏眼线画眼线，就像现代的眼线笔一样，以保护眼睛免受阳光照射

vocabulary.definition: n. 碘, 碘酒；[化] 碘I-2
vocabulary.context: They also made lipsticks that mixed the dye from iodine and bromine mannite - which was poisonous.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们还制作了将碘和溴甘露醇混合的染料的唇膏，这种染料是有毒的

vocabulary.definition: n. 调色板, 颜料；[计] 调色板
vocabulary.context: The Egyptian word "Tutankhamun Artifact" by Robert Thiemann is for "makeup palette" derives 8 from their word licensed under CC0.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Robert Thiemann 的埃及词"Tutankhamun Artifact"是"化妆调色板"的意思，源自他们在 CC0 下获得许可的词 8

vocabulary.definition: n. 奶油糖果
vocabulary.context: The restaurant served a thin butterscotch cookie, but Ruth wanted to create something brand-new.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 餐厅供应薄薄的奶油糖果饼干，但露丝想创造一些全新的东西

vocabulary.definition: n. 糕饼, 蛋白甜馅饼, 蛋白甜饼, 蛋白酥皮筒/酥皮卷, 蛋白酥皮；[化] 蛋糖霜
vocabulary.context: Ruth made lemon meringue pie, Boston cream pie, and gingerbread.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 露丝做了柠檬酥皮派、波士顿奶油派和姜饼

vocabulary.definition: n. 饼干, 小甜点；[建] 糕点
vocabulary.context: Ruth Wakefield wanted a cookie, but not just any cookie.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 露丝·韦克菲尔德想要一块饼干，但不仅仅是任何饼干

vocabulary.definition: n. 一次所烘的面包, 一次所制之量, 一组, 批, 成批, 分批；v. 成批, 分批处理；[计] 一批
vocabulary.context: She tried batch after batch until she had one she liked.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她一批又一批地尝试，直到找到她喜欢的一款

vocabulary.definition: n. 名声, 名人
vocabulary.context: Actors, singers, and other celebrities of the time all ate there.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当时的演员、歌手和其他名人都在那里用餐

vocabulary.definition: adj. 销售的；[计] 销售
vocabulary.context: The cookies were so popular that the chocolate bar company saw their sales go up 500% in the region where Ruth lived!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些饼干非常受欢迎，以至于巧克力棒公司在露丝居住的地区发现它们的销售额增长了 500%！

vocabulary.definition: v. 嘎吱嘎吱的咬嚼, 压碎, 嘎吱嘎吱地踏过；n. 咬碎, 咬碎声
vocabulary.context: Ruth named her new cookie the Chocolate Crunch Cookie.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 露丝将她的新饼干命名为"巧克力脆饼"

vocabulary.definition: n. 歌手
vocabulary.context: Actors, singers, and other celebrities of the time all ate there.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当时的演员、歌手和其他名人都在那里用餐

vocabulary.definition: n. 产品, 结果, 乘积；[化] 生产物
vocabulary.context: Today, the Toll House name and Ruth's recipe still appear on bags of chocolate chips and on chocolate chip cookie products.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，收费站的名称和露丝的食谱仍然出现在巧克力片袋和巧克力片饼干产品上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 与...不适合的
vocabulary.context: In fact, dinosaurs seemed so ill-suited to life on Earth that scientists initially believed they died out on their own.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 事实上，恐龙似乎非常不适合地球上的生命，以至于科学家最初认为它们会自行灭绝

vocabulary.definition: adj. 温血的, 冲动的, 热血的, 热情的
vocabulary.context: Scientists began to think that, instead of being colossal, cold-blooded, lumbering lizards, dinosaurs probably were warm-blooded and more bird-like: agile and lively - but way more ferocious.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学家们开始认为，恐龙可能不是巨大、冷血、笨重的蜥蜴，而是温血动物，更像鸟类：敏捷、活泼，但更加凶猛

vocabulary.definition: n. 鬣蜥
vocabulary.context: And large tooth-shaped fossils discovered in 1822 were identified as coming from something like a super-sized iguana.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1822 年发现的大型齿状化石被鉴定为来自类似超大鬣蜥的物体

vocabulary.definition: n. 袋鼠；[医] 袋鼠(澳洲产)
vocabulary.context: In art and exhibits, the dinosaurs were posed standing upright with their tails dragging on the ground like monstrous kangaroos.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在艺术和展览中，恐龙被摆出直立的姿势，尾巴像巨大的袋鼠一样拖在地上

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 脱臼, 弄乱
vocabulary.context: The king of the tyrant lizards would not be able to hold itself upright without dislocating its hips and maybe even breaking some tail bones.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 暴君蜥蜴之王如果不使臀部脱臼，甚至可能折断一些尾骨，就无法保持直立

vocabulary.definition: n. （贪婪索贿的）"荤"警官

vocabulary.definition: n. 胭脂鱼
vocabulary.context: The "king of the tyrant lizards" - that's what "Tyrannosaurus rex" means - more likely had a mullet of fluffy, maybe even colorful feathers on its head, neck and tail.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "暴君蜥蜴之王"--这就是"霸王龙"的意思--更可能的是，它的头部、颈部和尾巴上长着毛茸茸的、甚至可能是彩色的羽毛

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 霸王龙以跟踪的姿势移动，身体几乎与地面平行，长尾巴悬在空中，以平衡其巨大而可怕的头部

vocabulary.definition: n. 岩滑(堆)

vocabulary.definition: n. 提名, 任命, 提名权

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但奥巴马总统的提名不足以让布朗·杰克逊成为法官

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巴拉克·奥巴马总统提名布朗·杰克逊为华盛顿特区联邦法官

vocabulary.definition: adv. 独特地；珍奇地
vocabulary.context: President Biden said that Brown Jackson had a "uniquely accomplished and wide-ranging background" that helped her be a good judge.

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 投资, 花费, 笼罩, 授予；v.i. 投资, 利用
vocabulary.context: "I hope to inspire people to try to follow this path because I love this country, because I love the law, because I think it is important that we all invest in our future," Brown Jackson said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我希望激励人们尝试走这条道路，因为我爱这个国家，因为我爱法律，因为我认为我们所有人都投资于我们的未来很重要，"布朗杰克逊说

vocabulary.definition: n. 圣经

vocabulary.contextTranslation: Ketanji Brown Jackson 将左手放在一本光滑的黑色圣经上

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使气馁, 阻碍
vocabulary.context: But President Obama's nomination wasn't enough for Brown Jackson to become a judge. The U.S. Senate also had to vote to confirm her. Unfortunately, the senate didn't vote. President Obama wasn't discouraged. He nominated her again in January, 2013. This time, the senate voted that Brown Jackson should be a judge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但奥巴马总统的提名不足以让布朗·杰克逊成为法官。美国参议院还必须投票确认她的任命。不幸的是，参议院没有投票。奥巴马总统并没有气馁。 2013年1月，他再次提名她。这一次，参议院投票决定布朗·杰克逊应该担任法官

vocabulary.definition: n. 办事员, 职员, 文书；v.i. 当店员

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从法学院毕业后，她为三名不同的法官担任书记员，负责记录和报告

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 借个帮手......跗节？

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在美国南部的洪水期间，有人看到火蚁用自己的身体制作大型木筏

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这比驼鹿或野牛的平均重量还要重！
